Name: Univision
Description: As the #1 network among U.S. Hispanics for more than three decades, Univision is home to the most-watched Spanish-language content across news, sports, music and entertainment. Univision is home to Liga MX, the most-watched soccer league in the U.S., Liga MX Femenil, UEFA Champions League, 2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup, as well as other soccer leagues and sporting competitions. Univision’s entertainment slate includes hit reality competition “¿Quién es la Máscara?”, and fan-favorite telenovelas and scripted titles. Delivering the biggest moments in Latin music, the network is home to two of the top three most-watched music award shows among U.S. Hispanics, including Premio Lo Nuestro, the longest-running Latin Music awards show in the U.S., and the Latin GRAMMY Awards.

Name: Cleaning Up Podcast
Description:
Once a week, Michael Liebreich & Bryony Worthington have a conversation with a leader in clean energy, mobility, climate finance, or sustainable development.

Featuring an archive of more than 100 interviews with some of the world's most significant voices on the climate - from Nobel laureates to Prime Ministers, Knights of the realm to activists and agitators - Cleaning Up has become an unrivalled guide to the net-zero transition past, present and future.

Each episode covers the technical ground on some aspect of the low-carbon transition – but it also delves into the nature of leadership in the climate transition: whether to be optimistic or pessimistic; how to communicate in order to inspire change; personal credos; and so on.

Name: Immigration Talk Show
Description:
Immigration & Jobs Talk Show encompasses discussions on all types of US visas and jobs and includes insights from prominent attorneys and job market experts.

Visa Categories:

•	Non-Immigrant Visas: B1/B2, F1, H1B, L1, O1, etc.
•	Immigrant Visas: EB-1, EB-2, EB-3, EB-4, EB-5, etc.
•	Humanitarian and Special Programs: TPS, DACA, Refugee/Asylee, etc.
•	Family Sponsored Visas: Immediate Relatives, Family Preference Categories, etc.

Discussion Topics:

•	Visa Eligibility: Criteria and requirements for different visas.
•	Application Process: Step-by-step guide on applying for visas.
•	Job Market Insights: Discuss job opportunities, market trends, and employment-based visas.
•	Prominent Immigration Attorneys: To provide legal insights and advice.
•	Policy Analysts: To discuss the impact of immigration policies.
•	Career Counselors: To guide job opportunities and career planning.
•	Visa Holders: To share their experiences and challenges.

Name: Where The Food Comes From
Description:
Did you know bananas and oranges might soon disappear? Tomatoes are a berry? Have you ever seen indoor 40-ft tomato vines hanging from the ceiling? Urban farms growing food in rehabbed shipping containers? Have you ever milked a water buffalo? (We have!) Oh, and Winnie the Pooh had it totally wrong about bears and honey. We connect with family farms, big growers, scientists, logistics pros and other innovators -- all the invisible hands who help put food on your plate -- to tell the stories of their passion and progress. That's our TV series "Where the Food Comes From" -- as one reviewer put it, "Educational. Entertaining. Enlightening. Endearing."

Watch full episodes of Where The Food Comes From on demand on our YouTube Channel, or catch us on the RFD-TV Network —check local listings— and on demand on RFD-TV Now and Cowboy Channel+! Also available on-air, streaming and on-demand in Lehigh Valley, PA, Mobile, AL, Pensacola, FL and The Cowboy Channel. Name: KTBS - TV
Description:
KTBS 3 will celebrate 70 years of broadcasting service to the ArkLaTex on September 5, 2025. Broadcasting from our modern digital facility on E Kings Highway in Shreveport, we serve 28 counties and parishes in East Texas, Northwest Louisiana, Southeast Oklahoma, and Southern Arkansas.

We offer seven stations starting with KTBS 3 and KPXJ CW-21, and additional digital stations including MeTV- channel 21.2, Antenna TV- channel 21.4, Movies!- channel 21.3, and both our 24-Hour Weather channel 3.2, and 24-Hour News channel 3.3.

Shreveport is located within five hours of seven major cities and has recently become a center of activity for film and television production. With more than 398,000 households in our DMA, Shreveport is considered the economic leader of a region that stretches north to McCurtain county Oklahoma; west to Longview, Texas; south to Natchitoches, Louisiana and east to Monroe, Louisiana. Made up of an array of mid-sized communities, the television marketing population is well over half a million people.

KTBS 3 is owned and operated by KTBS, LLC, and is one of the few stations in the country that can still claim local ownership and community identity. On October 14, 2010, KTBS became the first station in the ArkLaTex to broadcast local news in high definition. And, today, viewers can find our news content on a multitude of platforms, including livestreaming on KTBS.com, as well as over-the-top offerings such as Sony PlayStation, Google TV, and YouTube.

Description: Humber Polytechnic has established Canada’s first Broadcast-Broadband Convergence B2C Lab to explore NextGen television and data delivery applications enabled by the new Advanced Television Systems Committee (ATSC) 3.0 television broadcast standard. The ATSC 3.0 terrestrial broadcast standard runs on an IP (internet protocol) backbone and can integrate with other global data delivery standards, including Wi-Fi and 5G. It offers enhanced audio and visual features for television, and full broadcast mobility and is currently the world's most efficient one-to-many data delivery system.

Name: International Radio Festival
Description:
The International Radio Festival (IRF) was founded in 2010 to showcase and debate the curation and business of music radio content, and the world’s most consumed and most influential medium: Music Radio.

Since its inaugural year, the Festival brought together close to 300 ground-breaking radio stations from around the world. The IRF offers participants an exceptional opportunity to meet with like-minded radio-makers and industry professional to knowledge-share and exchange music radio formats. Radio stations receive the exclusive chance to showcase their best music radio programmes, both in the presence of their peers and industry professionals, as well as “live” on-air with the general public around the globe.

The Festival’s exclusive B2B Forum represents the think-tank and exchange hub for both the players in music radio as well as all music related industries.  Participants gain the opportunity to develop closer business and cultural relationships within this specialised industry. Music radio remains the universally single largest “distributor” and communicator of music, and music related lifestyles, today. The Festival’s format is already playing a pro-active part in communicating and supporting the growing renaissance of music radio across the world today.

www.internationalradiofestival.com

Ambicionamos reduzir a distância com a nossa audiência, dando voz ao povo, através dos nossos recursos tecnológicos, permitindo que a RDDM seja um canal de comunicação aberto.

Queremos ser o ambiente onde todos se encontram e se reconhecem. Onde têm informação, diversão e cultura, instrumentos essenciais para que na hora da tomada de decisões, façam na base da informação credível que oferecemos a sociedade e, lembre-se, levar a felicidade a todos que busca em cada um.

Estatuto Editorial

A RDDM é um canal online generalista, com uma periodicidade diária, podendo sempre que se justifique, publicar e divulgar notícias intercalares, devidamente identificadas, entre edições.
A RDDM é um canal online que: 
* prima pela orientação no rigor, na isenção, na honestidade com que trata todas as notícias, recusando o sensacionalismo.
* assume o compromisso de respeitar sempre o sigilo das suas fontes de informação, nunca quebrando esse princípio fundamental.
* distingue claramente os artigos de opinião, dos artigos informativos, reservando-se o direito de interpretar e relacionar os factos, sempre no respeito da legislação em vigor.
* não tem qualquer dependência de natureza política, ideológica e económica.
compromete-se a respeitar o código deontológico do jornalista assim como irá assumir o compromisso pelo respeito da privacidade dos cidadãos, recusando a divulgação de factos da vida pessoal
* reserva-se a não publicação de qualquer notícia que chegue à sua redação, que não respeite os estatutos e objetivos, que contenham ofensas e calunias a terceiros, que as noticias não tenham a credibilidade certa, de uma ifnormação correta e segura.

Name: AntiClash
Description: AntiClash, c’est un concept d’émission qui va contre la culture du clash en mettant en avant l’esprit et la méthode du dialogue. Les intervenants,  en désaccord sur un sujet à potentiel polémique, sont invités à aller au fond de leurs divergences, avec authenticité et respect. On ne veut pas d’une société où tout le monde est d’accord, mais nos différences, si elles font l’objet d’une conversation constructive, doivent nous enrichir et informer notre compréhension des vrais enjeux .

Name: Reormind Podcast
Description:
Este espacio nace con la idea de que la mente humana es como una Bombilla. Ésta puede encontrarse en diferentes formas: olvidada, perdida (algunos no saben ni que la tienen), desconectada, con las conexiones desordenadas, … pero ahí está … o como algunas veces ocurre, ENCENDIDA, …. Cuando esto último ocurre, pasan cosas y la mayoría de las veces increíbles. Escuchar las increíbles experiencias de otras personas que en algún momento han encendido su bombilla, pueda crear la chispa que  influya sobre otras personas, de manera que, de repente: 

(a) alguien que nunca había tenido inquietudes sobre algo de repente su mayor deseo sea llevarlo a cabo; (b) alguien que no sabía cómo realizar su mayor sueño diera con la clave para ejecutar un plan para perseguirlo.
(c) alguien que no había dado hasta ese momento con la tecla para tener éxito con algún proyecto, vislumbrase de forma clara la solución de la solución.

En este contexto, nace la idea de crear un espacio accesible y cercano para hacer llegar experiencias increíbles al máximo número de bombillas posibles con el objetivo de nutrir, reconectar y reordenar las mentes y encenderlas. Bienvenidos a REORMIND PODFEED.

Name: Sud Savoirs
Description:
Sud Savoirs : Une radio pour partager tous les savoirs et écouter le futur

Sud Savoirs est bien plus qu'une simple radio. C'est un dispositif dédié à la science, à l'art et à la culture, qui vise à promouvoir l'accès universel et équitable à ces biens communs. En Afrique, où la démocratie partielle et le pluralisme exacerbé ont conduit à un retrait des scientifiques, intellectuels et artistes de l'espace public, Sud Savoirs se positionne comme un outil pour mobiliser et investir les savoirs et savoir-faire produits par les élites.
L'objectif de Sud Savoirs est multiple. Il s'agit de vulgariser les résultats de la recherche scientifique, de partager les savoirs extra-académiques africains et de renforcer la dimension dialogique de la démocratie. La radio cherche ainsi à faire face à la crise culturelle actuelle et à contribuer à la transformation politique en favorisant la construction de sociétés basées sur une épistémologie de la pluriversalité.

Sud Savoirs souhaite mettre l'Afrique au centre du débat mondial sur les enjeux de l'humanité et de la planète, en faisant du Sud Global un espace dynamique et ouvert de création et de partage des savoirs scientifiques les plus récents, innovants et disruptifs. La radio accorde également une attention particulière aux savoirs endogènes, en veillant à leur dissémination et en contribuant à la revitalisation des civilisations et cultures africaines.

Cette initiative vise à permettre aux populations africaines, tant sur le continent qu'à travers le monde, d'accéder massivement à une discussion ouverte et critique sur leurs conditions d'existence. En encourageant leur implication en faveur d'une gouvernance transparente et inclusive des institutions, Sud Savoirs vise à renforcer leur compréhension des responsabilités qu'elles ont dans un système globalisé.

At UNIFE, we believe in innovation and excellence as drivers of change. Entdecken Sie über das digitale Kabel, auf unserer Homepage und auf YouTube spannende Hintergründe und Reportagen aus dem ganzen Bundesland. Auch auf Facebook und Instagram sind wir präsent. 
Die Arbeit bei uns ist immer spannend und abwechslungsreich - für Redakteure, im Marketing und für Mediengestalter für Bild und Ton. Volontäre lernen bei uns unter anderem Interviews zu führen und Texte zu schreiben. In der technischen Ausbildung werden unsere Mitarbeiter zu Profis an der Kamera und im Schnitt. 
Gemeinsam zeigen wir Stärken und Probleme unseres Bundeslandes auf. Wir von MV1 portraitieren Menschen und diskutieren in Talkshows aktuelle und auch brisante Themen. Für langjährige Partner erstellen wir individuelle Filme und Werbespots, ganz nach Ihren Wünschen.

Als Eventradiosender sind wir nicht nur on air präsent, sondern begeistern auch off air mit Aktionen und Events.

Name: MixFM 104.3
Description:
Welcome to the vibrant world of MixFM 104.3, your passport to a musical journey that goes beyond borders and languages in the heart of the Kurdistan Region of Iraq!

At MixFM 104.3, we are not just another radio station; we are a mix of melodies, rhythms, and beats from around the globe, all under one harmonious roof. From the soulful tunes of Kurdish melodies to the rhythmic beats of Arabic, the catchy lyrics of English hits, the poetic charm of Persian, and the lively vibes of Turkish, we've got it all and more!

Our mission? To ignite the spark of unity through the universal language of music. We believe that music has the power to bridge cultures, break down barriers, and bring people together in a symphony of harmony and joy.

Unlike traditional radio stations that cater to specific demographics, we are all about inclusivity. Whether you're young or old, local or international, our diverse playlist ensures there's something for everyone to groove to. Because here at MixFM 104.3, we are not just a radio station—we are a musical family, united by our love for great tunes and good vibes.

So tune in, turn up the volume, and join us on this exhilarating musical ride! Let's celebrate the beauty of diversity, one song at a time, and prove that no matter where we come from or what language we speak, music is the thread that connects us all.

Description: Business Channel Türk TV, Türkiye merkezli bir televizyon kanalıdır. İş dünyasıyla ilgili içeriklere odaklanan bir yayın akışına sahiptir. Kanal, ekonomi, finans, iş dünyası haberleri, piyasa analizleri, iş hayatına dair programlar ve röportajlar gibi içerikleri izleyicilerine sunar. Bu tür programlar aracılığıyla izleyicilere ekonomik gelişmeler, yatırım fırsatları, şirket haberleri ve sektörel analizler hakkında bilgi sağlamayı amaçlar. Broadcasting live from Doha to Qatar and the world through our 98.3 station, website, and mobile app.

Golfo Radio 98.3 FM went live on air on March 18, 2019, with the vision of becoming a hub for the ever-growing Latino communities within Qatar and neighboring Gulf countries.

We strive to position our radio as a bridge between the local Qatari and Hispanic communities while serving as a channel between advertisers and our target audience to support and enhance the economic performance of our partners.

Our radio is listened to by an estimated audience of 60,000 (and growing), primarily comprising Hispanic and English-speaking residents in Qatar. Additionally, we have listeners from other communities who tune in daily to catch up on the latest news and music.

We are thrilled to be your local bridge to Qatar’s radio listeners!

Am 22. September 1995 sind wir als erstes Privatradio Österreichs „on air“ gegangen. Heute sind wir die amtierende private Nr. 1 in der Steiermark.

Seit dem Umzug 2015 von Dobl nach Graz ins Styria Media Center, senden wir mit rund 50 Antenne-Mitarbeiterinnen und -Mitarbeiter aus dem größten und modernsten Newsroom des Landes.

Mit unserem Motto „Meine Hits. Meine Steiermark“ zeigen wir unseren  führenden Anspruch, immer am Puls der Zeit zu sein und vor allem den Musikgeschmack unserer Hörer:innen punktgenau zu treffen.

Als Flaggschiff unter den österreichischen Privatradios ziehen wir uns seit 1995 wie ein gelber Faden durch das Leben der Menschen und zeichnen uns seit mehr als 25 Jahren durch Regionalität, Modernität und Kreativität aus. Unermüdlicher Einsatz, beharrlicher Mut und viel Emotion machen das vielfältige Antenne-Programm aus Musik, Unterhaltung und regionalem Service zum überraschenden Hörererlebnis in höchster Qualität.

Description:
Modeling their show on 1970s FM rock radio, Dr. Rock (ancient wizard) and DJ Flower Power (age 12) spin hard rock and heavy metal from 1970 through today, all on vinyl and CD.

Every show has a theme, with special emphasis on forgotten or underappreciated bands and new groups that deserve wider attention. When songs have drum intros, DJ Flower Power grabs the mic and performs original raps.

DJ Flower Power began her radio broadcasting career in kindergarten and is now in sixth grade. She also dances, plays softball, and practices kung fu.

Name: K4CO Radio
Description:
K4CO Radio is a streaming radio station and marketing company based in Centennial, Colorado. The K4CO Radio station plays a large span of music from the 1940’s through today, with Colorado musicians heavy in rotation. We conduct in-depth interviews with Colorado musicians, businesses, nonprofits, and people of interest. Our passion for music aims to play many different genres of music while helping our listeners discover great local musicians along the way. K4CO can be streamed through our website, k4coradio.com, is available for free through the Android Play Store and Apple App Store, and can be found in multiple internet radio directories. 

Our mission is to bring the Colorado community together with a focus on local businesses, nonprofits and musicians. K4CO Radio utilizes many different marketing mediums to highlight your business through radio endorsements, social media marketing, interviews, remote broadcasting and community networking.

Name: Community Media of Staten Island
Description:
Public Access Channels provide local programming created by the wide variety of individuals, groups and organizations within a community. They are noncommercial and the producer has full editorial control. Public Access channel's equipment and facilities are available for use on a first-come, first-served basis and the Cable operator may not exert any editorial control except over unprotected speech (e.g., obscenity, slander).
Staten Island Community Television (SICTV), now Community Media of Staten Island(CMSI), was founded in 1983 as a result of a franchise agreement between the city of New York and Staten Island Cable (now Spectrum). Permanently opened in 1988, CMSI is organized as a not-for-profit corporation under IRS Code 501C3 and currently has a board of directors appointed by the Borough President of Staten Island.
CMSI is broadcast on Spectrum Channels 34,  79, 1996, and 1997, and on Verizon FIOS Channels 34, 35, 36 and 37.  The facility includes 2 Studios, 2 editing suites, and a portable camera division with camera kits to be borrowed for use in the community. 
CMSI provides comprehensive television production training for eligible community members. Eligible members are defined as Staten Island Residents or individuals affiliated with Staten Island based Not-For-Profit Organizations. Volunteers, who assume all responsibility for materials submitted for cablecast, produce programming from start to finish. Access to channel space is on a First-Come, First-Served Basis. Equipment and channel usage is free of charge to eligible community members.

Name: Independent Broadcasting Authority (IBA) Zambia
Description:
ABOUT THE IBA
The Independent Broadcasting Authority (IBA) was established through an Act of Parliament No. 17 of 2002, which was amended through the IBA (Amendment) Act No. 26 of 2010 and No. 18 of 2017. The main function is to regulate the broadcasting industry in Zambia.

IBA VISION 	
An effective and efficient regulator that ensures a quality and professional broadcasting industry in Zambia.

IBA MISSION
To promote professionalism and enhanced standards of the broadcasting industry through effective regulation

FUNCTIONS 
•	To regulate the broadcasting industry in Zambia; 
•	To grant, renew, suspend, and cancel broadcasting licences for radio and TV stations;
•	To develop regulations for the broadcasting sector;
•	To ensure programming standards are followed by broadcasting stations in Zambia;
•	To receive, investigate and decide on complaints concerning broadcasting services including public broadcasting services; and
•	To collect and administer Television levy.

CORE VALUES 
	Commitment; Excellence; Transparency; Accountability; Integrity; and Innovation.

Name: Open Mike Productions Ltd
Description:
We are a British independent television production company, well known for its comedy entertainment formats. We have produced long-running popular formats such as Live At The Apollo, The Last Leg and Alan Carr: Chatty Man, as well new and exciting formats such as Wonders of the World I Can’t See with Chris McCausland.

We also produced scripted comedies written by and starring Jack Dee: Lead Balloon, which ran from 2007 to 2011 on BBC Four and Bad Move, which ran from 2017 to 2018 on ITV. We also produced a raft of stand up shows other than Live at the Apollo. Among them is Channel 4’s Comedy Gala, an annual, one-off stand-up fundraiser for Great Ormond Street Hospital Children’s Charity ran six specials from the O2 Arena. It raised millions of pounds over the course of its run. We also produced a number of funny documentaries such as the award-winning Jon Richardson: A Little Bit OCD for Channel 4 where the comedian investigated his own mental health. As well as a number of Rich Hall documentaries for BBC Four, where he explored the USA and it’s many quirks.

We also made radio comedy for many years across BBC Radio 2 and BBC Radio 4 including: Alan Carr’s Comedy Outings, Jason Manford and Friends, Jimmy Carr’s Comedy Cuts, Vic Reeves’ House Arrest, Hal by Hal Cruttenden, Kerry’s List by Kerry Godliman and Shappi Talk by Shappi Khorsandi.

Name: The Bow Platform
Description:
Bulldog Productions is proud to announce its latest initiative The Bow, a brand-new ad driven streaming platform, free to all users, that will feature elevated original content created for queer people by queer people. In addition to content, The Bow will also offer a user experience unlike any you’ve seen, hosting community based social media functions and interactive resources that will revolutionize queer living and create connection on a global scale. The Bow subscribes to the notion that the only cure for homophobia is education and the platform aims to do just that: educate.

The Bow, as in the end of the rain(bow), will be a place where allied corporate partners will have the opportunity to join forces to support true excellence in Canadian queer film and television. Canada is a leader in the fight for equal rights of 2SLGBTQI+ people, yet when it comes to queer entertainment, there is a stark void. Mainstream media still depicts queer stories as niche and by ghettoizing queer content we are perpetuating the harmful notion of shame surrounding the queer experience. The Bow saw that void as their opportunity to support this deserving audience, while providing a platform for Canadian 2SLGBTQI+ talent. Content created under The Bow umbrella will be easily accessible to everyone, creating a safe space for audiences to connect with the content while raising positive awareness for corporate partners.

“Growing up, the queer content I watched on TV validated my experiences and gave me hope to know that in time I’d be able to live the life I saw reflected in these stories.”said The Bow founder and Bulldog Productions Creative Director Matthew McLaughlin. “However, as most 2SLGBTQI+ content is hidden behind a paywall, many youths today aren’t as fortunate. Through both our original programming and interactive functions, we hope that queer youth feel seen and supported by our platform, empowering them to live their authentic life from the very beginning.”

In de tussentijd praten we je helemaal bij over het laatste wetenschapsnieuws en behandelen we verrassende wetenschappelijke feiten in onze rubrieken.

Benieuwd naar wat we zoal bespreken ? OOG op Wetenschap hoor je iedere twee weken op donderdagavond van 19:00 tot 20:00 uur op OOG Radio. Kun je niet live luisteren? Geen paniek! Een week na de live-uitzending vind je de aflevering alweer terug op Spotify.

Description:
Did you know it's estimated that 74% of HR Professionals are a 'team of one' wearing multiple hats. Another 14% work in isolation (either remotely or different office locations), meaning 'connecting' with other HR people, isn't so easy for the majority of us. 

That's why at HR Radio each day we'll be on the pulse of HR conversation. Mornings we'll take a look at latest trends, events or reports and news, whilst each afternoon our presenters will take a deeper dive on a specific subject around HR, Mental Health, Compliance or Talent. 

You can get involved with the topics, by messaging on our website, and also suggest future subjects for discussion.

Name: GenX Radio Suffolk
Description:
Gen X Radio Suffolk is the brainchild of James Hazell, who has been serving the listeners of East Anglia for over 35 years. In that time, Suffolk has seen a dramatic demise of local commercial radio. Suffolk was one of the first to launch local radio in 1975 with Radio Orwell and we now have no commercial stations broadcasting from here. This not only presents a huge reduction in listener choice but financially prohibits small to medium sized businesses from the proven benefits of radio advertising.

The mission of James and his team is to bring genuine and affordable local radio back to Suffolk. The station will be a lively entertaining mix of chat, news and debate, laced with the brilliant music of the last sixty years. And, of course, we’ll have plenty of fun. 

The radio station is a proud advocate of Suffolk. We support those who are making a positive difference to Suffolk life and we challenge those in a position to affect our county. We forge relationships with the county’s listeners and businesses alike and provide a trusted friend and an engaging and entertaining platform for all.

The proud county of Suffolk deserves a radio station to be proud of… Our mission at GenX Radio Suffolk is to be that radio station

Name: Den Haag FM
Description:
Media spelen een grote rol in onze samenleving. Ze geven vorm aan onze cultuur en weerspiegelen ieders identiteit. Kennis, informatie en ook ontspanning en vermaak vormen samen een sterke leidraad voor de publieke opinie.

De Stichting Stadsomroep Den Haag vervult deze taken als lokale omroep. Met Den Haag FM, Den Haag Totaal, Den Haag TV en FunX laten wij ons zien en horen in Den Haag. In samenwerking met de regionale Omroep West zetten wij ons in voor Haagse saamhorigheid.

Stadsomroep Den Haag is brutaal, betrokken en betrouwbaar! Door de inwoners rechtstreeks te betrekken bij de productie en verspreiding van media, waarborgen wij de culturele verscheidenheid. Er wordt via de verschillende kanalen ruimte geboden aan derden en vrijwilligers om mee te bouwen aan de omroep. Alle content wordt op een inhoudelijke en betrouwbare manier verpakt en het geheel wordt verspreid vóór en dóór Hagenaars.

We zijn een onafhankelijk en modern mediabedrijf dat inspeelt op technologische en maatschappelijke ontwikkelingen. Met de zenders, de diverse websites en ook social media verspreiden wij actualiteiten, informatie en amusement. Met onze producten willen wij een bijdrage leveren aan de maatschappelijke betrokkenheid in Den Haag. Bovendien staan wij garant voor een gevarieerd en kwalitatief hoogstaand programma aanbod.

Bij de Haagse omroep lopen echte professionals rond. Dit zijn medewerkers met hart voor het vak en liefde voor de stad. Ieder is goed opgeleid en zich bewust van de maatschappelijke verantwoordelijkheid. Daarnaast zijn er veel vrijwilligers die zich sterk inzetten voor ons doel.

Name: DobleCheckTV
Description:
Únete a la comunidad adicta a los programas de entretenimiento de tv!   https://discord.gg/JTpvcRN9ad

 DobleCheckTV es un proyecto sin ánimo de lucro que nace de alguien a quien le apasiona el mundo audiovisual, pero sobre todo, los programas de entretenimiento de televisión. No solamente como espectadora, sino que le interesa la creación, el mecanismo y el resultado del programa.

Después de mucho tiempo buscando, no encontró un espacio donde poder charlar sobre este ámbito desde un punto más técnico con otros profesionales del sector, hasta que decidió lanzarse a la piscina para crear una comunidad.

 El objetivo del proyecto es poder compartir información, novedades, experiencias y hacer amistades en este maravilloso sector. Es por eso que se ha creado un servidor de Discord para que todo el que quiera se una. Dale al enlace y te redirigirá directamente al servidor.

Puedes compartir e invitar a todos los amigos que quieras a unirse a nuestro servidor! Entra en los chats de la comunidad, preséntate y empieza a hacer amistades.  Comentaremos la realización, el guion, la edición… Y mucho más!

 No olvides de seguir también la página de LinkedIn, nuestra intención es publicar tota la actualidad, noticias y algún artículo sobre programas de entretenimiento.

Gracias por unirte y apoyar el proyecto!

Name: Yukuan Technology
Description:
Yukuan: Leading the Visual Frontier, Where Every Detail Comes to Light—A Leader in Professional Audio-Video Fiber Optic Transceivers and video compression and transmission Solutions.

In today's rapidly evolving broadcasting and new media industry, ultra-high-definition, low-latency, and highly reliable video transmission have become core demands. As a globally leading provider of video compression and transmission products and solutions, Yukuan Technology, founded in 2010, has consistently remained at the forefront of technology, offering global clients a complete value-chain service from signal processing to network transmission.

Codec Technology: Comprehensive support for standards from MPEG-2, H.264 to the latest 4K HEVC/H.265, meeting various bandwidth and quality requirements from standard definition to ultra-high definition.

Transmission and Conversion: Providing professional DVB to IP gateways, ASI/IP converters and redundancy switches, perfectly bridging traditional broadcasting and modern IP networks.

Streaming and Secure Transmission: Codecs integrated with advanced protocols like SRT, ensuring secure, stable, and low-latency transmission for internet live streaming.

Integrated Platforms: Offering complete headend system (DTV/IPTV/OTT) solutions including 4K IRD, IP encoder, decoder, multiplexers, modulators, transcoders and IP multiviewers.

Focus on the Core: Yukuan Professional Audio-Video Fiber Optic Transceivers—The "Highway" for Lossless Transmission.

Yukuan is not merely a product manufacturer but a trusted industry partner. We deeply understand the challenges our clients face at every stage of video transmission.Choosing Yukuan means choosing exceptional quality, innovative technology, and global service support. Let us connect your future with fiber optics and deliver every frame perfectly.

YTV also launched its countrywide footprint by satellite transmissions on IS2O. There are more than 40 TV channels on the decoder and more than 40 radio stations to select from. We formed many partnerships with schools, print and radio media as well as independent local producers.
We also got a new address in the elite Finance Park, the hub of many decision makers. We embarked on an aggressive roll-out campaign to demonstrate our 'plug and play' decoders to all households.

Our programming ranges from the hard to categorize to rock, indie, jazz, blues, folk, metal, country, world, hip-hop, electronic, punk, soul, experimental, local news & talk, comedy, spoken word, and more.

The majority of WSCA’s programming is controlled by individual DJs who are not obligated to adhere to any type of station-wide playlist or rotation schedule, as long as approved by the programming department. Name: Whiteoaks Communications Group
Description:
At Whiteoaks Communications Group, our legacy in radio dates back to 1956, and our mission has always been to connect people. We are an independent media company dedicated to the communities we serve, powered by a diverse and passionate team that delivers the music you love, the news you need, and the conversations that truly matter.

Each of the brands in our portfolio—JOY Radio (CJYE-AM), CJMR 1320, and our newest additions CKTB-AM, CHTZ-FM, CHRE-FM, and CKLH-FM—brings its own distinct flavour while serving the Greater Toronto, Hamilton, and Niagara regions with a deep commitment to local storytelling and making a positive difference.

Authenticity and passion are woven into every broadcast. We are devoted to elevating local voices and crafting content that enriches everyday life, ensuring each broadcast feels approachable, engaging, and true to our communities.

By blending time-honoured broadcasting traditions with forward-thinking innovation, we are not only preserving the legacy of radio but also shaping its future. Every day, our creative approach redefines the listener’s experience, highlighting radio’s essential role in today’s world.

Siberia surge de la necesidad de cubrir un hueco en el acercamiento humorístico a la actualidad. El programa pretende ser un oasis irreverente más allá de la información generalista al uso o del humor más complaciente.

Como decían Monty Python, “and now for something completely different…”.

På kvällen bjuder vi in till en storslagen prisutdelning av årets Guldöron följt av en mingelrik och rolig fest.

Vi är en gränsöverskridande akademi med en styrelse bestående av representanter från kommersiella radioföretag, public service-företagen, produktionsbolag, poddbolag och andra branschföretag.

Name: 95bFM
Description:
Aotearoa New Zealand's largest independent broadcaster and oldest student radio station, based in the heart of the University of Auckland in Tāmaki Makaurau, Auckland. Your shelter from the shit since 1969.

95bFM’s mission is to be the innovator, leader and indicator of contemporary music and lifestyles.

In support of this we are committed to:
    * Consulting with and developing contribution from students and encouraging student listenership
    * Supporting New Zealand music and art forms
    * Remaining uncompromised by commercial pressures
    * Striving for excellence in radio presentation
    * Providing quality customer service
    * Remaining financially secure
    * Developing our people

In 1969, Radio Bosom was born as a student's capping stunt, broadcasting illegally from a boat in the Waitemata Harbour. Over the next few decades the bosom morphed into the mighty 95bFM, the longest-standing independent radio station in New Zealand.

We're passionate about music, just like you. We think that radio is better when it's free from commercial pressures, and that it should be challenging without being inaccessible. This is not top 40 radio.

Name: Omroep Bouw TV
Description:
Bouw TV is de eerste en enige televisiezender in de Benelux die volledig is gewijd aan de bouw-, architectuur- en infrastructuursectoren. Wij bieden dagelijkse programmering die de nieuwste innovaties, duurzame werkwijzen en praktijkprojecten in de bouw belicht — waardoor de gebouwde omgeving zichtbaar en toegankelijk wordt voor een breed internationaal publiek.

Ons platform toont documentaires, interviews met branche-experts, technische deep-dives en verslaggeving over opkomende trends in Europa en daarbuiten. Van slim bouwen en circulaire bouwmethoden tot digitale engineering en modulaire innovaties, Bouw TV brengt kennis en inspiratie rechtstreeks naar het scherm.

Wij bedienen professionals in de volledige waardeketen: aannemers, architecten, ontwikkelaars, stedenbouwkundigen, ingenieurs, leveranciers en studenten. Of je nu op de bouwplaats werkt of achter de schermen, Bouw TV biedt inzicht in de ideeën die de wereld van morgen vormgeven.

Beschikbaar via televisie, digitale platforms en onze mobiele app, Bouw TV zorgt ervoor dat je altijd en overal verbonden blijft met de sector.

Wij zenden niet alleen content uit. Wij bouwen bruggen tussen disciplines, stimuleren samenwerking en geven een stem aan innovators wereldwijd.

Bouw TV is meer dan een zender. Het is een levend platform, gebouwd op de basis van B.O.U.W.:

B – Bouwen
O – Ontwikkelen van kansen
U – Uitleg en inzicht
W – Wereldwijd

Bouw TV – Bouwen aan kansen, inzicht en innovatie wereldwijd.

Name: Virginia Talk Radio Network
Description:
We broadcast Radio content and advertising over our 11 radio frequencies, and streaming on smart devices.  We feature popular Talk programs, CBS SPORTS, WDBJ Weather, and Classic Hits Rewind 103.9    We support our local business community by broadcasting to a massive 1MM+ potential audience stretching from Lynchburg, VA across Campbell, Amherst, Bedford, Roanoke, Franklin, Appomattox and Pittsylvania counties, and including cities and towns like Gretna, Altavista, Amherst, Madison Heights, South Boston, Brookneal, Rustburg, Bedford, Montvale, Blue Ridge and Roanoke.

Our radio advertising packages are designed with the business size and budget in-mind.   You can advertise for a single event, or on a monthly basis.  You will find our packages are very cost effective, and our reach and frequency are very advantageous.

We have sales associates who would love to share our radio solutions with you.   

We offer you a solution to whatever business issue you currently face.   Businesses who advertise with us commonly do so for one of three reasons.

1.  They want to establish a brand with a memorable message.
2.  They want to drive traffic with an offer or an event or a cause.
3.  They want to increase sales traffic over the long run.

Do any of these three reasons resonate with your current needs?   

Radio is very cost effective.  With a median Cost Per Million Reach (CPM) of $6.75 for a 30-second spot, radio has one of the lowest costs among major media channels.

The median CPM for primetime broadcast TV (excluding primetime) is nearly three times higher than for radio, clocking in at $20. And primetime broadcast TV is more than five times as costly as radio with a median CPM of $36.00. The median CPMs for cable TV range from $12 when prime is excluded to $19 for primetime.   And newspapers  own the distinction of being the most expensive medium overall with a median CPM at $46.82.

Call Melinda at (434) 534-6100.  She will answer questions you may have.

Radio BOA a démarré sa diffusion en juillet 2023 sur les nouvelles fréquences de la radio numérique terrestre régionale (DAB +) sur 15 secteurs en Bretagne ( Brest, Châteaulin, Quimper, Lorient, Morlaix, Lannion, Guingamp, Saint Brieuc, Vannes, Dinan, Rennes, Fougères Ploërmel, Vitré et Saint-Malo). D'autres secteurs suivront dans les prochaines années.

La vocation de Radio BOA est de valoriser sur toute la Bretagne les programmes des radios locales associatives adhérentes et de co-construire ses propres programmes à dimension régionale avec les acteurs bretons de la culture et des musiques émergentes, des langues de Bretagne, de l'innovation sociale et de la transition écologique. 

Les studios de Radio BOA sont localisés à Quimperlé (29). Un site web regroupant l'écoute en direct des programmes de Radio B.O.A, des 15 radios adhérentes est en ligne sur https://www.radio-boa.bzh

Ce projet est soutenu depuis son origine par la Région Bretagne ainsi que par l'Union européenne via les fonds React-EU. Nous avons également reçu le soutien du fond de développement à la vie associative FDVA de la DRAC Bretagne, du FSER du Ministère de la Culture et la DRDFE à la Préfecture de la Région Bretagne.

Name: Inside Senior Living
Description:
A groundbreaking new documentary series for TV about how seniors and their families deal with aging and the struggle to remain independent, which often means moving to senior living or hiring in-home services. Co-produced and distributed by PBS North. Scheduled to premiere late 2024.

From the middle-aged daughter trying to juggle her career, children, and the care of her elderly mother, to the 78 year old man with no children who just received an Alzheimer’s diagnosis – Inside Senior Living brings to light the heart-wrenching drama and decisions that have to be made when an older adult is at risk living on their own.

Featuring host Melissa Fritz, a Senior industry professional, who helps families find hope as they navigate the difficult and sometimes contentious journey of finding the right solution for their circumstances. Inside Senior Living shows how the families have emotional conversations, make tough decisions, and ultimately get past their differences to agree upon the best choice for their situation, which is revealed at the end of each episode.

Melissa’s career spans over two decades as a strategic marketer, executive director, entrepreneur and sales professional. Before taking on her current role as a Filmmaker, she was a top-producing Senior Living Sales & Marketing Executive for organizations such as Brookdale, Ebenezer and The Waters. 

She studied Business Administration at The University of Montana Western and Communications at Hamline University along with becoming a certified lifespan wellness coach. 

Her mission: To bring the topic of aging and long-term care into everyday conversations.

Name: Brixton Radio
Description:
A non-profit, community-based independent radio station built to bring a sense of community and inclusivity to all who get involved. At Brixton Radio, we are passionate about keeping the grassroots culture alive, which we do by supporting and promoting independent artists. Brixton Radio offers over 250 shows a month, spreading its ethos of making music and culture accessible to a worldwide audience. This allows us to attract and welcome diverse artists worldwide and showcase genres ranging from Reggae, Soul, and R&B,  to Jazz, Jungle, and Disco. Our cultural diversity is what makes us unique. Being a non-profit radio station, charity and fundraising play a vital part in Brixton Radio's vision, and we hugely appreciate the support we receive from the creative community here. Using our platform is essential to highlighting and supporting local and international causes and topics that matter to our community and its people. 

We endeavour to enthuse and equip individuals with skills to further their interests pertaining to the music industry and radio broadcasting. By providing the training, the safe space and the equipment, we will be able to feed passions and grow interests to benefit the individual but also impact the wider community. 

Since it’s birth the radio has managed to employ through the ‘kickstart scheme’ 8 individuals who have now gone on into paid employment and thriving careers. Over a hundred other volunteers have joined through University Volunteering Services and internships programs. 

We aim to build on this for the radio, its community, and its culture to flourish.

RTVS can provide a fully crewed solution in all departments or work with your chosen Heads of Departments. Our facility has high speed, diverse connectivity to BT Tower and can connect directly to other studio centres in London.

All our equipment is UHD capable and our Dante audio network means we can flex our capacity up to even the most demanding shows.

Since reopening in December 2019 RTVS has played host to The Brits Launch Party, Ch4 Election Night, Peter Crouch Save Our Summer and Have I Got News For You, to name a few.

RTVS can also provide broadcast production facilities to any of the other spaces at Riverside which includes the two cinemas, as well as studios 2 and 3 within the arts centre.

Name: Sound and Bones
Description:
Based in Exeter in South West England, Sound & Bones specialise in creating high-quality radio and podcast content that tells stories from around the world. With expertise spanning documentary, comedy, and branded content, we bring the skills, creativity, and passion needed to craft compelling audio experiences that resonate with audiences everywhere.

Sound and Bones is made up of Shannon Delwiche, Chris Jones and Guy Natanel.

Shannon Delwiche has developed narrative audio programs, dating podcasts and companion podcasts to some of the most popular TV programs and films. Highlights include: Climate of Change with Cate Blanchett for Audible, Soul Stories with Disney/Pixar for Spotify, and The Crown companion podcast for Netflix. Before pivoting into audio production, Shannon was an award-winning television producer for over twenty years, specialising in the reality TV and factual entertainment genres.

Chris Jones is a skilled and experienced film maker who is now turning his attention to his first love: radio. His eye for detail and ear for a story make Chris an invaluable asset to the Sound and Bones team, searching out new stories and developing them into exciting audio content. Along with Guy, Chris is also a director and founder of the film and video production company Preston Street Films.

Guy Natanel is an award-winning documentary filmmaker specialising in character-driven stories. Together with Shannon he has developed a slate of unique audio projects. With over 12 years of experience as a director, cinematographer and editor, Guy brings his passion for storytelling to the podcast world. Whether focusing on politics, conflict, memory or identity, Guy highlights the universal dimension of the human condition.

Name: The Najntis
Description:
"The Najntis" är en nostalgisk och underhållande podcast av Romeo och Mattias som tar lyssnarna på en resa tillbaka till 90-talet. Med glimten i ögat utforskar de olika händelser och fenomen som präglade detta ikoniska decennium.

Podcasten bjuder på en levande och engagerande beskrivning av allt från musik, mode, film och TV till politik, teknologi och kulturella trender. Romeo och Mattias delar med sig av sina personliga erfarenheter och minnen från denna tid, samtidigt som de analyserar och diskuterar hur 90-talet har påverkat och format vår nutid.

Med sin välresearchade och humoristiska approach tar de upp allt från boybands till tama Tamagotchis. De gräver även djupare i viktiga händelser som Daytonavtalet och hur internet förändrade samhället under 90-talet.

"The Najntis" är inte bara en nostalgisk resa tillbaka i tiden, utan också en intelligent och underhållande diskussion om kulturella och historiska fenomen med perspektiv från nutiden. Podcasten är fylld med skratt, intressanta fakta och reflektioner över hur 90-talet har påverkat vår samtid. För alla som älskar 90-talet eller är intresserade av att utforska och lära sig mer om detta spännande decennium är "The Najntis" ett måste att lyssna på. Häng med Romeo och Mattias på en resa tillbaka i tiden och njut av en dos av nostalgi med en modern twist!

Name: Le Gana Arch USA Inc
Description:
Established in 1988 in California, Le Gana Arch USA Inc is the hub through which Producer/Director Rod Hardy performs his directing and producing roles. Over its multi-decade history, the company has been instrumental in the development and realization of various significant film and television projects, offering a versatile range of services that speak to Hardy's wide-ranging skill set.

In film, one of the company's notable credits includes 'December Boys,' featuring Daniel Radcliffe. This coming-of-age drama allowed Hardy to showcase his capability for sensitive and resonant storytelling. On the television side, Rod has brought his distinct directorial style to series like 'The X-Files,' 'Battlestar Galactica,' and 'The Mentalist,' each renowned for their thematic richness and narrative complexity.

Equally impressive is the caliber of talent that Hardy has collaborated with, elevating the storytelling through shared creative vision. Names like Pierce Brosnan, Anjelica Huston, Kris Kristofferson, Tom Skerritt, Teresa Palmer, Bradley Cooper, Ryan Reynolds, Kylie Minogue and Coolio have appeared in productions that Rod has either directed or produced under Le Gana Arch USA Inc., adding another layer of prestige and recognition to the projects.

Beyond mainstream projects, the company also serves as a platform for Hardy's independent film ventures, resonating with his commitment to innovative and diverse storytelling. Le Gana Arch USA Inc. is not just about fulfilling industry expectations but also about contributing to the broader cultural conversation through cinema and television. Rod's active involvement in community and educational endeavours, such as the Focus on Ability Film Festival, are additional facets that make this company more than just a commercial enterprise.

Le Gana Arch USA encapsulates Rod Hardy's enduring commitment to high-quality storytelling for global audiences.

Description:
TUT FM 96.2 is a community radio station based at the Soshanguve South campus of Tshwane University of Technology, 35 km North of Pretoria CBD. It is one of the first campus community radio stations to be given a one-year term broadcasting license by the then Independent Broadcasting Authority (IBA) in 1994. The station has been able to renew its license under the Electronic Communications Act awarded in 2014.

The station broadcast within a 50km radius from 06h00-05h00 daily and has a listenership of 61 000. We target mainly the youth aged between 15 and 35 and broadcasts in six languages that are English, Tswana, Pedi, Zulu, Venda and Tsonga as per regulatory framework.

TUT FM 96.2 broadcasts on 96.2 MHz FM Stereo from studios in TUT-SOSHANGUVE CAMPUS most of Pretoria areas within the 50km radius including Soshanguve, Ga-Rankuwa, Mabopane, Winterveldt, Pretoria suburbs and CBD, Centurion, Brooklyn, Menlyn, Orchards, Sunnyside, Arcadia, Theresa Park, Akasia, Wonderpark, Wonderboom, Montana, Kempton Park, Lynwood, Silverton, Zambesi, Sinoville, Gezina, Laudium, Eastlyn, Madidi, Klipgat, Mmakaunyane, Let|habile, Mothotlung Cullinan, Tladistad, Jericho, Makapanstad, Attridgeville, Kgabalatsane, Hammanskraal, and Mamelodi. The station targets the listeners between 15-35 in the LSM group 3-7. The programming reflects a multi-cultural flavour targeted at the young black listener in township, high school, college and university and the community, made up of talk 40% and music 60% and includes features such as traffic reports, weather report

Name: Radio Mars Danmark
Description:
Mars Missionen
Tankerne bag Radio Mars har vi beskrevet i vores “grundlov” Mars Missionen, der lyder sådan her:

1. Radio Mars tager populærmusikken alvorligt. Hos os er musikken indholdet, ikke kun mellemlægget.

2. Vi sætter spørgsmålstegn ved den konventionelle playliste-kultur og prioriterer sangens kvalitet over genren og kunstnerens status.

3. Vores værter er engagerede musikelskere, der deler ud af deres viden om og kærlighed til musik.

4. Vi insisterer på, at populærmusik er en væsentlig del af vores kulturelle DNA og fortjener mindst samme respekt som kunst, litteratur, teater, film og klassisk musik.

5. Vi er ikke bange for at præsentere ny eller udfordrende musik. Vi tror på, at lytterne er nysgerrige.

6. Vi vil give opmærksomhed til de kunstnere, der bliver overset og ikke når hitlisterne.

7. Vi vil både formidle ny musik og de tidløse klassikere, der har formet musikhistorien.

8. Radio Mars er nysgerrig og udfordrende, men først og fremmest et varmt musikalsk fællesskab for lyttere, der søger andet og mere end de største hits.

9. Vi vil arbejde tæt sammen med lokale udøvende kunstnere, pladeselskaber, spillesteder og musikforbrugere for at støtte og fremme musikmiljøet.

10. Radio Mars spiller mindre af det, de andre spiller mest.

Name: UnderTonen
Description:
UnderTonen er en forening & fællesskab skabt af unge ildsjæle med formålet om at oplyse, involvere og engagere udsatte minoriteter, hvis kultur og stemmer ikke er repræsenteret i det danske samfund. 
 
Igennem en ungestyret Hip Hop-radio, og ved at rykke pop-up events ud til boligområder, vil vi udfylde et kæmpe public service tomrum og skabe en platform, hvor de unge får mulighed for at tale med og til hinanden, gennem deres eget sprog, kultur & musik.

Med UnderTonen har vi en drøm og vision om, at gøre op med et opdelt dansk samfund, hvor en stor gruppe af unge minoriteter ikke har en stemme i medierne. Det er både uansvarligt og udemokratisk. UnderTonen vil vi skabe forandring ved at styrke unge minoriteters selvforståelse, og demokratiske deltagelse. Det vil vi gøre ved at sikre at de bliver inddraget, og deres stemmer og historier blive hørt og delt igennem deres eget narrativ, med afsæt i Hip Hop kulturen.

Name: Spume FM
Description: Spume FM is all about capturing the heart and soul of Cornwall’s coastal vibe, mixing the thrill of surf culture with the pulse of killer tunes and epic times. It’s like the rush of catching the perfect wave, with a soundtrack that flows as naturally as the swell at Fistral Beach. Name: RelayTV
Description:
Relay is a specialist location post and media workflow company based in Soho, London. We support some of the UK’s most ambitious and fast-paced productions — from multi-cam reality series and documentary rigs to high-spec factual entertainment and live broadcast.

We sit at the intersection of production, post, and technology — designing, building, and operating smart, scalable workflows that keep media moving seamlessly from set to screen.

Our work includes:
 Building and operating rig record systems and DIT setups
 Designing robust media management pipelines
 Supporting editorial workflows on tools like Avid, Premiere Pro & Resolve
 Delivering bulletproof handover processes between location and post
 Collaborating with industry partners to pilot and refine new tech

We’re collaborators, problem-solvers, and forward thinkers. Whether it’s a 24/7 shoot across multiple locations or a high-pressure delivery schedule, our team brings clarity, precision, and confidence to every stage of the workflow.

At Relay, we believe in proactive solutions, clear communication, and being a few steps ahead — always acting with our clients’ best interests in mind.

Elle produit 24h/24 7j/7, 3 programmes régionalisés pour couvrir les 2 800 km d'autoroutes des concessions autoroutières d’Eiffage : APRR, AREA, ADELAC, ALIAE A’LIENOR mais aussi les réseaux alpins ATMB, SFTRF et DIRCE.
Autoroute INFO, « la radio qui voyage avec vous », alerte, rassure, conseille et participe à une meilleure expérience du voyage, notamment avec une programmation musicale adaptée à la route, une sélection de reportages sur les coulisses de l’autoroute et la valorisation des territoires au travers de partenariats avec des collectivités territoriales.
Média global, Autoroute INFO diffuse ses programmes sur la fréquence 107.7 et un contenu enrichi sur ses supports numériques (web, réseaux sociaux, application smartphone, podcasts).

Dive into topics like business trends, leadership, and organizational development with expert insights. This show is your destination for understanding self-leadership, navigating societal challenges, and innovating in business. Join us for actionable tips and inspiration on a transformative journey to success in all life aspects.

Listeners should tune in to "Your Transformation Station" because it offers a unique blend of transparency and new age knowledge about various topics that are important for personal and professional development. 

The podcast covers a wide range of subjects such as business news, philosophy, organizational development, leadership, culture, management, and building relationships.

As a specialist in Organizational Leadership, Favazza brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the podcast. Listeners can expect to gain valuable insights and perspectives on how to navigate the complex and ever-changing world of business and leadership.

Furthermore, "Your Transformation Station" is a great resource for anyone who is interested in personal growth and development. The podcast provides practical tips and strategies for improving communication skills, building stronger relationships, and developing a growth mindset.

Whether you are a business leader or someone who is interested in personal growth, this podcast has something for everyone.

#leadership #favazzapodcasts #gregorystlouis #yourtransformationstation #podcast

Name: Pro-M Műsorszóró Infrastruktúra Kft.
Description:
A Pro-M Műsorszóró Infrastruktúra Kft., fő tevékenységeként, az országos földfelszíni rádiós- és televíziós műsorszórást biztosítja Magyarországon. Kiemelkedő színvonalú infrastruktúrával, képzett szakemberekkel egyedülálló és magas minőségű szolgáltatást nyújt partnereinek, felhasználóinak. 

Rádiós- és televíziós műsorszórás 

A Pro-M Műsorszóró Infrastruktúra Kft. országos földfelszíni hálózatán analóg rádió műsorszórást (AM és FM), valamint digitális televízió műsorszórást (DVB-T, DVB-T2) folytat. Partnerei az országos közszolgálati és kereskedelmi csatornák, valamint a regionális, illetve helyi műsorszolgáltatók. A stúdiókból az egyes csatornák jeleit digitális összeköttetéseken juttatja el az adóberendezésekhez. Összesen 136 telephely biztosítja a lefedettséget a rádió- és televízió műsorok vételéhez. A műsorszórás gerinchálózatát alkotó 17 fontosabb adótorony jól ismert látványosságai hazánknak, ilyen például a budapesti Széchenyi-hegyen, a mátrai Kékestetőn, a pécsi Misinán, a soproni Dalos-hegyen, Kab-hegyen vagy Szentesen működő torony. Solton és  Lakihegyen található két középhullámú antenna magassága 300 méter feletti melyek szintén országosan ismert építmények. 

Régi technológia új szerepben – a hosszúhullámú rádiós körvezérlés (RKV) 

A Pro-M Műsorszóró Kft. tevékenységei közé tartozik a hosszúhullámú frekvenciasávban működő, úgynevezett rádiós körvezérlő rendszer üzemeltetése. A szolgáltatás a műsorszórás jellegzetességeit viseli (egy telephelyről nagy területet képes lefedni), de műsorjel helyett ipari vezérlőjeleket juttat el a végponti eszközökhöz. A történelmi jelentőségű, 314 m magas lakihegyi „szivar” antenna és a hozzá tartozó berendezéspark segítségével vezérelhető a rendszeren át továbbított kapcsolójelekkel például a közvilágítás, távhőszolgáltatás vagy menedzselhető a hálózat terhelése. Ez a szolgáltatás a hosszúhullámú sáv terjedési jellegzetességeinek köszönhetően országhatáron túl is elérhető.

Name: CHON-FM | Northern Native Broadcasting Yukon

Name: Vanakkam Réunion Radio
Description:
Grandissons Ensemble !
Le projet "VANAKKAM REUNION !", qui signifie littéralement "BONJOUR LA REUNION !", a pour objectif de promouvoir et de démocratiser la culture indienne à travers une station de radio associative.
La ligne éditoriale de cette station de radio est ambitieuse, visant à offrir à la diaspora réunionnaise (représentant 30% de la population) la possibilité de mieux comprendre les origines de leurs ancêtres, tout en permettant aux autres communautés de l'île de découvrir cette culture millénaire. Les contributions de la culture indienne, entrelacées avec celles des autres groupes ethniques de La Réunion, ont joué un rôle essentiel dans la formation de la société réunionnaise.

L'objectif est de favoriser la compréhension mutuelle entre les différentes civilisations d'origine des Réunionnais, ce qui contribuera à une meilleure compréhension de l'identité créole. Cette démarche vise à favoriser une meilleure appréhension des comportements, des attitudes et des perspectives diverses, dans le but d'éviter les malentendus et de promouvoir l'ouverture d'esprit.

Nous vous invitons chaleureusement à nous rejoindre dans cette aventure passionnante pour enrichir nos connaissances mutuelles et grandir ensemble en tant que communauté réunionnaise.

Name: Antenne Kärnten Regionalradio GmbH und Co KG
Description:

Seit dem Umzug im Oktober 2010 vom Schloss Ehrenhausen, senden wir mit rund 25 Antenne-Mitarbeiterinnen und -Mitarbeitern aus dem Styria-Medienhaus am Völkermarkter Ring im Herzen der Kärntner Landeshauptstadt.

Mit unserem Motto „Meine Hits. Mein Kärnten.“  zeigen wir unseren führenden Anspruch, immer am Puls der Zeit zu sein und vor allem den Musikgeschmack unserer Hörer:innen punktgenau zu treffen.

Das Flaggschiff unter den Kärntner Privatradios zieht sich seit 1998 wie ein gelber Faden durch das Leben der Menschen und zeichnet sich seit mehr als 20 Jahren durch Regionalität, Modernität und Kreativität aus. Unermüdlicher Einsatz, beharrlicher Mut und viel Emotion machen das vielfältige Antenne-Programm aus Musik, Unterhaltung und regionalem Service zum überraschenden Hörererlebnis in höchster Qualität.

Name: flick Radio
Description:
Located in the heart of Toronto Canada, flick is an online radio station with a vision to connect the world through Afrobeats. We pride ourselves on delivering that unique radio experience that will reconnect you to your African roots, sweep you in a wave of nostalgia, or plunge you into the rhythmic tunes of Africa.

Whether you’re in the motherland or in diaspora, you’re just one click away from BIG VIBING to your favorite tunes on flick. Enjoy our vast array of programs tailored to keep you entertained while glued to your headsets.

Most importantly, we have a vision of using music as a tool to promote environmental stewardship amongst the youth and reduce the carbon footprint across the African continent.

Make sure to check out the flick Magazine, with great content and articles for your non-stop entertainment. Rest assured, we are your Diaspora Music Haven. 

At flick, it’s Afrobeats All Day . . . Every Day!!!

Values is to Keep God first in guiding me to be a Leader with Integrity, Honesty, Fairness, Man of his Word and Stubborn Determination. To be the Hardest Worker in the Room and Stay Humble as I form partnerships, connections with Sponsors, Advertisers, and all willing to work with me. 
The JLE Story is working as a Custodian at Wayne State University for 23 years. A college student who changed major 3 times, dropped out in 2008 then returned in 2013 to 2020 Finished my Bachelor of Science in Business Administration with a Major in Management at Mike ILitch School of Business. What you can expect here in the Middle Ground with JLE L.L.C. is a page to educate, awesome  business services offered, network, have some fun. 
Take this journey and become apart of the Middle Ground with JLE Family.

Name: crealatv
Description:
¿Buscas una alternativa a la televisión tradicional en Mexicali? En crealatv, te invitamos a explorar un mundo de contenido diverso y original que va más allá de las noticias. Sumérgete en una programación hecha en Baja California y Jalisco, con historias que te inspirarán, te sorprenderán y te conectarán con tu comunidad.

Descubre lo que te espera en crealatv:

Historias Fascinantes: Adéntrate en documentales y series que te llevarán a conocer personajes extraordinarios y realidades sorprendentes de nuestra región y el mundo. 
Conocimiento que Inspira: Explora la ciencia, la tecnología, el arte y la cultura a través de programas que te dejarán con ganas de aprender más. 
Voces que Impactan: Conoce a figuras influyentes de Baja California, artistas, emprendedores y líderes que comparten sus historias, experiencias y visiones.
Cultura Viva: Vive la emoción de festivales, conciertos, exposiciones y eventos que celebran la riqueza y diversidad de nuestra gente. 


Nuestra Historia:
crealatv nació en 2011 con la visión de ser un espacio para impulsar la creatividad audiovisual en Baja California y Jalisco. Hoy, seguimos comprometidos con esa misión, brindándote una plataforma para conectar con tu propia creatividad y la del mundo.

En crealatv, creemos en el poder de las historias para inspirar, educar y conectar. Únete a nuestra comunidad y hazlo real!

Name: RM Transmissão Digital
Description:
A RM TRANSMISSÃO DIGITAL é uma empresa com mais de 25 anos de história, tendo o orgulho em nunca ter perdido uma transmissão em toda sua trajetória.

Temos o foco em entregar soluções de produção de conteúdo e transmissão digital de missão crítica, aplicando toda a nossa expertise de broadcast que conquistamos nos maiores canais e programas da TV Brasileira, para a realidade do mundo corporativo.

A História da empresa inicia na mente empreendedora do fundador Rodrigo Mazon, que se formou e seguiu carreira em engenharia de telecomunicação.

Desde 1998, nosso CEO, identifica oportunidades no mercado, integra sistemas e equipamentos importados, e desenvolve soluções sob medida para o mercado nacional.

Posicionou-se como um fornecedor estratégico para o mercado televisivo, e atendeu grandes programas como Faustão, BBB, The Voice, Dancing Brasil, Marcha para Jesus, (captação e transmissão aérea Link aérea) com o Comandante Amilton, entre outros.
Desde 2008, a RM investe em equipamentos como Mochilink, Drone, Motolink, Carro link e sistemas de transmissão Onboard, a RM atende eventos de corrida como a (Stock Car, Copa Truck, TCR e Sprint Race), e grandes shows como (Rock in Rio, Blueman, Carnaval, Tocha Olímpica, entre outros).

Desde a pandemia a RM continua sua jornada de inovação, sendo pioneira em transmitir Lives de Shows e eventos online, como por exemplo, (Kondzilla maior canal de Youtube, Maestro Joao Carlos Martins, Bachiana, lives do SESI, Winderson Nunes.)

Além de contar com todo o know-how de transmissão digital de missão crítica, a RM criou uma vertical para a produção de conteúdo corporativo, produzindo eventos híbridos e/ou online, com toda a estrutura necessária , incluindo estúdios próprios para a produção, captação, edição, de conteúdos utilizados em eventos. Utilizamos as melhores ferramentas de mercado, como Vmix, Axymetry, Unreal, Mochilinks, plataformas web personalizadas. 

Traga o seu projeto para a RM Digital!

Description:
SAMSUN’UN İLK VE TEK TEMATİK BİLGİ RADYOSU!
 
Gerçek tarafsız haber, spor, sağlık, siyaset, tarım, ekonomi, gençlik, kültür ve sanat içerikli bilgilendirici programları ve diğer radyolarda duyamayacağınız kaliteli müzik şeçkileriyle, şehrin ve Anadolu’nun tek  bilgi temalı radyosu.

Name: KRWG Public Media
Description:
KRWG Public Media provides public radio and television services to southern New Mexico and Far West Texas. We strive to educate and engage community development by providing relevant news, a forum for open discussion, and a celebration of the arts while preserving and conveying human and natural history.

KRWG is a significant and trusted resource for a wide range of news, cultural, and entertainment media programming. As conscientious stewards of New Mexico State University and the local community, we strive to be significant eyes, ears, and voices for the diverse and rapidly changing southwestern culture. We encourage people of all ages, backgrounds, and locations to become thoughtful and productive members of a far-reaching, vibrant, and dynamic society.

Rooted in the principles of public-supported media, we operate in the public interest by being independent, thorough, fair, and accountable in our news and community affairs programming. We share NMSU's mission of education and outreach. Our services will respect one’s intelligence, and encourage civil discourse in our daily presentation of programs that inform, educate and entertain.

Name: KNC RADIO
Description:
KNC Radio is an independent station offering a rich mix of adult contemporary music and variety programming. Based on a commitment to quality broadcasting, we bring listeners a thoughtfully curated selection of music, from pop and rock to R&B, dance, and alternative sounds.

Our schedule features a range of shows designed to reflect the moods and moments of the day. Whether it’s the drive to work, a midday breather, or a late-night wind-down, KNC Radio provides a consistent and engaging listening experience.

Our presenters are at the heart of what we do. knowledgeable, relatable, and passionate about the music. They guide you through each show with insight, warmth, and personality.

KNC Radio is more than just background noise. It’s a space for discovery, connection, and great music — wherever you are.

Name: Market Talk
Description: Market Talk is an hour long, nationally syndicated radio show and podcast that airs each weekday. Hosted by veteran farm broadcaster Jesse Allen, the show focuses on the commodity markets after each day's closing bell. We talk with the best traders, brokers and economists in the business to give farmers and ranchers insight into marketing strategy. The show also focuses on the latest ag news, ag weather, policy and much more.

Name: Africa's Blank Canvas Podcast
Description: Africa's Blank Canvas Podcast is a podcast where we interview people about their careers, life, motivations, and more. We believe that everyone has a story to tell, and we want to give a platform to those stories. We talk to people from all walks of life, from entrepreneurs to artists to activists. We want to learn about their journey, their challenges, and their successes. We believe that Africa is a blank canvas, and we want to help people paint their own picture of the future. We want to inspire people to dream big and to never give up on their goals.

Name: TUT FM 962
Description:
TUT FM 96.2 is a community radio station based at the Soshanguve South campus of Tshwane University of Technology, 35 km North of Pretoria CBD. It is one of the first campus community radio stations to be given a one-year term broadcasting license by the then Independent Broadcasting Authority (IBA) in 1994. The station has been able to renew its license under the Electronic Communications Act awarded in 2014.

The station broadcast within a 50km radius from 06h00-05h00 daily and has a listenership of 61 000. We target mainly the youth aged between 15 and 35 and broadcasts in six languages that are English, Tswana, Pedi, Zulu, Venda and Tsonga as per regulatory framework.

TUT FM 96.2 broadcasts on 96.2 MHz FM Stereo from studios in TUT-SOSHANGUVE CAMPUS most of Pretoria areas within the 50km radius including Soshanguve, Ga-Rankuwa, Mabopane, Winterveldt, Pretoria suburbs and CBD, Centurion, Brooklyn, Menlyn, Orchards, Sunnyside, Arcadia, Theresa Park, Akasia, Wonderpark, Wonderboom, Montana, Kempton Park, Lynwood, Silverton, Zambesi, Sinoville, Gezina, Laudium, Eastlyn, Madidi, Klipgat, Mmakaunyane, Letlhabile, Mothotlung Cullinan, Tladistad, Jericho, Makapanstad, Attridgeville, Kgabalatsane, Hammanskraal, and Mamelodi. The station targets the listeners between 15-35 in the LSM group 3-7. The programming reflects a multi-cultural flavour targeted at the young black listener in township, high school, college and university and the community, made up of talk 40% and music 60% and includes features such as traffic reports, weather report

Name: Possibly
Description:
The news is full of potential ways to “save the planet.” Should we ban plastic straws? Drive electric cars? Install solar panels?It can feel pretty overwhelming. But what if we took it one step at a time?

Possibly is a weekly radio show that puts environmental stories into perspective, so you know what actually makes a difference. Each episode is reported by students from Brown University, rigorously fact-checked, verified by a sustainability scientist, and hosted and edited by a professional journalist.

Possibly is a co-production of The Public’s Radio, Brown University’s Institute for Environment and Society and Brown’s Climate Solutions Initiative.

É uma Rádio Universitária de cariz alternativo-cultural e condimentada com voluntariedade desinteressada.

A Associação Rádio Universitária do Algarve – RUA FM – foi fundada a 28 de novembro de 2002. É uma pessoa coletiva de direito privado sem fins lucrativo, que tem como membros fundadores e associados a Universidade do Algarve e a Associação Académica da UAlg, e mais recentemente os Serviços de Ação Social da UAlg.

Description:
The biggest youth music competition, “Rhythm of Europe,” broadcast on national television, has a tradition of over 19 years and is supported by ambassadors of European countries, as well as Israel and Australia.

“Rhythm of Europe” is a competition that gathers young people aged 14 to 23 who, in addition to representing their city or municipality, perform songs in the language of one of the countries of Europe, Israel, or Australia.

The maximum number of participating cities per country is 24.

The preparation process for the live television broadcast lasts 9 months. During this period, the participants train with the “Rhythm of Europe” television team to represent their assigned country in a professional live TV performance.

The winner is determined by a combination of SMS votes, votes from the jury of participating cities, and votes from an expert jury.

The winning city receives the honor of hosting the televised competition the following year on national television, while its representatives are awarded a trip to the country they represented in the live program.

Name: RADIO UDAAN
Description:
Radio Udaan is an exclusive and inclusive online radio station for people with disabilities. It is heard in more than 115 countries and is run by an enthusiastic team of visually challenged RJs and team members. 

Coverage of Disability Events 

We have also been committed to covering events and issues related to disabilities within the community. We have featured stories and interviews with individuals with disabilities and covered events such as disability rights rallies and conferences.

Badalta Daur 

Badalta Daur is a discussion-based show that focuses on the legal rights, education, health, rehabilitation, and other important issues faced by disabled individuals. This show provides a platform for disabled individuals to share their experiences and learn from one another, as well as from expert guests who offer valuable insights and advice.

Book World 

Book World is a show that features English and Hindi novels translated into Hindi in an easy and interesting way. This show is perfect for those who want to improve their reading skills and expand their literary horizons.

Community Colors 

Community Colors is a show that highlights the latest news and events in the disability sector. From advocacy efforts to community events, this show keeps viewers informed about the issues that matter most to the disabled community.

TechCity 

TechCity is a revolutionary show designed specifically for the visually impaired community. In this show, visually impaired individuals are taught how to use a variety of technology devices, including mobile phones with screen readers, laptops, and more. 

Vocabulary Dose 

Vocabulary Dose is a show that helps individuals improve their English vocabulary. The show features engaging lessons and activities that make learning new words fun and enjoyable.

In addition to these educational shows, we also have a variety of entertainment programs, including a show on Bollywood music, a story telling program, and a talent hunt etc.

Name: New Talent Academy Real Life Learning
Description:
Vocational education, training and pre-employment provision for young people and adults providing accredited creative media courses followed by training at Unity Radio, The Real Sound Of The City

Unity Radio broadcasts dance and urban music across Greater Manchester on 92.8FM, DAB and online www.unityradio.fm. It has a 20 year history, starting life as a pirate radio station meaning it has a credible, grass roots and authentic reputation amongst the community and therefore culturally relevant, familiar and already present for the lives of many within its broadcast reach. This means the barriers to engagement can often be lower for many learners as they feel comfortable in finding out more about what might be possible

Based in Media City at Host which is also home of a larger tech-hub called Skills City providing courses in technology and other related Education, Training and Employment (EET) programs creating new onward pathways. Media City raises the aspiration for all learners and by travelling on their own volition it gives a sense of autonomy and means they are already closer to the working environment
-Learners are connected to a larger music, creative and digital culture, enhancing the feelings of belonging to something bigger, meeting the needs of many who may not have this positive environment.
-Learners can speak to and mix with other industry professionals and local known artists
-Taught by experienced facilitators who are also involved in the industry and have real life experience
-Previous Unity Radio presenters are now on BBC and therefore visible progression is evident
The accredited learning supports the identifying of and development in skill gaps and by utilizing the course and training in Unity Radio it means the learner can become aware of improvement and work on new skills in a safe environment enabling wider opportunities for the future 

Skills: Leadership, critcial Analysis, research and data anaylsis, digital technology, literacy,

Name: 47 ABC - WMDT
Description:
WMDT (47ABC) went on the air in April 1980 and has been the ABC and CW affiliate (formerly The WB) since then. In October 2013, the station was purchased by Marquee Broadcasting, Inc.  Since that time Marquee has invested in both the station and the community.  Additional network programming has been added to WMDT, including Me-TV Delmarva and the ION network.

With the advent of a second TV station (WGDV-Salisbury) we were able to provide the first Spanish language station in the market, and more classic television networks than any other local media outlet, which provides more choices for our viewers.  Our news programming regularly receives awards from the Chesapeake Associated Press Broadcasters Association and has also received the highly coveted Service to Children Television award from the National Association of Broadcasters, plus a National Edward R. Murrow award and multiple Regional Edward R. Murrow awards.

Yet, the station may be best known for its involvement with the local communities on Delmarva. We sponsor a host of charitable events and receive requests for our on-air personalities to Emcee some of the most popular local events.  The station is located in the heart of Downtown Salisbury and is a huge supporter of the revitalization of the downtown district.

Local engagement is the driver behind each Marquee station; so much so that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office awarded Marquee the trademark “Because Local Matters.”  That is why we do what we do in the communities we serve.
