Name: Ariana Television Network
Description:
Ariana Television Network (ATN) is a private television and radio network based in Kabul, Afghanistan. ATN was launched in 2005 and is the largest media network in Afghanistan. ATN’s focus is on information, content and entertainment that rekindles Afghanistan’s traditions and culture. ATN prides itself on providing easily accessible educational, Islamic, health, sports and children’s programming to all citizens of Afghanistan. We take great pride in broadcasting accurate, unbiased news to the audience in real time. ATN is not associated with any political party or person and has no links with de-stabilizing elements within Afghanistan.

ATN’s goal since launch has been one of inclusion and education, providing a “Window for a Better Tomorrow” while exposing our radio and television audiences to the best of international arts & culture from around the world, we also expand opportunities for local writers, producers, actors, and directors within Afghan communities. Ariana Television provides first-rate broadcast services throughout Afghanistan, covering all 34 provinces and reaching over 30 million Afghans each day. ATN subscribers enjoy live programs through ATN’s robust free-to-air terrestrial network and satellite distribution.

Name: Småt Brændbart
Description:
Velkommen til Småt Brændbart - en podcast om ugens kriser med Anna Thygesen.

Anna Thygesen er vært på podcasten sammen med et hold af kompetente, kloge og sjove medværter, som kigger forbi på skift og nørder rundt i nogle af ugens mest spændende, opsigtsvækkende, vilde eller sjove kommunikationskriser.

De tager fat i kriser i erhvervslivet, i organisationer og i politik og det kan da godt være at der sniger sig en krise ind fra de mere kulørte brancher engang i mellem. 

Småt Brændbart er ‘news commentary’ podcast - det er ikke en journalistisk podcast. Podcasten er derfor analyser og tale om kriser, der allerede har nået medierne eller er ved at breake i dem, fordi det er netop turen i mediemøllen, der er afgørende for hvordan en kommunikationskrise falder ud.

Description:

Ambos já tinham a concessão para um canal de TV aberta e estavam pesquisando quais emissoras estariam disponíveis para ser veiculada em Brasília. Pesquisa, que os levou a TV Cultura, emissora que não possuía uma praça na capital federal. 

Após as negociações em São Paulo, Dino Mais e Liberato Povoa, conseguiram os direitos de transmissão da TV Cultura em Brasília. Os empresários já possuíam uma geradora em Paracatu, Minas Gerais, o que permitia que a emissora fosse transmitida no DF. Desta forma, a partir do dia 21 de abril de 2021, a TV Cultura Brasília começou a ser transmitida no canal 38.1 e na NET no canal local 510.

Description: Bomb Productions began in 1993 when childhood friends DJ KANE and DJ DREN decided to create a DJ crew. The purchase of a 4-track, a mic,and an SP1200, the addition of more DJs, and the induction of MCs was the next big step in BOMB P becoming a an all-inclusive hip hop production team. Bomb Productions has helped launch the careers of many local hip hop artists including Thunderhut Project, Eboni Myst, The Flow Pros, Otayo Dubb, FMZ, In House Records, The Warlordz, and many others. Bomb P has also worked with national artists such as E-40, Chino XL, and X-raided. Bomb Productions hosted a radio show on 90.9 KHDC (BOMB TUESDAY) and a music video show (ALL CITY MUSIC VIDEOS) from 1998-2000. Today, Bomb Productions prides itself in having some of the areas best DJs, MCs, and Producers. The main goal of Bomb Productions is to preserve the art of hip hop through educating the youth, creating music that remains true it's hip hop roots, and collaborating with other hip hop crews and organizations to help in the advancement of the hip hop culture

Name: Christian Broadcasting Council, UK
Description:
The Christian Broadcasting Council of the United Kingdom (CBC UK) is a charitable organisation dedicated to promoting the message of Jesus Christ through media. Established in 1986 at a meeting in the House of Lords, CBC UK brings together believers from across the Christian spectrum to support and stimulate faith-based broadcasting and content creation in the UK and beyond.

Our mission is rooted in the Great Commission: to make the Gospel known through radio, television, online platforms, print, film, and emerging digital media. We believe in equipping and encouraging Christians working in media, providing them with a prayerful, collaborative and visionary community.

As outlined in our Constitution, CBC UK exists to:

• Encourage excellence in Christian media 
• Promote supportive legislation and advocate for Christian content in public broadcasting
• Facilitate prayer, networking and mentorship opportunities for media professionals
• Offer a growing directory of Christian media organisations, broadcasters and ministries
• Serve as a voice for Christians in media, both in the Church and in the public square

Our leadership includes dedicated trustees, a management committee, patrons and media professionals with a shared commitment to Christ-centred communication.

As a registered charity (No. 327340), our activities are governed by a Biblical statement of faith and a passion to see the name of Jesus lifted high through every medium available.

We welcome members and partners from all denominations who share our vision of spreading the Gospel through the power of media. Join us as we work together to bring the light of Christ into homes, hearts and headlines.

2018 yılında, Radyo ve Televizyon Üst Kurulu (RTÜK) tarafından, yayın lisansı verilen Üniversite TV, teknik hazırlıklarını tamamlamış olup yayın hayatına başlayacaktır. Üniversite TV, TÜRKSAT üzerinden hem Türkiye’ye hem de Avrupa’ya yayın yapan batı paketinde yer almaktadır. Ayrıca Üniversite TV; Kablolu TV, IP TV, dijital ve sosyal medya platformları üzerinden yayın yapacaktır. Amacımız; yurt içindeki, yurt dışındaki üniversitelerin ve üniversite öğrencilerinin sesi olmak, okulların tanıtımını sağlamak ve öğrencilerin eğitim hayatında ihtiyaç duyacakları konularda onlara yardımcı olmaktır. İyi bir meslek edinmek için 1 yıl hazırlık eğitimi ve 4 yıl lisans eğitimi ile beraber toplam da 5 yıllık bir zaman harcıyoruz. Üniversiteden mezun olup iş aramaya başladığımızda, iş tecrübemiz ve deneyiminiz yok diye kapılar yüzümüze kapanıyor, iş bulmakta zorlanıyoruz veya işsiz kalıyoruz. İş deneyimi edinmek için çok düşük ücretlerle 4 ila 5 yıl piyasada çalışmak zorunda kalıyoruz. Üniversite mezunu bir kişinin piyasada nitelikli tecrübeli iş gücü haline gelebilmesi için harcanan süre ortalama 10 yıldır. Bu durum ülkemiz için ciddi bir milli servet kaybı ve nitelikli iş gücü yetersizliği ile ülke ekonomisine çok büyük zararlar vermektedir. Üniversite TV olarak ülkemize ve eğitim hayatımıza katkı sağlama adına en azından radyo sinema ve televizyon sektöründe bu 10 yıllık süreyi 4 ila 5 yıla düşürebilmek istiyoruz. Üniversiteden mezun olduğumuzda tecrübeli, deneyimli, kendisini kanıtlamış, gerçek hayat tecrübesi kazanmış, iş disiplinine sahip, mesleki deneyim edinmiş gençleri kazanabilmek için için Üniversite TV’yi hayata geçirdik Üniversite TV öğrencilerin kanalı,

Description:

De belangrijkste les is dat je altijd overal nieuwe vrienden kunt maken. Er zijn altijd mensen die net als jij open staan voor nieuwe contacten, nieuwe vriendschappen.

Het is een kwestie van vinden. Het makkelijkst is om te zoeken naar overeenkomsten. Het is simpel: als je een groep vindt waarmee je iets deelt, vergroot je je kansen op nieuwe vrienden. 

Wil je ook eenzaamheid de wereld uit helpen? Word onze vriend en let’s connect!

Name: Globule Radio
Description:
GLOBULE RADIO est le média de proximité de la Vallée de Chamonix.

Elle produit l'intégralité de son programme. Vous y entendrez de nombreuses chroniques reflétant la vie de la Vallée et les préoccupations liées à la montagne. Quelques émissions-phares, comme la "Radio des Villages"  viennent ponctuer une programmation musicale ouverte laissant beaucoup de place aux nouveautés musicales et à l'exploration de nouveaux sons.

Globule Radio a par ailleurs lancé en 2015 un projet pédagogique, conçu à l’intention des 8/15 ans sous le nom de MINIS GLOBULES avec l’aide des Communes de la Vallée de Chamonix: Vallorcine, Les Houches, Servoz et Chamonix Mont-Blanc  et le soutien de la FONDATION de la COMPAGNIE DU MONT-BLANC.
Aujourd'hui ce projet concerne de nombreux collèges de la Haute Savoie, avec l'aide du département, de la Drac et du dispositif du Pass Culture. 200 à 300 jeunes par an sont concernés par nos sessions EMI .

Dans un monde où l’information circule de plus en plus vite et par différents moyens (TV, radio, journaux, web, réseaux sociaux…), il est important d’initier les enfants dès leur plus jeune âge à lire l’information, l’analyser, et comprendre les dessous des médias.

Quoi de plus ludique qu’une radio pour passer dans l’envers du décor et découvrir les différents métiers qui se cachent derrière ?

Trouver les informations, rédiger du contenu pertinent, enregistrer des chroniques, préparer et mener des interviews, enregistrer des jingles, préparer une émission radio sont autant d’activités auxquelles vos enfants vont pouvoir s’essayer !

Sans compter un chapitre autour du son, où ils apprendront à traiter leurs voix, à l’habiller d’un fond sonore ou d’extraits musicaux et bien entendu créer un programme musical en sélectionnant des titres.

Ce projet permet donc à des enfants de découvrir les différents métiers de la radio et de construire ensemble un programme radiophonique!

Name: Radio 3FACH
Description:
Radio 3FACH ist das führende, nicht kommerzorientierte Kultur- und Ausbildungsradio für alle jungen und junggebliebenen Menschen der Deutschschweiz. So jung wie 3FACH wirkt, ist es aber in Wirklichkeit gar nicht mehr. Das Projekt reicht bis ins Jahr 1993 zurück, als die Idee eines Jugendradios von Kantons- und Seminarschüler*innen in Angriff genommen wurde. Die treibende Kraft hinter dem Projekt war Attila Revesz. Im Frühling 1994 ging 3FACH während einem Testmonat zum ersten Mal auf Sendung. Drei Jahre später erhielt Radio 3FACH eine offizielle Sendekonzession vom Bund und am Mittag des 17. Oktober 1998 war es endlich soweit: Radio 3FACH – das erste Jugendradio Europas – ging offiziell auf Sendung!

Seither hat 3FACH seine Ideale stets verfolgt und ist diesen bis heute treu geblieben. Sieben Tage die Woche hörst du von morgens bis abends die Themen und Musik, die abseits des Mainstream beheimatet aber relevant sind. Ein Gefühl das erfährt, wer 3FACH via 97.7 oder 96.2 MHz, Webstream, DAB+ oder der iOS bzw. Android App einschaltet.

3FACH ist und klingt frisch. Dies hat seinen Grund: Es gibt keine Sesselkleber. Dank der altbekannten Altersguillotine müssen alle Moderatorinnen und Moderatoren jünger als 25, und alle Geschäftsleitungsmitglieder jünger als 30 sein. Radio 3FACH ist eine notwendige Ausnahme im medialen Einheitsbrei.

Name: 90.1 KPFT Houston
Description:
KPFT was born in Houston about 50 years ago. In the late 1960s, Houston was still behind the times, meaning certain stories were ignored by the media and the ruling classes.  Our city’s first woman who was black had been elected to the school board. And even though there was pressure for desegregation and equal rights — the local papers, television, and radio declined to cover her victory.

Out of a first amendment urge, “two young, disillusioned journalists” started KPFT — Larry Lee from the Associated Press and Don Gardner from the Houston Post.

Listener-sponsored commercial-free community radio from the largest county in Texas
So this lil’ radio station got itself a lil’ license from the big ol’ government — and joined a growing family of educational, community radio stations from across America. At the time, KPFT was the youngest of four siblings in Berkeley, Los Angeles, New York City, and Houston. On March 1, 1970 this lil’ radio station started broadcasting for the very first time.

Can you guess the first song those pioneers played for the good people of Houston and Harris County back then? “Here Comes the Sun” by The Beatles. The band had only released it four months prior. What a time to be alive. (Sadly, it appears all recordings of classic hit have been destroyed, and there appears to be no way to listen to this song).

Name: Educational Communications Board
Description:
In partnership with the University of Wisconsin-Madison, ECB operates the Wisconsin Public Radio (WPR) and PBS Wisconsin networks, ensuring the distribution of public media and education services to a statewide audience. The agency’s responsibilities are focused primarily on the technical infrastructure and delivery of these broadcast services.

In addition to delivering trusted non-commercial programming to the residents of Wisconsin, ECB proudly provides public safety, broadcast engineering and transmission services.

ECB plays a critical role in the Emergency Alert System (EAS) in Wisconsin which includes AMBER and NOAA Weather Service alerts.

ECB maintains the 28 NOAA transmitter stations located throughout Wisconsin. These stations receive weather information directly from National Weather Service offices and broadcast 24 hours a day.

ECB also works with the Wisconsin Department of Military Affairs, Division of Emergency Management, to serve as the delivery conduit for critical non-weather emergency alerts such as: Civil Danger, Evacuation Immediate, Hazardous Materials, Nuclear Power Plant, Radiological Hazard, and Shelter in Place Warnings.

ECB offers contractual engineering and services related to the construction or operation of telecommunications facilities at Wisconsin schools. This service is offered in response to requests from schools without access to other service organizations able to perform systems maintenance.

ECB has career opportunities in information technology, engineering, finance, education, and more.

NeuroRadio is more than just music—we’re a movement. We host live DJ events, create guided meditation sessions, and provide positive content that supports mental health and neurodivergent communities. With a mix of urban vibes and uplifting energy, we’re redefining radio as a tool for personal growth and positivity.

 Tune in. Feel good. Join the movement.

Name: Rádio 98.1 Fm de Canoinhas
Description:
Com uma programação diferenciada e aberta aos interesses da comunidade, a Rádio 98 FM iniciou suas atividades em agosto do ano 2001, com o objetivo de inovar o jeito de se fazer rádio na cidade de Canoinhas e região do Planalto Norte catarinense. No ano de 2002 firmou parceria com a OBORÉ Projetos Especiais em Comunicações e Artes, de São Paulo, passando a transmitir em sua programação diária o programa Plantão Saúde. No mesmo ano idealizou e colocou em prática campanhas de ajuda humanitária, como a do material escolar, do cobertor e de Natal, com foco voltado às famílias carentes e, principalmente, crianças.
 
No início de 2003, devido ao sucesso alcançado durante a campanha Faça o Natal Brincando 2002, recebeu da Fundação ABRINQ pelos Direitos da Criança e do Adolescente o selo de EMPRESA AMIGA DA CRIANÇA. Com isso, ampliou ainda mais suas ações de Responsabilidade Social, implantando no município o projeto CRIANÇA FELIZ, e estabelecendo parcerias importantes com escolas, universidades e outras Instituições do mesmo caráter, além de abrir espaços em sua programação para profissionais liberais, autoridades e cidadãos canoinhenses.

 

Ao longo desses anos, a Rádio 98 FM Educativa tornou-se referência local, regional e nacional devido aos prêmios que conquistou, entre certificados e diplomas de benemérito por relevantes serviços prestados à população do Planalto Norte de Santa Catarina.

Atualmente, além de desenvolver suas campanhas sociais, os projetos Criança Feliz e Rua do Lazer, destinar espaços, gratuitamente, em sua programação, para que outras entidades divulguem suas ações e levar ao ar programetes de cunho educativo/cultural, a 98 FM oferece aos seus ouvintes uma programação eclética, de qualidade, buscando aprimoramento contínuo para que continue sendo orgulho para Canoinhas.

Name: 4iG Műsorszóró Infrastruktúra Kft.
Description:
A 4iG Műsorszóró Infrastruktúra Kft., fő tevékenységeként, az országos földfelszíni rádiós- és televíziós műsorszórást biztosítja Magyarországon. Kiemelkedő színvonalú infrastruktúrával, képzett szakemberekkel egyedülálló és magas minőségű szolgáltatást nyújt partnereinek, felhasználóinak. 

Rádiós- és televíziós műsorszórás 

A 4iG Műsorszóró Infrastruktúra Kft. országos földfelszíni hálózatán analóg rádió műsorszórást (AM és FM), valamint digitális televízió műsorszórást (DVB-T, DVB-T2) folytat. Partnerei az országos közszolgálati és kereskedelmi csatornák, valamint a regionális, illetve helyi műsorszolgáltatók. A stúdiókból az egyes csatornák jeleit digitális összeköttetéseken juttatja el az adóberendezésekhez. Összesen 136 telephely biztosítja a lefedettséget a rádió- és televízió műsorok vételéhez. A műsorszórás gerinchálózatát alkotó 17 fontosabb adótorony jól ismert látványosságai hazánknak, ilyen például a budapesti Széchenyi-hegyen, a mátrai Kékestetőn, a pécsi Misinán, a soproni Dalos-hegyen, Kab-hegyen vagy Szentesen működő torony. Solton és  Lakihegyen található két középhullámú antenna magassága 300 méter feletti melyek szintén országosan ismert építmények. 

Régi technológia új szerepben – a hosszúhullámú rádiós körvezérlés (RKV) 

A 4iG Műsorszóró Kft. tevékenységei közé tartozik a hosszúhullámú frekvenciasávban működő, úgynevezett rádiós körvezérlő rendszer üzemeltetése. A szolgáltatás a műsorszórás jellegzetességeit viseli (egy telephelyről nagy területet képes lefedni), de műsorjel helyett ipari vezérlőjeleket juttat el a végponti eszközökhöz. A történelmi jelentőségű, 314 m magas lakihegyi „szivar” antenna és a hozzá tartozó berendezéspark segítségével vezérelhető a rendszeren át továbbított kapcsolójelekkel például a közvilágítás, távhőszolgáltatás vagy menedzselhető a hálózat terhelése. Ez a szolgáltatás a hosszúhullámú sáv terjedési jellegzetességeinek köszönhetően országhatáron túl is elérhető.

Name: Australian Tamil Broadcasting Corporation
Description:
ATBC Radio Station
Australian Tamil Broadcasting Corporation (ATBC) is a not-for-profit radio station broadcasting programs primarily in Tamil language 24 hours a day. ATBC operates its’ studios in Sydney, Melbourne and Toronto- Canada.

ATBC is a Media partner with the NSW Government and Federal Government Agencies and helps them to disseminate information to our listeners.

Community at its heart
Community broadcasting in Australia is the voice of the community. Australian Tamil Broadcasting Corporation (ATBC) was established to provide Australian Tamils with Information services, which are not adequately served by the existing mainstream media. ATBC was established as a non-profit entity with active participation from the Tamil community. ATBC enables the facilities and mechanism required for talented and energetic volunteers from the Tamil community to produce programs.

ATBC is also world’s pioneer Tamil language radio formed as a not-for-profit radio station with volunteers. ATBC has achieved one of its goals of connecting the Australian Tamil Community to the world by streaming on-line and enabling talk-back programs with Global listeners. Regularly you can hear ATBC listeners taking part in talk-back programs from Tamil homelands of India, Sri Lanka, Singapore, and Malaysia as well as from faraway places of Norway, France, Canada, Dubai and Argentina.

ATBC Sponsorship and Promotion Opportunities
ATBC’s creation and its successful community based operation is a remarkable achievement for a small vibrant Tamil community with many of them have been recent arrival to Australia within the last 25 years. 

ATBC was a finalist of NSW Premier's Multicultural Media Awards.

If you have a business and would like to discuss sponsorship opportunities, we will be happy to discuss details which are mutually beneficial to both entities. If you want to be a volunteer or advertiser, please contact ATBC by phone or by completing our online contact form.

Name: Curio-Cité
Description:
Curio-Cité, c'est à la fois la 3e branche de l'entreprise québécoise - le Cabinet de Curiosités Contemporain - et la vitrine grand public sous 2 formes : 
- une émission de radio sur CIBL 101,5 FM et en rediffusion sur Spotify, Apple Podcast et Balado Québec. En 2024-25, 37 émissions d'1h en direct tous les jeudis matins à 8h ont été animées par Alexandre Escure, accompagné de 4 chroniqueur.se.s : Mickael Brard (Développement Durable), Géraldine Dallaire (Société), Flore Deshayes (Santé Mentale) et Catherine Harrison-Boisvert (Littérature). 
En 2025-26, l'émission - toujours animée par Alexandre Escure - est en direct un mercredi sur 2, à partir du 3 septembre, de 16h à 18h.
4 chroniqueur.se.s. : Thibaut Allibert (Société), Flore Deshayes (Santé Mentale), Catherine Harrison-Boisvert (Musique Classique) et Marco Pronovost (Culture) ainsi que le défi de curiosité surprise relevé par Maïlys Haurie. 

- un événement de réseautage trimestriel dédié à la création de liens et à la curiosité. Porté par une thématique annuelle - en 2025-26, il s'agit des 4 éléments et de leurs symboliques dans l'entreprise -, chaque événement donne la parole à différents intervenants : pour la partie "connaissances" et pour la partie "brise-glace"
1. 26 juin 2025 (la terre) : Partie connaissances : Virginie Louault / Brise-glace : Thibaut Allibert 
2. 25 septembre 2025 (l'eau) : Partie connaissances : Sylvain Bour et Laetitia Sellam / Brise-glace : Kamel Dinar. 
3. 12 février 2026 (le feu). 
4. Avril 2026 (l'air).

Name: Notícia FM
Description:
Em 1981, entrava no ar pela primeira vez a “Notícias FM”, carinhosamente chamada de 88 FM, conquistando os ouvintes na primeira conversa, ao som do primeiro sucesso tocado. Pouco tempo depois, a rádio teve seu nome reformulado para “Notícia FM” e ganhou o famoso slogan “Ligou, virou Notícia”, repetido com alegria pelos ouvintes até hoje. No centro de Americana, o coração da cidade, a Notícia FM se consolidou como uma das mais importantes emissoras de rádio FM do país, com ouvintes espalhados por toda a Região Metropolitana de Campinas.
Faz mais de 40 anos que a Notícia FM é recebida pelos ouvintes em suas casas, mais de 40 anos que a Notícia FM os acompanha no carro e no trabalho, com entretenimento, informação e boa música.

Para nós, a receita do sucesso é tocar o melhor da música, sem distinção. Oferecer uma programação que agrada a toda a família, lançando sucessos, com jornalismo em tempo real e que vai direto ao assunto. Além de contar com uma equipe de locutores que apaixonados pelo que fazem, que interagem com o público, seja ao vivo na rádio ou nas redes sociais.

Name: A Journey Through The 77
Description:
"A Journey Through the 77" is an immersive road trip celebrating local wisdom, sustainability, inclusivity, and responsible tourism. This captivating travel docu-series journeys through Thailand's 77 provinces, uncovering hidden gems and diverse cultures; music, food, festivals, art and more. 
Hosted by two women—a Thai and an expat of 22 years—with inspiring guests along the way, it spotlights secondary destinations, community connections, low-carbon travel, and HM King Rama IX’s self-sufficiency theory. 
Each episode explores nature-based wonders, intangible heritage, unique crafts, and wellness practices. 
It’s about the people, places, and experiences - and how they make you feel— that shape a journey, not just the destination.

#AJourneyThroughThe77 คือการเดินทางแบบโร้ดทริปที่ชวนให้คุณดื่มด่ำไปกับภูมิปัญญาท้องถิ่น ความยั่งยืน ความหลากหลาย และการท่องเที่ยวอย่างรับผิดชอบ

รายการสารคดีท่องเที่ยวชุดนี้จะพาคุณไปสัมผัส 77 จังหวัดทั่วไทย ค้นพบเสน่ห์ที่ซ่อนอยู่และวัฒนธรรมที่หลากหลาย ไม่ว่าจะเป็นเสียงดนตรี อาหาร เทศกาล ศิลปะ และอีกมากมาย

พิธีกรเป็นผู้หญิงสองคน – คนไทยหนึ่งคนและชาวต่างชาติที่อยู่เมืองไทยมาแล้ว 22 ปี – พร้อมแขกรับเชิญสุดพิเศษในแต่ละตอน เราจะพาไปยังเมืองรอง เชื่อมโยงกับชุมชน ใช้การเดินทางคาร์บอนต่ำ และพูดถึงแนวคิดเศรษฐกิจพอเพียงของในหลวงรัชกาลที่ ๙

แต่ละตอนจะพาไปสำรวจธรรมชาติ มรดกภูมิปัญญาที่จับต้องไม่ได้ งานฝีมือที่มีเอกลักษณ์ และแนวทางดูแลสุขภาพแบบพื้นถิ่น

มันคือเรื่องของผู้คน สถานที่ และประสบการณ์—และความรู้สึกที่คุณได้รับ—ที่หล่อหลอมการเดินทาง ไม่ใช่แค่จุดหมายปลายทางเท่านั้น

Name: The Avery Agency (formerly Avery Sisters Entertainment)
Description:
The Avery Agency is not just another talent agency, we are known for bookable, professional,
and undeniable talent. In addition to that, our roster/family is full of genuinely beautiful human beings.
 
Licensed, bonded, and SAG/AFTRA-franchised, The Avery Agency has set a high standard of being one of the top go-to agencies in the Southeast region for nearly 20 years. What began as Avery Sisters Entertainment has evolved into a powerhouse boutique agency, The Avery Agency. We have cultivated rock-solid relationships with top casting directors in the Southeast. We also work with LA/NY agents and managers to make sure our talent is exposed to those markets, when they are ready.
 
We keep our agency intentionally boutique because that is where the magic happens. We know every artist on our roster by name, by skill, and by vision. Our talent consistently books because we prioritize excellence over volume. Our goal is to guide their careers with purpose in this
ever-evolving industry.

Our talent has landed roles in IT: Welcome to Derry, We Grown Now, Chicago P.D., Ironheart, Peacemaker, The Oval, Beyond The Gates, Sistas, His & Hers, BMF, Goons, Tulsa King, Assisted Living, Wakanda Forever, P-Valley, Grey’s Anatomy, Law & Order: SVU, and more. We have also booked countless Commercial and Voiceover work.

We lead with excellence, serve with humility, and grow with deep gratitude for our talent and their journey. We remain committed to helping them rise, thrive, and stay working.

#FiqueEmSintonia

Name: Lokale Omroep Dronten
Description:
De Flevolandse Media Stichting (FMS) heeft een aanwijzing aangevraagd voor de gemeentes Dronten, Lelystad en Zeewolde als zijnde media instelling voor de streek en verzorgt als officiële media instelling nieuws, informatie en achtergronden voor de inwoners van de verschillende gemeenten .

Lokale Omroep Dronten is een van de lokale entititeiten van FMS. 
Doel van Lokale Omroep Dronten is het lokale nieuws te brengen van en voor Dronten, Biddinghuizen en Swifterbant. Dit doen wij op een zo aantrekkelijk, informatief en educatief mogelijke wijze de toegewezen kanalen en via internet, sociale media en via de website. Hierbij betracht Lokale Omroep Dronten de samenwerking te bevorderen tussen de verschillende instanties op het gebied van educatie, cultuur, informatie, en vele anderen.

Lokale Omroep Dronten functioneert als een lokaal cross mediaal platform via de beschikbare kanalen. Hier verspreidt LOD haar programma’s aan de inwoners van haar verzorgingsgebied. Dit gedurende de periode van 24 uur per dag, 7 dagen in de week.

De ambities die wij ons als publieke media instellingen hebben gesteld sluiten aan bij de veranderingen in het omroep landschap. 

Streekomroep FMS
Radio Lelystad, Lokale Omroep Dronten en Lokale Omroep Zeewolde werken samen als zijnde streekomroep. Deze streekomroep wordt gevormd door de Flevolandse Media Stichting (FMS)

FMS heeft als doel om voor de gemeente Lelystad, Zeewolde en Dronten nieuws en informatie te verzorgen en is daarmede de bewaker van de democratie. Hierbij werken beide omroepen nauw samen tot het verzorgen van lokaal toereikend media aanbod. In de gemeente Dronten is nu geen omroep actief. De Flevolandse Media Stichting zal zorgdragen voor de tot standkomen van Lokale Omroep Dronten evenals ook de redactionele samenwerking.

Name: Radio Maria Österreich
Description:
Radio Maria Österreich ist ein katholischer Privatradiosender, der zur Weltfamilie von Radio Maria gehört, mit über 80 Radiostationen in aller Welt. 

Neben dem Zentralstudio in Wien, gibt es in Österreich Niederlassungen in Amstetten, Innsbruck und Salzburg. Radio Maria Österreich sendet seit dem Jahr 1998. 

Gebet, Glaubensverkündigung und Lebenshilfe stehen im Mittelpunkt des Programms. Die Hörer sind eingeladen, den katholischen Glauben (neu) zu entdecken und an der Hand der Muttergottes zu vertiefen. 

Radio Maria finanziert sich ausschließlich durch Spenden, ist ein Live-Sender und interaktiv: die Hörer können sich in fast jeder Sendung telefonisch einbringen. Ehrenamtliche Mitarbeiter in den Mobilstudios, im Hörerservice und in der Sendebegleitung sind herzlich willkommen!

Programmdirektor ist Br. Peter Ackermann und Präsident des Vereins Dr. Albin Lintner.

Name: RipCue Music
Description: A man and his music publishing company are fighting for a simple goal: to help creative professionals find the right music for their moving images! It's a one-man show facing the huge challenges of holding his own against powerful players and going his own way. The development of a handcrafted music catalog: each track is created through creative sparring, refined, polished, and prepared for your stories. L’obiettivo è quello di diventare un punto di riferimento per tutti gli investitori del settore come retail, neofiti o trader esperti.

I punti di forza del progetto sono da ricondurre ad una informazione costante e sempre aggiornata in tempo reale, con notizie verificate e imparziali selezionate dalla redazione composta da giornalisti esperti nel settore.

Ad arricchire il progetto sono gli approfondimenti su tematiche ben specifiche e di interesse, oltre alla presenza costante di rubriche condotte da personaggi riconosciuti nel settore e con un background di tutto rispetto.

Ci saranno momenti in cui gli ascoltatori potranno interagire telefonicamente con i giornalisti e con gli ospiti per porre domande o chiedere informazioni in merito agli argomenti trattati.

Grande importanza verrà data ai nuovi progetti tecnologici, con rubriche ed interviste ai fondatori.

Si organizzeranno eventi live in studio dove verranno ospitati Ceo, founder e sviluppatori di alcuni progetti di primissima fascia, con la possibilità da parte degli ascoltatori di assistere in studio all’evento e di avere a disposizione contenuti esclusivi.

A completamento dell’offerta verrà implementata la radiovisione con la creazione di una web tv che si affiancherà alla web radio così da poter rendere completa l’esperienza per l’utente finale.

Whether you're tackling climate change, modern slavery or the housing crisis, we’ll help you turn your purpose into prime-time storytelling that people actually want to watch.

- Sustainable Brands & Businesses – have a product or service making the world better? TV helps you scale awareness and build trust fast. We place your brand in inspiring shows alongside aligned missions — boosting exposure, credibility, and emotional connection with your audience.

Many organisations waste time and money on comms strategies that go unnoticed. The truth? Information alone doesn’t drive behaviour. Stories do. And nothing tells a story like TV.

Using brand-funded models and partnerships, we create powerful TV shows with national and international reach — often with little to no financial investment required from our association or not-for-profit partners.

 If you're ready to step onto the green carpet — we’d love to help.

Name: Anzwi - Amazigh Climate Podcast
Description:
Focused on youth and the general public in climate-threatened areas, The Podcast covers environmental challenges, sustainable practices, and the preservation of resources. Through content development, community engagement, and wide distribution, the project seeks to democratize climate crisis awareness, empower youth, amplify marginalized voices, and connect local know how with environmental stewardship. With local partners and a solid monitoring plan, it aspires to inspire action and foster a deeper climate action.

The Amazigh Climate Podcast addresses critical needs by bridging language barriers and targeting communities extremely vulnerable to climate change in Morocco's Atlas mountains. Funding this project is vital due to its innovative approach in using native Amazigh language to disseminate knowledge on climate issues, ensuring inclusivity and accessibility for those most affected yet often overlooked. By empowering local communities with information and knowledge to combat climate challenges, the project fosters a proactive stance towards sustainability and resilience of these communities. Its focus on integrating traditional knowledge and local know how with contemporary environmental practices promises a lasting impact, preserving cultural heritage while promoting sustainable development. This dual focus on climate education and cultural preservation makes the project a unique conduit for lasting community transformation, deserving of support.

For more than six decades, 1010 WINS has been the heartbeat of New York — the station millions turn to when they need to know what’s happening right now. Our legendary promise still stands: “You give us 22 minutes, we’ll give you the world.”

From breaking news and weather to traffic, business, and sports, WINS delivers trusted, around-the-clock coverage across radio, streaming, podcasts, and social platforms. Now broadcasting on both 1010 AM and 92.3 FM, WINS continues to evolve for a new generation of listeners while maintaining the fast-paced, fact-driven style that defines New York news.

Part of Audacy’s powerhouse news portfolio, 1010 WINS remains the city’s most recognized news brand... powered by award-winning journalists and the relentless energy of New York itself.

Name: University of Toronto Community Radio CIUT-FM
Description:
Radio with purpose since 1987
We create, curate and deliver campus and community programming that reflects and expresses the rich diversity of this great City of ours.
24 hours a day, 7 days a week, all year long, you’ll enjoy fresh, interesting and even challenging radio, brought to you by impassioned volunteers under the leadership of experienced radio industry professionals. That’s what helps make CIUT such an outstanding learning environment and collaborative workplace - one that embraces inclusion, fairmindedness and social relevance.

Our audiences love this station’s programming and our on-air talent because we steadfastly buck the trend of commercial radio that too often is mediocre and repetitive.

Every day, our programming schedule is packed with programs inspired by the rich cultural fabric that defines Toronto as one of the most multicultural and dynamic cities in the world.

Our legacy is one of struggle to survive, of keeping faith with our listeners and of working with our community to ensure we are always relevant and current.

Student and Listener Supported

With the generous help and financial support of students and listeners alike, CIUT continues to be an oasis of creativity on the FM dial, always welcoming new ideas and eager to enlist, educate and entertain our audiences. From dynamic and eclectic morning shows, multicultural to mainstream music, to edgy political commentary, business insight programming and straight up wonky and wonderful radio you simply won’t hear anywhere else, CIUT is a true original in a sea of sameness.

Bringing you the sound - and news - of your city, each and every day for over 30 years!

Name: The Summit FM
Description:
WAPS "The Summit FM" is a musically adventurous, community-focused, listener-supported public radio station. The radio station and streaming services are heard in Akron at 91.3FM, Youngstown at 90.7FM, and Athens, Ohio, at 90.1FM. The Summit FM also produces - "The 330" - the past, present, and future of music in Northeast Ohio.

Our Summit Next program gets back to the roots of The Summit FM serving as a “radio classroom” by collaborating with Akron, Athens, and Struthers public school students in a meaningful way. The program provides structured, project-based learning opportunities for middle school and high school students. Programming is standards-based, student-led, and empowers youth to research, create, and produce content and assets to be used on-air and online. Students are primarily responsible for The Summit FM’s “The 330” station which features the past, present, and future of Northeast Ohio music. 

The Summit FM is proud to give back to our listening communities. We've created two scholarship funds, exclusively for seniors preparing to attend college post-graduation. Please visit our webpage to learn more.

In public radio, the term "underwriting" is used for on-air announcements acknowledging financial support. It is a cost-effective alternative to commercial advertising and a great way for your business or organization to connect with our loyal listeners. Although underwriting is different than traditional advertising, you can use it as you would any other marketing tool to position your services or products, or to brand your business as a whole.
In 2022, The Summit FM experienced a 74% growth in Underwriting revenue. We encourage you to ask us, and to ask around, about the perks of underwriting with The Summit FM.

It only takes a few minutes to become a member with The Summit FM - and you get to choose your membership level. Visit our website today to learn more and to kick off your membership! https://thesummit.fm/support/membership/

Name: Canale 8
Description:
Canale 8 nasce nel 1987 con grandi ambizioni, diventando rapidamente un punto di riferimento per la Campania. Con circa 80 persone iniziali, ha sempre curato la qualità dell'informazione e delle trasmissioni di attualità. Ha collaborato con circuiti nazionali come Italia 7, 7 Gold e Odeon, per poi concentrarsi su contenuti autoprodotti focalizzati su tematiche regionali.

La qualità della produzione è uno dei principali punti di forza di Canale 8. Ogni programma è realizzato con cura e attenzione ai dettagli, garantendo contenuti ben curati e professionali. Questo impegno si riflette in una vasta gamma di programmi che coprono diversi generi e interessi.

Canale 8 si distingue per il tono pacato e professionale delle sue trasmissioni, evitando eccessi e mantenendo un approccio equilibrato e rispettoso. Questo stile è apprezzato dai telespettatori che cercano un'informazione seria e affidabile.

L'innovazione tecnologica è un altro elemento distintivo. Canale 8 è stata pioniera nella sperimentazione del digitale terrestre, ottenendo la prima autorizzazione prima dei principali broadcaster nazionali. Questo impegno continua oggi, con investimenti costanti in tecnologia per migliorare l’esperienza visiva e la qualità dei contenuti.

Un altro punto di forza fondamentale è il radicamento nel territorio. Canale 8 ha sempre dato grande importanza alle tematiche regionali, con una programmazione che risponde agli interessi della comunità campana.

Oggi, con 35 ripetitori in tutta la Campania e una copertura estesa dal basso Lazio fino alla provincia di Foggia, Canale 8 è tra le principali emittenti regionali per ascolti. La passione e la professionalità del suo team, composto da 30 dipendenti di cui 12 giornalisti, confermano Canale 8 come un vero punto di riferimento nel panorama televisivo regionale.

Name: In Da Streets Radio
Description:
In Da Streets Radio, headquartered minutes from the Philadelphia International Airport , is a radio + media hybrid that offers both live spins and editorial assets that convert exposure into bookings and revenue faster than scattershot social post. We are a trailblazing internet radio station and media outlet founded in 2005 by the esteemed hip-hop artist, writer, and host Jamilah Lawry, known professionally as Nina Capone. This platform not only showcases a rich variety of musical talents, particularly in the hip-hop and urban genres but also integrates comprehensive business knowledge and offers valuable advertising opportunities to small businesses. By doing so, In Da Streets Radio transcends the traditional boundaries of a music platform to serve as a dynamic conduit for entrepreneurial growth and visibility in the community.

Under Nina Capone's visionary leadership, the station emphasizes the importance of supporting local businesses, artists, and entrepreneurs, providing them with the tools and exposure needed to thrive in competitive markets. It offers a unique blend of entertainment, education, and promotional services, making it an indispensable resource for anyone looking to elevate their brand or message. With its commitment to fostering a sense of community and promoting economic empowerment, In Da Streets Radio stands out as a beacon of innovation and support for the arts and business sectors alike.

Name: Nippon Navigator
Description:
In diesem Podcast, dem Nippon Navigator, geben Gregory Glanzmann und Maximilian Böger Einblicke und Analysen zu aktuellen Trends und Ereignissen in der japanischen Geschäftswelt. Gregory ist nach Japan gezogen und teilt seine Erfahrungen mit den Zuhörern. Die Idee zu diesem Podcast entstand aus Gesprächen über Veränderungen in Gregorys beruflicher Laufbahn und deren Auswirkungen auf sein Verständnis von Geschäft und Kultur. Der Podcast beleuchtet Themen wie Unterschiede in Geschäftskulturen und die Strategien dahinter. Das Ziel ist es, Informationen zu liefern, zum Nachdenken anzuregen und Inspirationen für das eigene Geschäft zu bieten.

Dr. Maximlilian Böger hat die Universität Wien mit einem Master of Science in International Business abgeschlossen und an der Universität St. Gallen doktoriert. 

Gregory Glanzmann hat den Master of Arts in Strategy and International Management (SIM) an seiner Alma Mater, der Universität St.Gallen abgeschlossen, nachdem er im Bachelor Internationale Beziehungen studierte.

Name: Central Great Lakes Emmys
Description:
The Central Great Lakes Chapter of the National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences has a mission to serve its members, recognize excellence and promote the highest standards in television professionalism.

The National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences (NATAS) is the premier and most recognized non-profit organization dedicated to the advancement of excellence in television.

The EMMY statuette is the most prestigious, peer-judged honor in television for outstanding creative achievement. The Academy gives EMMY Awards for domestic television. Its International Council gives EMMY Awards for foreign television.

ATAS (Academy of Television Arts & Sciences) was founded in 1946 in Los Angeles.

NATAS (The National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences) was formed in 1957. The Academy now serves all the television markets in the United States through its 20 chapters. The Cleveland Chapter was chartered, January 29, 1969. Now renamed the Central Great Lakes Chapter, it represents markets in northern Ohio, central and northeastern Indiana, and Erie Pennsylvania.

Name: House FM
Description: House FM was founded in 2001 with music at the heart of its ethos, consistently championing sounds that commercial stations often overlook, playing tracks long before they achieve mainstream success. Being based in London, one of the most multicultural cities in the world, has further enriched the station’s sound, blending diverse cultural influences into its programming. House FM empowers its presenters to curate their own unique music selections, guided by the station’s mission to deliver an entertaining and informative format to its diverse audience. Listeners from all around the world tune in to House FM, which broadcasts online, on FM, DAB, and via its dedicated app, ensuring its reach extends far beyond London’s vibrant music scene. The station features a broad range of shows hosted by presenters of all ages and backgrounds, reflecting the rich diversity of its listeners. By staying true to its values and putting the music first, House FM has grown into a major part of London’s house music community, connecting people, spreading positivity, and keeping the soulful sounds of house music alive.

Name: Outreach Radio
Description:
Outreach Radio broadcasts on 102.5 FM, on DAB+ across Hampshire and surrounding areas, on Smart Speakers and online at outreachradio.co.uk, giving us a population coverage of almost 2 million.

We begun life as Lockdown 100.7 FM, a zero revenue voluntary service broadcasting under a temporary FM licence for radio stations supporting local communities during the Coronavirus pandemic & lockdown in March 2020.

Our 100.7 FM licence was extended twice by OfCom, allowing us broadcast continuously to Chandler’s Ford, Eastleigh, North Baddesley, Romsey and surrounding areas for nearly six months, until September 2020.

During our time on FM and online, we developed an amazing and overwhelming level of interest and support from listeners of all ages, local businesses, charities, voluntary groups, churches and local authorities, which led us to seek a way to continue this work and establish ourselves as a permanent radio service.

Shortly after rebranding to OUTREACH RADIO in September 2020, (thinking the lockdown was over!), a permanent DAB licence for Hampshire & the Isle of Wight was granted alongside a second temporary FM licence for 100.7 FM, under which broadcasts recommenced in November 2020.

Our ability to serve local communities across Hampshire and go from a small-scale service to a commercially capable entity with immense coverage in approximately eight months, in the middle of a pandemic, gives an insight into our values and ethos, and the lengths we will go to in supporting our communities and listeners.

We are OUTREACH RADIO - Your Truly Local Radio Station!

Name: Cruzando Puentes Iberoamérica Capital Radio
Description:
Cruzando Puentes es el primer programa de Capital Radio dedicado íntegramente a Iberoamérica.

Cada martes, de 15:00 a 15:30 h (CET), exploramos, descubrimos, conectamos y analizamos las oportunidades económicas, culturales y sociales que ofrece la comunidad iberoamericana, unida por dos idiomas y por una historia compartida a ambos lados del Atlántico.

Producido y conducido por Mildred Laya (Venezuela) y Eduvigis Ortiz (República Dominicana), Cruzando Puentes tiende lazos entre personas, empresas, instituciones y visiones que están transformando la región. Hablamos con líderes, emprendedores, artistas, académicos y referentes que están abriendo caminos en sectores clave como innovación, tecnología, cultura, sostenibilidad, inclusión y emprendimiento.

En Capital Radio se siente la economía y se siente a Iberoamérica cada vez más cerca.

Name: WHKY
Description:
WHKY Radio was the first radio station between Charlotte and Asheville North Carolina and is the oldest independent radio station in the United States that is still owned and operated by the founding family. 

Ed Long broke ground for a new radio station in 1939. During WWII, getting equipment was difficult so he broke ground with a mule and a plow. His determination paid off and WHKY Radio signed on June 10, 1940 and transmits on 1290 AM and 102.3 FM. 

Over the years, our station has been visited by many notable people, including President Ronald Regan. Always striving to be first, WHKY was a charter member of the Rush Limbaugh show and even hosted a live broadcast from our studio.

WHKY has been a part of the local history and has become an integral part of the community. Our morning talk show brings the community to your breakfast table. As you start the day with your first cup of coffee, we give you a moment with your community leaders, aspiring young college students, volunteer organizations, and local authors.  These neighbors inspire us with their latest venture, event, or masterpiece, and all of a sudden the larger world fades away and you are in your hometown having coffee and learning more about what makes our region so amazing. 

We understand Hickory and the surrounding area because, like our community, we started here with a vision of what could be. We have grown with the Hickory Metro over the generations. We are your neighbor.  We are the folks sitting next to you at the Crawdad's game or at the Hickory Motor Speedway. 
 
We are proud to be a part of what Ed Long started as a service to Hickory.  The torch has been passed for four generations of the Long family. We are honored to call you neighbor and are grateful for your support for over 83 years and in the years to come.

Description:

Nuestro objetivo es conectar a los aficionados del Club Nacional de Football con las últimas noticias, resultados, opiniones y sentimientos sobre el equipo.
 
Ofrecemos una cobertura en profundidad de los partidos de Nacional con un análisis, comentarios y entrevistas con ex jugadores, entrenadores y otros miembros del equipo.
 
Además, promovemos la historia y la pasión por Nacional a través de actividades educativas y sociales con la primera hinchada del mundo. Nuestra intención es brindar a los aficionados una experiencia única y enriquecedora.
 
Nuestra meta es convertirnos en un modelo de partidaria deportiva referente en el mundo y ayudar a fortalecer la relación entre los aficionados y el equipo. Además, nos esforzamos por fomentar el sentimiento de pertenencia y la identidad con el club, y contribuir a la formación y educación de los aficionados de Nacional mediante la difusión de valores deportivos y cívicos.
 
Estamos seguros de que este proyecto contribuirá al crecimiento y fortalecimiento del Club Nacional de Football y su hinchada. Estamos dispuestos a trabajar en colaboración con el Club y su equipo para asegurar el éxito de esta iniciativa.

Name: Rádio Gospel FM STP - Sentindo o Toque da Paz
Description:
A Rádio Gospel FM STP é uma estação da Verdade Bíblica sem distinção religiosa, com foco no cristianismo, promovendo os valores da fé cristã através de programas, interactividades e outros demais serviços de, entre e para o povo de Deus. Casos práticos que envolvam a educação, a moral, a ética e outros valores culturais do povo de Deus, conversando os princípios Bíblicos. 
A Rádio Gospel não promove a imagem humana, nem as ditas ou inspiradas como santos/santas. A exclusividade da promoção de qualquer imagem é reservada ao Senhor Criador e Dono do universo - Jesus Cristo.
Nosso princípio de fé é triuna, conforme as provas bíblicas da Pessoa Divina.
Fonte da decisão: Bíblica Sagrada.
....
A humanidade não é a cobaia de experimentos dos "ditos profetas da última hora". O homem é a Obra prima do próprio Deus e como tal precisa descobrir a Verdade que vem do Trono de Deus e nada mais.
Vamos até está a verdade, e não ofendemos ou procuramos por brigas. A Transparência bíblica não compromete profeta algum, se é que é.
Se precisar trabalhar connosco, seja bem vindo(a).
"Então, disse aos seus discípulos: A seara é realmente grande, mas poucos os ceifeiros."  (Mateus 9 : 37)
"Antes, seguindo a verdade em amor, cresçamos em tudo naquele que é a cabeça, Cristo,"  (Efésios 4 : 15)
Discutir doutrinas???? Não NUNCA, pois a palavra de Deus não foi criada para isso:
"Procura apresentar-te a Deus aprovado, como obreiro que não tem de que se envergonhar, que maneja bem a palavra da verdade."  (II Timóteo 2 : 15)
Pois,
"Toda a Escritura é divinamente inspirada, e proveitosa para ensinar, para redargüir, para corrigir, para instruir em justiça; para que o homem de Deus seja perfeito, e perfeitamente instruído para toda a boa obra."
  (II Timóteo 3 : 16-17)

Name: ContactFM99.3
Description:
Contact FM est née le 9 juillet 1991 grâce à un Conseiller d’éducation du lycée professionnel Maréchal Leclerc de Hauteclocque à Château-du-Loir.

C’est grâce à l’investissement de bénévoles passionnés par la radio dont des enseignants que Contact FM a vu le jour.

Aujourd’hui, la radio est toujours hébergée par le Lycée.

Contact FM  mène de nombreux projets pédagogiques mobilisant les pratiques radiophoniques avec plusieurs établissements scolaires du territoire.

La radio participe ainsi à l’éducation aux médias et à l’information depuis sa création.

Pierrette FREYSSINET est devenue responsable d’antenne en 1998 et a assuré la présidence de 2005 à 2014. Catherine MALEVAL lui a succédé de 2015 à 2021.

Elvis KABAKLIJA est président depuis 2022.

Contact FM est une radio associative non commerciale de catégorie A. Elle est une radio de communication sociale de proximité.

Contact FM émet sur un rayon de 30 à 40 km autour de Château-du-Loir.
Sa zone d’émission couvre un territoire essentiellement rural à la croisée des départements de la Sarthe, de l’Indre-et-Loire et du  Loir-et-Cher.

La radio est soumise aux règles du CSA (Conseil Supérieur de l’Audiovisuel) et du CTA (Comité Territorial de l’Audiovisuel) de Caen.
Elle a  les mêmes obligations que toutes les autres radios en France.

Contact FM fait partie de la FRAMA (Fédération Régionale des Radios Associatives Maine Anjou) aux côtés de Radio Prévert, Radio Alpa, Radio Alpes Mancelles, Fréquence Sillé, Ornithorynque, Cartables FM.
Contact FM adhère à la CNRA (Confédération Nationale des Radios Associatives) et également au SNRL (Syndicat National des Radios Libres).

Name: Solidaria TV Argentina
Description:
Solidaria tv Argentina es un canal de televisión limpio y diferente.
Limpio porque somos transparentes en nuestra programación con el propósito de aportar ideas y enseñanzas positivas para todas las edades.
Somos diferentes porque en vez de recibir, queremos dar, somos un canal sin fines de lucro con medios de ayudar a familias con problemas tanto físicos como espirituales.
Solidaria tv Argentina es parte de la ONG Remar que existe en 70 países ayudando a todo tipo de personas marginadas, y su servicio es totalmente gratuito.
Por eso es tan importante la emisión de solidaria tv para poder  transmitir a la comunidad que hay una salida para aquellos quienes la necesitan, sin pedir nada a cambio.
Nuestra programación es variada, y cuenta con un 80% de programación propia. Tenemos programas infantiles, musicales, programas en vivo, deportivos, enseñanzas, predicaciones y mucho más.
Nuestros fundamentos son cristianos y creemos que nuestro progreso y posibilidad de ayudar a los demás es totalmente posible a causa de la gracia de Dios.
Muchos de los que trabajan en Solidaria tv son adolecentes recuperados de las drogas quienes ofrecen usar sus talentos creativos para ayudar a los demás, esto lo realizan con un corazón agradecido ya que han sido librados de un mundo con poca esperanza.
Solidaria tv Argentina actualmente está emitiendo en 4 ciudades: Buenos Aires, Mar del plata, Córdoba y Rosario en distintas canales de aire. Nuestra visión  es poder abrir una repetidora en cada ciudad de Argentina donde existe Remar, teniendo en cuenta que ya son 20 ciudades a las que podemos llegar para poder ayudar a más personas a través de nuestros reportajes e información de ingreso sobre Remar. 
Solidaria tv empezó en España en los años 90 y actualmente estamos emitiendo tanto allí como en Bolivia, Perú y Argentina.
Nos hace muy felices poder ser parte de la solución y no el problema; además de poder sembrar con lo que Dios pone en nuestras manos.

Tribal Radio is heard on the following frequencies:
91.3 FM in Ignacio, Southern Ute, and Jicarilla Apache tribal lands
100.9 FM in Towaoc, Ute Mountain Ute and Navajo tribal lands
89.7 FM in Farmington and northwest New Mexico.
Morning programs start at 8 AM (MST) 7-days a week with the "Native Music Morning Show"
Live stream at www.tribalradio.org
Morning Host are enrolled Southern Ute Tribal Members playing a unique blend of Powwow, Round Dance, NAC, Hand game and Ceremonial Songs and much, much more…

Бид 2008 оны 11 сарын 26 өдөр туршилтын нэвтрүүлгээ эфирт нэвтрүүлж байсан бол албан ёсны нээлтээ 2009 оны 9 сарын 10 өдөр хийж, сүлжээний буюу үндсэн нэвтрүүлгүүдээ эфиртээ нэвтрүүлж байсан.

“Монгол ТВ” телевиз нь Монголд анх удаа оюуны өмчийн онцгой эрхтэйгээр дотоод гадаадын бүхий л контентуудыг худалдан авч, дуу дүрсний өндөр чанартайгаар үзэгчдэд хүргэхээс гадна дэлхийн томоохон шоу нэвтрүүлгийн форматаар Монголд шоу нэвтрүүлгүүдийг амжилттай бүтээж, Монголын нэвтрүүлгийн стандартад шинэчлэл хийж байна.

Im Laufe der Zeit haben wir auf einen wöchentlichen Rhythmus umgestellt und sind seit der Einführung von LinkedIn Audio Anfang 2022 mittwochs hier zu hören. 
 
Wir freuen uns auf einen positiven und inspirierten Start in den Tag mit Dir! 

 Uhrzeit: 7:00 Uhr - 7:45 Uhr 
 Hosts: Ralf Leister & Holger Kahnt 
________
Hast Du eine Idee für ein Thema? Dann schreib´ uns (Holger oder Ralf) eine Nachricht oder kommentiere unsere Posts.

Name: TECH IMPACT - National Television Series
Description:

For business owners, understanding the advances and disruption of new technologies — from Blockchain, to artificial intelligence, to machine learning, to Big Data — is crucial for the survival of their businesses. 

We are immersed in the Fourth Industrial Revolution and top of mind for CEOs is the impact technology has on their businesses, whether they are small, medium or large.

Technology: It is defined as “a capability given by the practical application of knowledge. Methods that enable us to accomplish tasks.” As each day, month, year passes, so does the evolution of new methods to streamline and infuse businesses with more productive and cost effective processes. No matter the size of your business, the tangible and intangible benefits of technology play a role not only in successful productivity, but also, communication and relationships.

Name: Radio NOVA 100
Description:
Radio Nova has been created to deliver the best music on the radio.  We are a unique radio station and brand that plays the most exciting music of all time! If you feel great when you hear a big guitar solo or love to dream you are on the stage with rock and roll superstars then Radio Nova is for you! We are the station for your inner self to come flooding out and we promise to give you a guitar-based mix of great songs from the last 40 years right through to today.

Created by people who know what makes good radio work and delivered by presenters who aren’t kids and won’t talk all over your favourite songs, we know Radio Nova is for you. If you are as seriously addicted to music as we are then we will be friends forever!!

Radio Nova broadcasts to Dublin city, county & commuter belt (incl. parts of Wicklow, Kildare and Meath). We broadcast to the Greater Dublin area from Three Rock mountain on 100.3 FM, from Saggart Hill into Co. Kildare on 100.5 FM and from Bray Head into Co. Wicklow on 95.7 FM from studios in the Dublin Docklands. We launched at 1pm on September 1st 2010.

We employ a team of almost 40 people across several departments – Programming, Sales, Commercial Production, Promotions and General Administration. An example of our key artists include The Killers, Kings of Leon, Coldplay, Keane, Foo Fighters, Kaiser Chiefs, Red Hot Chilli Peppers, U2, Fleetwood Mac, Tom Petty, The Who and many more.

So come join us for a crazy ride with not a Britney or Justin in sight, come to the only place that the Rolling Stones, David Bowie, Oasis and Zepp all hang out. As crazy as Ozzie and as serious as Kurt, Radio Nova is the experience you have been waiting for…it’s one hell of a ride!!

Description:
La Coordination des Radios Locales et Associatives de Bretagne (CORLAB) fédère 21 radios locales et associatives bretonnes non-commerciales, travaillant à l’information locale et à l’animation culturelle, sociale et économique des territoires.

Lieu d’échange, de coopération et de concertation entre les radios, la CORLAB agit pour tisser du lien social sur le territoire à travers le développement d’activités radiophoniques ludiques, conviviales et ouvertes à tous·tes ; mais aussi à travers la production et à la diffusion élargie de contenus radiophoniques créatifs et originaux.

Elle a pour but de défendre les intérêts de ses radios adhérentes auprès des collectivités, des Ministères et autorités de tutelle et de promouvoir l’expression radiophonique, associative et citoyenne en Bretagne.

Qu’elles soient musicales, étudiantes, brittophones, bilingues, confessionnelles ou généralistes, les radios adhérentes à la CORLAB partagent une même mission de communication sociale de proximité. Des radios pionnières à celles qui viennent d’éclore, elles ne partagent pas seulement un statut associatif, mais aussi cultivent au sein de la CORLAB les mêmes valeurs d’entraide et de coopération.

Name: The Voice Of Africa
Description:
The Voice of Africa - Bridging Cultures, Empowering Economies 
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of The Voice of Africa, Tunisia's first radio station specializing in Africa! 

At The Voice of Africa, we are on a mission to serve as a cultural and economic bridge, fostering strong connections between Tunisia and the diverse nations of Africa. Our dedication lies in providing comprehensive and insightful content that promotes understanding, collaboration, and economic opportunities for Tunisian businesses across the African continent.

 Our Purpose:
 Cultivating Cultural Exchange: We are committed to showcasing the rich cultural diversity, traditions, and heritage of Africa to our listeners in Tunisia. Through engaging programs, interviews, and stories, we strive to promote mutual appreciation, respect, and shared values among African communities.

 Empowering Tunisian Businesses in Africa:
 As the first specialized radio station focusing on Africa, we take pride in our role as a catalyst for economic growth. We equip Tunisian businessmen with valuable market insights, investment opportunities, and networking avenues in various African countries, supporting their ventures and strengthening bilateral trade relations.

 Key Areas of Expertise:
 Market Intelligence: Our team of experienced journalists and analysts provide up-to-date information on emerging trends, industries, and investment climates across Africa, helping Tunisian entrepreneurs make informed decisions.

 Business Spotlights: We highlight success stories of Tunisian businesses operating in Africa, showcasing their achievements and inspiring others to explore the continent's vast potential.

 Networking Opportunities: The Voice of Africa actively organizes events, conferences, and webinars, facilitating meaningful connections between Tunisian entrepreneurs and African counterparts.
 Stay Connected:
 Follow our page to stay informed about the latest updates.

Name: KATHREIN Broadcast USA
Description:
Kathrein Broadcast USA | Scala – A Legacy of Excellence

Kathrein Broadcast USA, Inc. was founded as part of the Kathrein Group of companies in 1919. Kathrein entered the U.S. market through a partnership with SCALA Electronic Corporation (founded in 1954 and a market leader in broadcast antennas). By 2000, Kathrein Broadcast had completed the full acquisition of SCALA.

For more than 65 years, Kathrein Broadcast USA has built a reputation for:
 Products and service of the highest quality
 Fair and ethical business practices
 A steadfast dedication to our customers

Today, following our transition in ownership, these same principles remain at the core of everything we do. Now as part of American Amplifier Technologies (AAT), we bring even greater resources, expanded capabilities, and broader product offerings — all while maintaining the traditional SCALA service and quality our customers have trusted for decades.

We are proud of our history and excited for what’s ahead — continuing to serve the broadcast industry with innovation, reliability, and integrity.

Name: RADIO 21
Description:
RADIO 21 wird in Niedersachsen, NRW, Schleswig-Holstein, Bremen und Hamburg auf verschiedenen Frequenzen verbreitet und ist als lokales Programm-Network angelegt. Das bedeutet, dass das Programm stündlich bis zu fünfzehn Mal auseinandergeschaltet wird. So werden regionale Inhalte wie Werbung, Nachrichten und Beiträge je nach Region unterschiedlich ausgestrahlt. Zur Finanzierung der lokalen Programminhalte werden lokale Werbeblöcke gesendet.

In der Altersdefinition besteht die Kern-Zielgruppe aus 30–55-Jährigen.

RADIO 21 ist Teil des Deutschen Städte-Networks, dessen Programm zusammen mit den Partnersendern Rockland Radio und Antenne Sylt in über 30 Ballungsräumen in Niedersachsen, Bremen, Hamburg, Nordrhein-Westfalen und Schleswig-Holstein sowie Rheinland-Pfalz und Teilen Hessens und Baden-Württembergs verbreitet wird. Moderationen und Musik sind synchron. Werbung, lokale und regionale Beiträge sowie der Sendername in Jingles unterscheiden sich voneinander.

In der wöchentlichen Sendung „Menschen der Woche“ sprechen Moderatoren mit Menschen darüber, was sie in den letzten Tagen emotional bewegt hat. Das Format wurde von der Niedersächsische Landesmedienanstalt mit dem Medienpreis 2015 in der Kategorie „Information und Wirtschaft – Hörfunk“ ausgezeichnet.

Das Programm kann seit der Aufschaltung neuer Frequenzen 2012 in weiten Gebieten und vielen Städten von Niedersachsen sowie in Bremen mit eigener Regionalschiene- und Werbung über UKW und Kabel (DVB-C) sowie per Livestream im Internet empfangen werden. Im Bremer/Bremerhavener Raum und in Nordrhein-Westfalen ist das Programm zusätzlich über DAB+ empfangbar. Über eine App für Android und iOS ist RADIO 21 auch auf dem Smartphone und Tablet zu empfangen.

Name: EWTN.TV gGmbH | Katholisches Fernsehen weltweit
Description:
Der Fernsehsender EWTN (Eternal Word Televison Network) wurde 1981 von der Franziskanerklarissin Mutter Angelica in Birmingham (Alabama/USA) gegründet. Heute ist EWTN der weltweit größte katholische Fernsehsender und erreicht mit seinen regional je unterschiedlichen Programmen mehr als 380 Millionen Haushalte in über 150 Ländern auf allen Kontinenten. Zu EWTN gehören u.a. auch katholische Nachrichtagenturen wie CNA, ACI Prensa, CNA Deutsch.

In Deutschland begann die gemeinnützige EWTN.TV gGmbH im Jahr 2000 mit dem Aufbau eines deutschen EWTN-Kanals. Heute sendet EWTN.TV sein umfangreiches Programm rund um die Uhr mit einer Sendelizenz der Landesanstalt für Medien NRW und agiert als katholisches Mediennetzwerk im Verbund mit nationalen und internationalen Partnern. EWTN ist werbefrei, erhält keine Mittel aus Kirchensteuern und ist ausschließlich durch private Spenden finanziert.

Zum Programmangebot gehören regelmäßige Live-Übertragungen aus der Weltkirche mit Papst Franziskus, tägliche Heilige Messen, Sendungen zu Glaubensfragen und Lebenshilfe, Katechesen und Spiritualität, Dokumentarfilme und Nachrichtenformate, sowie Familien- und Kinderprogramme.

EWTN ist digital über den Satelliten Astra und regional im Kabel (in mehr als 21 Millionen TV-Haushalten), als Live-Stream im Internet sowie als App über mobile Endgeräte und gängige Streamingdienste frei zu empfangen.

Name: WNKO/WHTH Radio
Description:
Located in Newark, Ohio we are home to Classic Hits KOOL 101.7- Central Ohio’s Classic Hits station, and Buckeye Country 107.7- your home for the All Time Greatest Country!

Our parent company's history: The name "Runnymede" was chosen as the corporate name for the WNKO / WHTH Radio stations for historical reasons. Runnymede was the site of the signing of the Magna Carta in 1215. Runnymede literally translated, means "voice of the people", which is the attitude at which WNKO and WHTH operate today.

Runnymede Inc. was formed in 1968 by several of Newark's
most distinguished and well-known businessmen. They applied for the
license for a local radio station and was on the air in October of 1970
with WHTH AM. Two years later, they were granted a license for a
3000 watt FM station which became WNKO FM.

Although control of the company has changed many times through the
years, it has always been family owned and still retains local ownership
through the Franks family at this time.

COSA SUONIAMO?
I migliori dischi dall’Hip Hop all’R&B, eventi dal mondo Urban, interviste esclusive, live e DJ set. Su Urban Radio suonano i grandi artisti internazionali: da Snoop Dogg a Eminem, da Fabri Fibra a Sfera Ebbasta, da Jay Z a Notorious B.I.G.

DOVE TRASMETTIAMO?
Le frequenze DAB+ di Urban Radio trasmettono su: Roma e Provincia (oltre 4 milioni di abitanti) Milano e regione Lombardia (oltre 10 milioni di abitanti): città e hinterland di Milano, Monza, Pavia, Lodi, Brescia, Cremona, Bergamo, Varese, Como, Novara.

A CHI COMUNICHIAMO?
Urban Radio è la radio generalista di donne e uomini di età compresa tra i 25 e i 45 anni, residenti su Roma e provincia, a Milano e in tutta la Lombardia. Quelli che sono cresciuti tra gli anni ‘90 e 2000, che oggi rappresentano la classe lavoratrice del nostro Paese.

Description:

Son objectif : mettre cet outil médiatique entre les mains des habitants des quartiers prioritaires de la métropole rennaise. Une radio faite par les habitants, au service des habitants depuis le quartier du Blosne. 

A travers cet outil, notre association souhaite créer du lien entre les habitants pour faciliter le dialogue entre les diverses catégories socio-culturelles d’âge, origine, classe sociale ou religion qui composent nos quartiers. 

La radio ouvre donc ses portes à toutes celles et à tous ceux qui ont une histoire à raconter, des opinions à défendre, ou encore des recettes a partager. Les acteurs de cette radio parlent plusieurs langues, ont plusieurs âges et visages et bien sûr, différences trajectoires de vie.
Une richesse radiophonique sans artifices mais qui met le feu a nos émissions, à retrouver en direct ou en podcast !

Name: Consiliul Audioviziualului
Description:
Potrivit Codului serviciilor media audiovizuale, intrat în vigoare la 1 ianuarie 2019, Consiliul Audiovizualului (CA) este garant al interesului public în domeniul audiovizualului.

Misiunea instituției este să contribuie la dezvoltarea serviciilor media audiovizuale în conformitate cu principiile comunicării audiovizuale prevăzute de Cod, precum și cu normele, standardele și cele mai bune practici internaționale în domeniu. 

Consiliul Audiovizualului este constituit din 7 membri. Şedinţele Consiliului Audiovizualului sînt deliberative cu prezenţa a cel puţin 5 membri, iar deciziile sunt adoptate cu votul a cel puțin 4 membri. 
 
Membrii Consiliului Audiovizualului sunt desemnați prin hotărâre a Parlamentului, pentru un singur mandat de 6 ani. Membrii CA nu reprezintă entitatea care i-a nominalizat și își exercită atribuțiile liberi de influența oricăror alte entități publice sau private. CA este condus de un preşedinte şi de un vicepreşedinte, aleşi prin vot secret de cel puţin 5 membri ai Consiliului. Președintele CA prezintă raportul anual de activitate în şedinţa în plen a Parlamentului.

Name: Jib Guys
Description:
A jimmy jib arm is ideal for any shot including overhead sweeping shots of crowds, musicians, action, exterior/establishing shots, unique angled shots, high or low angle shots, overheads for cooking demonstrations, locked off master shots, etc. You would be amazed how much time and money can be saved on a production by having a jib on set in order to quickly knock out all kinds of shots from all kinds of angles.

Jib Guy’s experienced jib operators and technicians have worked on every type of production – talk show, news, reality, commercial, feature, short film, music video, concert, cooking, etc.

The jimmy jib can be built from 6 to 30 ft in 3 ft increments. Our shortest configuration possible is a 4ft jib/stub arm.

The jib arm is built on a movable dolly which makes re-positioning this crane a snap. Our jib can also be used on track with our track wheels. We also have straight track in 4ft and 8ft lengths that can be added to the package upon request.

The jib can be used indoors or outdoors, and it can be used with essentially any camera and lens configuration.  For inclement weather, we can cover the camera and provide our Spintec Rain Deflector to keep water droplets off the lens. The jib is limitless. Add the best, experienced jib crew from Jib Guy's, and have no limits!

Name: TIDE - Hamburgs Bürger:innensender + Ausbildungskanal
Description:
TIDE ist der gemeinnützige Bürger:innen-Sender und Ausbildungskanal für Hamburg. Seit TIDEs Gründung im Jahr 2004 setzen unser Team und TIDEs Ehrenamtliche unseren Auftrag um, die lokale Vielfalt zu fördern und die Mediennutzung der Zivilgesellschaft zu stärken. Dafür stehen unser qualifiziertes Team sowie professionell ausgestattete Radio- und TV-Studios bereit.

TIDEs Mission ist es, den Bürger:innenjournalismus zu fördern und allen eine Stimme zu geben. Über unsere Kanäle – TIDE.tv, TIDE.radio und unsere Online-Plattformen – ermöglichen wir direkte Beteiligung. TIDE bietet die Bühne für vielfältige, oft zweisprachige Sendungen, die von und für die Menschen in Hamburg gemacht werden. Wir arbeiten eng mit Stadtteilinitiativen und Kooperationspartnern zusammen, um die lokale Perspektive in den Vordergrund zu rücken. 

Als Träger vieler medienpädagogischer Angebote ist TIDE in ganz Hamburg verankert. Wir adressieren Kinder, Jugendliche, Eltern, Lehrkräfte und Erzieher:innen an, um Medienkompetenz zu vermitteln und das Verständnis für digitale Werkzeuge zu schärfen. Ob in Schulen, Jugendhäusern oder anderen gemeinnützigen Einrichtungen – unser Ziel ist es, Wissen und Fähigkeiten zu vermitteln, die eine aktive und informierte Teilnahme an unserer demokratischen Gesellschaft ermöglichen.

Die TIDE.akademie bietet Kurse in Journalismus sowie TV- und Radioproduktion. Wir sind ein Ort für berufliche Bildung und bieten in unserer vielfältigen Technikumgebung Praktika und Ausbildungsplätze an. Unsere Auszubildenden sammeln wertvolle praktische Erfahrungen – auch in redaktioneller Arbeit und in internationalen Projekten, wie unserer Partnerschaft im europäischen Katastrophenschutz.

TIDE ist bundesweit bestens vernetzt und ein regelmäßiger Medienpartner bei Konferenzen und Vorlesungen. Wir pflegen enge Kooperationen mit Hochschulen und anderen wissenschaftlichen Einrichtungen, um stets am Puls der Zeit zu bleiben und zukunftsweisende Medienarbeit zu gestalten.

Nossa missão é conectar pessoas por meio da música e da informação, valorizando a diversidade cultural, promovendo o intercâmbio entre nações e ampliando vozes, marcas e ideias no ambiente digital.

Diferenciais da H7 Rádio Web
Alcance Global: transmissão contínua para milhares de cidades, impactando públicos diversos e qualificados.
Conteúdo Variado e Profissional: programação musical, informativa e educativa, cuidadosamente organizada.
Tecnologia Avançada: disponível em Smart TVs, Alexa Amazon, Web Apps e site próprio, garantindo experiência segura e estável.
Interatividade: presença ativa nas principais redes sociais, aproximando ouvintes, parceiros e anunciantes.
Nossa Programação
Música: curadoria eclética, do instrumental e clássico aos sucessos contemporâneos.
Programas: mais de 19 programas ativos, com temas variados e linguagem acessível.
Podcasts: uma das plataformas mais acessadas nacional e internacionalmente, com 4 players em português, inglês, espanhol e italiano.
Programetes: mais de 60 conteúdos informativos, educativos, esportivos e de entretenimento.
Eventos Especiais: coberturas exclusivas em datas comemorativas como Páscoa e outras ações temáticas.
Para facilitar sua experiência, a H7 disponibiliza a ISA – Assistente Digital, criada para orientar, informar e apresentar de forma clara nossos serviços, regras e oportunidades.
Disponibilizamos 7 serviços estratégicos de divulgação para marcas, empresas e projetos: Blog Publicitário, Vídeo, Slides, Áudios e muito mais. 

 Acesse agora a plataforma H7 Rádio Web, fale com a ISA e descubra TUDO E AGORA!

Name: PortalArgentina
Description:
Título del Programa: "Portal Argentina"

Duración: Más de 2 horas diarias, 2 horas los fines de semana (12 horas de contenido semanal)

Conductores: Romina Fasani y Juanjo Garone

Descripción del Programa:

"Portal Argentina" es un programa de radio que se emite en más de 600 emisoras de todo el país, brindando contenido gratuito a sus audiencias. Con una duración de más de 2 horas diarias y 2 horas adicionales los fines de semana, el programa ofrece un total de 12 horas de contenido semanal. Conducido por los dinámicos Romina Fasani y Juanjo Garone, "Portal Argentina" se dedica a informar y entretener a su audiencia, explorando el mundo del turismo y la cultura en Argentina.

Top 5:  Los referentes de turismo, secretarios de turismo, directores o simplemente vecinos de distintas ciudades del país nos dejan sus 5 lugares imperdibles de cada pueblo o ciudad con su propia voz. 

Historias de Viajeros: Un espacio donde los oyentes pueden compartir sus propias experiencias de viaje por Argentina. Romina y Juanjo leen estas historias al aire, fomentando una comunidad de viajeros y aventureros que comparten su amor por explorar el país.

Entrevistas Exclusivas: Romina y Juanjo entrevistan a figuras destacadas del mundo del turismo y la cultura, incluyendo guías turísticos, chefs, artistas y funcionarios gubernamentales. Estas entrevistas proporcionan una perspectiva única y valiosa sobre las tendencias y desarrollos en el sector turístico.

Agenda del Fin de Semana: Cada viernes, el programa presenta una guía de eventos y actividades culturales que se llevarán a cabo durante el fin de semana en diversas regiones del país.

Vacaciones en un Minuto: Un juego emocionante y popular en todo el país donde los concursantes tienen la oportunidad de ganar un viaje a un destino especial. Los participantes deben responder 10 preguntas en un minuto. Los ganadores disfrutan de unas vacaciones inolvidables, cortesía de "Portal Argentina."

Werner bewijst met Radio 10 dat het anders kan. Anders dan wat men sinds de introduktie van radio in Suriname gewend was.

Voor het eerst in Suriname een geheel nieuw format, gericht op een verwaarloosde, doch interessante doelgroep met een zekere potentiële marktwaarde. Name: Mal y Tarde
Description:
En 2021 cuatro guapos, creativos y talentosos alumnos decidieron fusionar sus mentes en una sola para construir desde cero un ambicioso proyecto: Un podcast sobre los estudiantes de Publicidad y RRPP en Segovia. 

Y tu incrédulo lector dirás, ¿por qué? PUES PORQUE NADIE LO HABIA HECHO ANTES.

Somos la carrera de Publicidad y RRPP más grande de toda España y el 93% de los alumnos que recibe anualmente no son de Segovia. Esto nos convierte prácticamente en un Seneca de cuatro años, ¿y de verdad NADIE iba a hablar de esto?

Pensamos: somos estudiantes en una carrera de comunicación que no esta comunicando para nada la pedazo de experiencia común que estamos viviendo todos los alumnos del grado. Estudiando juntos, avanzando juntos, emborrachándonos juntos, encontrándonos a nosotros mismos, siendo timados por los caseros de la ciudad... y todo lejos de nuestras familias por primera vez.

Esto se merecía un espacio propio y ESTO ES ESE ESPACIO.
