Name: Radio Surabhi
Description:
Radio Surabhi is a thriving Indian radio station that has been operating for the last six years out of Dallas, Texas. Radio Surabhi is committed to creating a platform that celebrates the rich cultural heritage of our community. We broadcast in Telugu, one of the most widely spoken languages among Indians in the United States. We cater to various businesses and age and income groups, making us a vital source of information, entertainment, and community engagement. 

Since our inception, Radio Surabhi has significantly impacted the lives of our listeners through various shows, events, and campaigns. Our station’s broadcasts reach 98k on-air, 823k overall listeners through the App and website, and 130K+ reach on social media with 330k impressions, making us a powerful tool for disseminating information and promoting cultural exchange.

Our mission is to:

Preserve and promote cultural diversity by airing programs that reflect our community's traditions, values, and experiences.

Facilitate cross-cultural dialogue and understanding among our listeners by hosting interactive shows, interviews, and community events.

Support local artists, musicians, and content creators by providing them with a platform to showcase their work and talents.

Address critical issues within our community, such as education, health, and social challenges, through insightful discussions and awareness campaigns.

We amplify independent voices, original music, unscripted moments, and live shows that bend formats and challenge convention.

We are:

	•	A network of real-time thinkers, speakers, hosts, and artists.
	•	A platform for community-powered content and conscious entertainment.

Our core shows include:
	•	TKR Mornings — Music meets movement, ideas meet action.
	•	Operation Riff Royale — Where music goes to battle and fans decide the victor.
	•	The Kindness Revolution — A hilarious and heartfelt look at work, worth, and wild humanity.
	•	Unity 314 Books & Frameworks — Exploring the future of intelligence, identity, and connection.

We’re redefining what it means to broadcast in the 21st century.
Creators own their content. The network lifts them higher.
From Toronto to beyond—this is CCAN Radio.

Name: 91.5 Radyo Üniversite
Description:
Radyo Üniversite 1994 yılının Nisan ayında Selçuk Üniversitesi bünyesinde kurulmuştur. Türkiye'nin İTÜ Radyosu'ndan sonra kurulan ikinci üniversite radyosudur. Radyo Üniversite yayına başladığından beri birçok yerel radyoya hem teknik hem de yayın politikası anlamında örnek olmuştur. Radyo Üniversite’nin en temel amacı, Selçuk Üniversitesi İletişim Fakültesi’nde öğrenim gören öğrencilerin, teorik olarak aldıkları bilgileri pratiğe dönüştürmeleri ve sektörde güçlü bir şekilde yer almalarını sağlamaktır.

Tümüyle eğitim amaçlı kurulan Radyo Üniversite’nin frekansı MHz bandı 91.5’tir. Sloganı Gençliğin Dinamik Sesi olan Radyo Üniversite, Konya'nın en çok dinlenen frekanslarından birisidir. Radyo Üniversite aynı zamanda internet üzerinden de kolaylıkla takip edilebilecek dijital bir platformdur. Bu sayede etki alanı sadece kampüs veya Konya ile sınırlı değildir.

Name: CKUT 90.3 FM
Description:
CKUT is a non-profit, campus-community radio station based at McGill University. CKUT provides alternative music, news and spoken word programming to the city of Montreal, surrounding areas, & around the world 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. Hear us at 90.3 MHz on the FM dial or listen on-line, where we also store archives of every show that hits the airwaves. CKUT is made up of hundreds of volunteers (working with a staff of coordinators), not just to make creative and insightful radio programming, but also to manage the station. The station operates on a non-hierarchical collective management system that includes volunteers in decision-making.

CKUT has been on the FM airwaves since 1987, with roots going back to McGill University's radio club, founded in 1921.

Name: Bharatika
Description:
Bharatika is a digital-first knowledge and storytelling platform that captures the essence of Bharat — in politics, culture, sports, agriculture, and beyond.

The name Bharatika is a fusion of “Bharatiya” (Indian) and “Chronika” (chronicle), reflecting our mission to present authentic, in-depth, and inclusive narratives about India’s evolution — past, present, and future.

From grassroots changemakers to national icons, from rural innovations to cultural traditions, we spotlight the real India — its diversity, strength, and spirit.

 What we cover:
• Indian Politics & Governance
• Rural Development & Agriculture
• Indian Sports & Athletes
• Culture, Heritage & Identity
• Social Impact & Success Stories

 Through short-form content, deep-dive explainers, and thought-provoking reels like #BharatikaBites and #KnowYourBharat, we bring India closer to Indians.

 Follow us to explore the real Bharat.
 Tag us with #Bharatika and join the movement to rediscover India.
.
.
"#Bharatika" is a fusion of "Bharatiya" (meaning Indian) and "Chronika" (derived from the word "chronicle," representing a platform that offers comprehensive coverage). This name embodies the essence of Indian politics, sports, agriculture, and the broader concept of "Indianness." It evokes a sense of patriotism, cultural diversity, and a commitment to providing a holistic view of India's various facets.

Name: Grupo Radar del Bajío

Formamos parte de CORPORACIÓN MEXICANA DE RADIO la cual nace el 9 de Junio de 1962.

Durante más de 50 años, CMR ha desempeñado un papel protagónico en la industria radiofónica; creando y operando emisoras, innovando en áreas tan diversas como programación, ingeniería, administración y mercadotecnia en general, con presencia en 200 ciudades de la república.
Bajo este contexto y ya instalados en el Bajío Mexicano PUBLICIDAD EN MEDIOS DEL BAJÍO S.A. DE C.V. con nombre comercial GRUPO RADAR inicia sus operaciones con la primera y única Radiodifusora de frecuencia Modulada en Celaya el 21 de Marzo de 1986, ahora con domicilio Fiscal en Prolongación Tecnológico 950 B Interior 6 C Barrio de san Pablo Col. Girasoles, Queretaro, Queretaro Mexico.

Crear mejor radio ha sido siempre nuestra filosofía y sigue vigente hoy en todas nuestras áreas, la creación del producto indicado para nuestros radioescuchas y los servicios que brindamos a la comunidad, a nuestros clientes y a nuestro País.

Como desde el primer día, esta empresa se preocupa por mantenerse al paso del progreso, incorporando a sus sistemas operacionales, administrativos y técnicos, los más avanzados procedimientos permitiéndonos ofrecer el mejor servicio a nuestros anunciantes y auditorio.

Name: Big Satsuma Radio
Description:
Big Satsuma Radio is a U.K. based internet radio station that brings you the most creative, innovative and interesting musicians and artists.

We showcase independent, emerging talent alongside your favourite stars and icons, with special features, interviews and exclusive stories. We are ethical, collaborative and true supporters of alternative, new wave, electronic & independent grassroots music from around the world.

Big Satsuma Radio was formed in 2022 by four radio producers, Kurt Sinclair-Hall, Bridget Gray, Stuart Calder and Colin Spencer. Four radio professionals who for many years, have shown passion for supporting and championing independent and unsigned musicians.

Building on experiences gained across the radio industry, this fabulous foursome decided the time was right to move their flagship radio shows and create a new internet station that would encompass their love for independent and unsigned music and also provide a truly ethical platform for artists to get their music heard with interviews, features and special promotions. Other wonderfully talented radio presenters and producers appreciated the concept behind the new station and wanted to come onboard with their own very special shows. Of course we welcomed them with open arms.

Radio Broadcasting: At its core, Southern Stone operates multiple radio stations across several Southern states, each tailored to the local community’s preferences. These stations broadcast a variety of content, including different music genres, talk shows, news, and sports, ensuring there is something for every listener.

Digital Media Services: Adapting to the digital era, Southern Stone has expanded its offerings to include streaming radio content, podcasts, and on-demand services accessible via apps and websites. This digital expansion allows for interactive and targeted advertising opportunities, helping businesses reach their desired audiences more effectively.

Advertising Solutions: Southern Stone provides comprehensive advertising solutions, including spot advertising, sponsored segments, and digital advertisements. These are customized based on in-depth market analysis and listener data to maximize reach and impact.

Event Promotion and Sponsorship: The company is deeply involved in promoting and sponsoring local events such as concerts, festivals, and cultural gatherings, which not only support the local culture but also offer businesses unique marketing opportunities.

Community Engagement: Southern Stone is committed to the communities it serves, regularly participating in and sponsoring charity events and local programs. This community focus strengthens its bond with listeners and enhances its reputation as a dedicated community partner.

Name: Wine Talks with Paul K.  LLC.
Description: You will meet the most inspiring people in the wine and food industries and you will be entertained. There is no swirling or sniffing on this podcast, just emotional talk and inspiring stories. After 35 years of listening to the stories of the great vintners of the world, chefs and celebrities, it is time to tell the very stories. For 35 years, each Tuesday, I would stand in my tasting room and turn over a new winery representative every 15 minutes...and the stories I would hear were inspiring. It seemed perfectly fine to hear the stories, taste the wine and make a purchase decision on behalf of my members...until I realized, I was the only one privy to they tales. Thus, Wine Talks with Paul K was born to give all wine enthusiasts of all levels of appreciation a chance to engage and understand the passion and commitment it takes to produce our stories beverage. Wine has been around 1000's of years and it touches the soul of every generation. Wine Talks is a romp through these fabled stories and tales. You will be inspired, intrigued, entertained and educated.

Name: Jong Juridisch
Description:
Jong Juridisch is een podcast en radioprogramma voor iedereen die werkt in of om het recht. We brengen gesprekken met advocaten, juristen, studenten, trainers, rechters, ondernemers en andere mensen uit de juridische praktijk. Wat hen verbindt, is dat ze nadenken over hun vak én over hoe ze dat vak op een slimme, zorgvuldige en menselijke manier vormgeven.

We praten over juridische keuzes, loopbanen, dilemma’s, fouten, routines, twijfels, tools en overtuigingen. We zijn benieuwd naar hoe mensen denken, werken en leren, en hoe ze omgaan met veranderingen in de maatschappij, technologie en het vak zelf.

In Jong Juridisch hoor je geen gelikte verhalen of vaste formats. Wel hoor je gesprekken met inhoud, aandacht en nieuwsgierigheid. We stellen scherpe vragen, zoeken naar voorbeelden en nemen de tijd om het echt ergens over te hebben. Van AI tot mediation, van de Zuidas tot de sociale advocatuur, van storytelling in cassatie tot mentale rust in de rechtszaal, alles kan langskomen, zolang het maar raakt aan goed juridisch werk.

De toon is helder en toegankelijk. Geen jargon, geen overbodige complexiteit. We spreken op B2-niveau, zodat het voor iedereen te volgen is, van eerstejaars rechtenstudent tot doorgewinterde advocaat. Elk gesprek staat op zichzelf, maar wie vaker luistert, herkent patronen, contrasten en terugkerende thema’s.

Jong Juridisch is er niet om te overtuigen, maar om te laten zien hoe breed, uitdagend en menselijk het juridische vak kan zijn. We maken ruimte voor reflectie, inzicht en ontwikkeling, met een gezonde dosis nuchterheid en vooral heel veel plezier.

Name: New York Public Radio Community Advisory Board
Description:
We are a volunteer-powered independent body of radio lovers supporting the future of public radio in New York.

Our mission: we connect communities to content, listen to those who listen, and advise NYPR on what the listenership is thinking and feeling.

Our goal: to improve the listener experience, and to ensure that station content and strategy are meeting the specialized educational, coverage, and cultural needs of the communities it serves.

Our reach is vast: covering a listening area stretching from the Hudson Valley to Delaware Bay, inclusive of all Five Boroughs, much of Long Island, Rockland & Westchester Counties, and the entire state of New Jersey.

We serve all of New York Public Radio: our remit encompasses all areas of station programming and content, including WNYC, WQXR, NJPR, Gothamist, WNYC Studios, and the Jerome L. Greene Performance Space.

The CAB, as mandated by federal law, exists to provide specific value-added feedback to senior leadership and the NYPR Board of Trustees. We facilitate public fora with the listening public six times per fiscal year, and convey our findings and recommendations to the Board of Trustees. We further our mission by partnering with the station in all areas of community outreach and engagement. We are both a proxy for the listenership, and a conduit to the listening area as a whole.

We are listener volunteers serving for terms of up to six years, representing a diverse group of lifestyles, demographics, communities, boroughs, backgrounds, ages, affinities, and professions. We are equal parts ambassadors, advisors, and strategic partners for the station.

The CAB deliberates independently of station management and New York Public Radio's Board of Trustees, determining its own agenda, recruiting its own members, and electing its own leadership. Our role is strictly advisory. As such, we are not authorized to exercise any control over WNYC and WQXR's daily management or operations.

Description: We are a Premium HD Digital Satellite Television based in Bangladesh and transmitted worldwide through by Bangabandhu Satellite launched by our Government in 2018. We seek out and employ the best people in the television industry in Bangladesh and believe in paying top dollar for top talent. Our motto is "Nation First" and embodies our love of our motherland and all things Bangladeshi. While our focus remains primarily on our nation, we also proudly acknowledge and serve the millions of first- and second-generation Bangladeshis living in all corners of the globe. It is through much of their hard work in the fields of science and technology that allows Bangladesh to be recognised today as the emerging global economy it was born to be. Founded in late 2022, we plan to go into test transmission and broadcast by the end of this year and hope to provide cutting-edge coverage, reportage, analysis and commentary on our upcoming general elections. This is a once-in-five years chance for us to enter the already crowded satellite television market in Bangladesh and make both a valuable contribution and impact. We are a politically neutral channel and neither aligned with the interests of any political parties or business lobbies. We value free speech and allow our employees and associates to exercise their democratic rights without any form of bias.

Name: Los Megaexitos
Description:
Los Megaexitos es una radio de tipo musical de grandes éxitos. Con un exquisito catálogo musical hecho con todo esmero e interés. Lleva en desarrollo desde el año 2009 y activa en las plataformas mas importantes a nivel internacional. Desde sus inicios ha servido como experimentación en radio online, y con el tiempo se ha ido consolidando como un solido medio tanto por ondas como online. 
La radio online cada día gana interés entre los oyentes de la red, que no paran de crecer. Y lejos de competir con plataformas tipo spotify donde cada oyente se programa su selección musical o busca selecciones de otros usuarios, se convierte en un medio renovado donde la selección musical está programada por expertos y sólo ha de dejarse envolver por su magia y dejarse llevar.
Entre el inmenso mar de emisoras donde la mayoría son super especializadas, en Los Megaexitos se ha apostado por adaptar la radio musical de autor a los tiempos actuales. Así y tras muchas pruebas y experimentaciones (no dejamos de experimentar), se ha creado una nueva fórmula disruptiva, con canciones de calidad de todos los tiempos y estilos.
Vamos más allá y hemos creado una fórmula musical única única y diferente, con estilo propio que ha cautivado a miles de oyentes fieles a nuestro estilo propio.

Name: ReCARETV
Description:
We are a 3-year AHRC-funded project investigating reality television, working practices, and duty of care. 
Reality TV is a significant and highly controversial site of media production that has rapidly expanded over the last two decades with an increasing share of the UK's £1.48bn global TV export market. High profile concerns around mental health risks have led to changes to Ofcom's Broadcasting Code around improved welfare for participants, whilst broadcasters increasingly understand a need for the continued evolution of care practices across the sector. 
We will be interviewing policy makers, broadcasters, production crew and participants to investigate how care is understood and experienced across reality television.

Viochannel, Viora Production bünyesinde kurulan ve belgesel, röportaj, kısa film ve ilham veren içeriklere odaklanan yenilikçi bir dijital yayın kanalıdır. Hikâye anlatımında derinliği, görsel kalitede profesyonelliği ve izleyiciyle bağ kurmada samimiyeti esas alıyoruz.

Misyonumuz
	•	Gerçek hikâyeleri görünür kılmak: İş dünyasından sanata, girişimcilikten toplumsal meselelere kadar her alanda ilham veren yaşam öykülerini ekranlara taşımak.
	•	İçeriğe değer katmak: Her projede özgün anlatım dili ve sinematografik bakış açısıyla fark yaratmak.
	•	Sosyal etki oluşturmak: Röportaj ve belgesellerimizle izleyiciye yeni perspektifler kazandırmak.

Viochannel İçerik Alanları
	•	Belgeseller: Hayatın gerçek yüzünü tüm detaylarıyla ortaya koyuyoruz.
	•	Kısa Filmler: Az zamanda büyük duygular yaratan özgün yapımlar.
	•	Röportaj Serileri: İş dünyasının liderleri, girişimciler ve ilham veren insanların hikâyeleri.
	•	Sektörel Başarı Hikâyeleri: Girişimcilik yolculukları ve profesyonel deneyimlerin perde arkası.

Neden Viochannel?

Viochannel, yalnızca bir yayın platformu değil, gerçeğin ve hayalin kesiştiği bir hikâye anlatım merkezi. İş dünyası röportajlarından toplumsal belgesellere, sanatın farklı yüzlerinden kariyer yolculuklarına kadar geniş bir yelpazede “anlamlı içerik üretimi” misyonunu taşıyoruz.

Name: The Marshad Technology Group
Description:
Neal Marshad is the production company founded by Neal Marshad. Neal is an American producer, Emmy Award–winning director, and cinematographer whose career spans more than five decades. A longtime collaborator with Saturday Night Live, he produced and photographed many iconic SNL short films, including “Love is a Dream” and “Java Junkie,” both of which have aired repeatedly across SNL broadcasts for decades. Marshad has been nominated for and won multiple Primetime and Creative Emmy Awards for his producing and cinematography work for CBS and NBC, much of it tied to SNL. His career also spans PBS documentaries and pioneering digital media ventures. In 1996, Marshad founded The Marshad Technology Group, creating early digital and streaming platforms for major brands. In 2023, Marshad began developing and writing Tribeca Co-op, a scripted murder-mystery television series with producers G. Mac Brown and Jim Signorelli, and series pilot co-writer Dash Finley.

Emmy award and Webby award recipient The Marshad Technology Group provides digital agency and broadcast television production services, 

The Marshad Technology Group is both a Google Partner and a Microsoft Bing Partner.

Name: Aventurier de la vie
Description:
Toute ta vie tu seras influencé.

Éducation, culture, traditions, phénomènes de mode, croyances limitantes, barrières mentales, peurs, entourage, médias…

Un mot pour résumer tout cela: le conditionnement.

Ce conditionnement agit comme une sorte de flou pour savoir qui tu es vraiment, ce que tu aimes, ce à quoi tu aspires, les personnes avec qui tu as envie d’être etc.

Dans un monde où le système s’enrichit sur notre niveau de distraction, il devient de plus en plus dur de savoir qui l’on est vraiment.

Et lorsqu’on aperçoit de loin la personne que l’on rêverait d’être, elle nous fait peur.

Trop différent, impossible, trop vieux, trop jeune, pas responsable, dangereux.

Malgré les peurs, les insécurités et la douleur, être soi-même est l’unique chemin pour vivre une vie pleinement épanouie.

Un seul mot pour être soi-même: courage.

Je les appelle les aventuriers de la vie.

Ils ne sont pas les plus connus, pas les plus riches.

Mais ce sont ceux qui m’inspirent le plus.

Les aventuriers de la vie sont mes héros et je m’offre la chance de les rencontrer et de les interviewer sur ce podcast. En espérant qu’ils t’inspirent aussi.

Belle aventure à toi.

Name: Radio Cenzura
Description:
Witaj w Radiu Cenzura! 

Jesteśmy miejscem, gdzie prawda jest priorytetem i gdzie swoboda słowa kwitnie bez ograniczeń. Naszym celem jest dostarczanie audycji, które otwarcie i bez cenzury poruszają tematy ważne dla społeczeństwa, kultury i życia codziennego.

W Radiu Cenzura wierzymy, że ludzie zasługują na pełną informację i różnorodność perspektyw. Nasze programy nie boją się dotykać kontrowersyjnych tematów, analizować wydarzeń społecznych i kulturalnych oraz przeprowadzać odważne wywiady z osobami, które mają coś istotnego do powiedzenia.

Naszym celem jest inspirować ludzi do myślenia krytycznie, rozbudzać debatę i tworzyć świadomych obywateli.

Przyłącz się do naszej społeczności,. Tutaj nie ma tabu – wchodzimy w obszary, których inni unikają. Witamy Cię w Radiu Cenzura, gdzie słowo ma moc, a prawda brzmi bez filtrowania.  

#RadioCenzura  #BezCenzury #Autentyczność

Name: Surf Roots TV & Radio
Description:
SURF ROOTS TV is a 24 Hour Reggae Party! Featuring music videos, live performances, interviews & culture. It's a free channel streaming on Roku, Amazon Fire TV, Apple TV, iPhone & Android. Now with On Demand playlists. 

SURF ROOTS RADIO has been the #1 Reggae-Rock station online for 12 years straight. It's a free App streaming on iPhone & Android with over 225,000 app downloads to date. Playing in surf shops, bars, restaurants, parties, at the beach... 

HISTORY - Surf Roots began in 2005. It started when Body Glove approached Resin Music (West Coast's premier Reggae label since '99) to produce a benefit CD for the USA Surf Team, our top juniors. The CD was sold exclusively on surf shop countertops and featured Slightly Stoopid, Pepper, Damian Marley & more. Then came Surf Roots Vol 2, and a series of CD release parties. That turned into the Surf Roots Tour, which ran all over the west coast for five summers featuring bands such as Common Sense, Ballyhoo, B Foundation, Dirty Heads, Sashamon, Tribal Seeds, Anuhea, The Green & more. Then in 2010 came the Surf Roots Radio app, the first ever 24-hour Reggae-Rock station. It quickly became the #1 Reggae station online (according to iTunes Radio) and created a new genre. In 2017 the brand expanded and built a Roku app, creating Surf Roots TV.  

THANK YOU to all the people who have worked so hard with the Surf Roots team over the years! Tim Gray, Dave Resin, Anthony Wells, Paul Laamann, Natalie Bright, Marie Flores, Josh Dugally, Kaleo Wassman, Britt Rafuson, Casey Sullivan, Kat Hall, Ilka De Leon, Brenna Stoyanovich, Don & Wendy, Candice Lee, Alex Curry, Katie Jo Cassidy, Adnan & Megan, Quie Anthony, Jordyn Rolling, Chelsea Landeros, Heron Stames, Syrus Yarbrough, Cindi Arrata, Jenn Armstrong, Abbie Haan, Gary Strahle & more we love and appreciate you!!! And our partners Silverback, Ineffable, LAW, Easy Star, VP, California Roots, Aniview & more thank you!! 

Surf Roots is owned and operated by Resin Music, LLC

Name: Luid(t) Je Weekend In
Description:
Het gezellige live programma op de vrijdagavond. In een ongedwongen sfeer bespreken de dj’s de afgelopen week met elkaar, de luisteraars en de gasten. Het is te vergelijken met een kroeg waar zij met z’n allen staan te kletsen onder het genot van een drankje en een hapje. Dit alles natuurlijk ondersteunt door muziek uit alle genres. Naast de, speciaal voor de show, geselecteerde muziek zijn er een aantal onderdelen in de show die een specifieke muziekselectie vereisen. Zo kun je denken aan: de ‘Lekker Live Klassieker’, een live opgenomen nummer gekozen door de volgers op Facebook of een plaat uit de kast van ‘Vinylofiel’, afgespeeld vanaf de pick-up en onderbouwt met een goed verhaal. Nog een voorbeeld is ‘Neerlands beste’, muziek van Nederlandse bodem.  

Dit muzieknummer hoeft geen Nederlandse taal te bevatten, maar natuurlijk wel van een Nederlandse artiest(e) te zijn. Naast de sterke verhalen aan de digitale bar proberen de dj’s de luisteraar ook te voorzien in het lokale nieuws. Ze nemen de afgelopen week door en vinden het heerlijk om daarin ook hun eigen mening te ventileren. Dit is vaak een unieke gelegenheid om te bellen met iemand die in het nieuws was of binnenkort in het nieuws komt. Er was eens iemand die over dit radioprogramma riep: “een sociaal luchtig programma met als aorta van de show een gezellige lach!”

Name: Oh For Pod's Sake
Description:
Welcome to Oh for Pod’s Sake—a podcast where three friends tackle the tough stuff one conversation at a time. We’re here to figure things out, not preach or pretend to have all the answers.

From Pennsylvania to Texas to California, we come together to explore the everyday issues Americans care about most—with curiosity, honesty, and a sense of humor—no spin—just thoughtful dialogue that digs deeper than the headlines.

We’re lifelong learners and former insiders from the world of government and media. Our experiences brought us together under pressure, and now, our friendship fuels wide-ranging conversations that meet listeners where they are. Whether it’s public policy, personal stories, or culture, we aim to grow and learn right alongside our audience.

This isn’t about being political. It’s about being human.

We talk through complexity, tackle serious topics head-on, and stay grounded in shared values—not sides. Each week, we’ll explore what’s happening around us, why it matters, and how we make sense of it together.

New episodes drop every Wednesday.
Behind-the-scenes thoughts + extras all week long.

So, for pod’s sake—let’s get into it.

Name: Mineurs, sujet Majeur
Description:
Émission de radio militante de soutien à l'enfance.

"L’avenir se construit avec eux. Élever leur voix aujourd’hui pour un monde plus juste demain"

Mineurs, sujet majeur » est une émission de radio/podcast qui affirme avec conviction que l’avenir se construit avec nos mineurs. Parce qu’écouter, accompagner et protéger les enfants n’est pas seulement un devoir moral mais une nécessité collective, cette émission donne la parole à celles et ceux qui vivent, défendent et questionnent les réalités de l’enfance aujourd’hui. À travers des témoignages, des analyses et des regards experts, elle met en lumière les injustices qui pèsent encore trop souvent sur les plus jeunes et offre des pistes pour faire grandir leurs droits dans le respect, la dignité et l’espérance.

Animée par une volonté profonde de bâtir un monde meilleur avec les enfants comme partenaires, « Mineurs, sujet majeur » porte haut les voix de celles et ceux qui s’engagent au quotidien pour améliorer leurs conditions de vie et leurs perspectives d’avenir. Nous sommes fiers d’avoir comme marraine Sarah El Haïry, Haute-Commissaire à l’Enfance et figure engagée pour la protection et l’accompagnement des jeunes, qui nous inspire par son engagement à faire entendre la voix des mineurs et à faire progresser leurs droits dans la société.

Que ce soient des athlètes de haut niveau, des anciennes gloires du sport, des jeunes pousses prometteuses, des entraîneurs chevronnés ou encore des mentors inspirants, chaque épisode de notre podcast est une plongée profonde dans leur parcours. 

 Mais Paroles d'Athlètes va au-delà de la simple narration. Il se veut un espace où les acteurs du sport peuvent librement exprimer leurs opinions, leurs frustrations et leurs suggestions sur les améliorations à apporter dans la gestion des disciplines sportives. Nous croyons que le monde du sport mérite une plateforme où les voix des sportifs et des professionnels peuvent être entendues de manière plus nuancée.

 Rejoignez-nous pour une exploration captivante du monde sportif, des histoires humaines inspirantes et des conversations éclairantes. Paroles d'Athlètes vous promet des moments de réflexion, d'inspiration et de compréhension plus profonde du sport que vous aimez.

 Abonnez-vous et suivez-nous pour ne manquer aucun épisode !

Name: ערוץ כנסת 99 - Knesset Channel
Description:
ערוץ כנסת מהווה את הבית של צרכני האקטואליה הפרלמנטרית והפוליטית בישראל, ושידוריו מופקים מאז שנת 2018 על ידי חברת "ערוץ 10 כנסת ישראל בע"מ", מקבוצת RGE, בהתאם לרישיון שהוענק לה ל-10 שנים.

הערוץ מסקר את עבודת הכנסת השוטפת באמצעות, העברת שידורים חיים מדיוני מליאת הכנסת וכל ועדות הכנסת.
בנוסף לכך, הערוץ מפיק ומשדר מגוון תוכניות אקטואליה, חדשות, מגזינים, הפקות תעודה, פודקאסטים ותכנים נוספים בהיקף של עשרות שעות שידור חדשות מדי שבוע.
הפקות התעודה של הערוץ עוסקות בהיסטוריה של הפוליטיקה הישראלית ובוחנות את יחסי הגומלין שבין הפוליטיקה לחברה ולתרבות הישראלית.
 שידורי הערוץ עוסקים בליבת העבודה הפרלמנטרית על מגוון היבטיה, ובכך מבטיחים את שקיפות עבודת הכנסת, מתן ביטוי וחיזוק לערכי הדמוקרטיה והטמעת מודעות אזרחית לחשיבות הכנסת כבית המחוקקים של המדינה ומקומה בציבוריות הישראלית.
 
הערוץ מחויב לסיקור וייצוג מאוזנים והוגנים של כל קצות הקשת הפוליטית, תוך נאמנות לאמת העובדתית, לטובת הנגשת הכנסת ועבודתה לציבור.
 
הערוץ משודר באפיק 99 בכל פלטפורמות השידור וכן בהפצה פתוחה בעידן פלוס ובלוויין.
 
לערוץ פעילות נרחבת גם בדיגיטל באמצעות אתר הערוץ ואפליקציה ייעודית המאפשרים, בין היתר, צפיה בשידורי הערוץ וגישה לתכני הערוץ במתכונת VOD. בנוסף הערוץ פועל ברשתות החברתיות ופלטפורמות השמע עם קהל של כ-680,000 עוקבים בטוויטר, פייסבוק, אינסטגרם, יוטיוב, טיקטוק, טלגרם ווטסאפ.

Name: Maryud 103 FM
Description:
Maryud 103 FM | Maryud Media East Africa (MMEA)

Maryud 103 FM is a cross-platform Sudanese media outlet originally based in Khartoum, now operating as Maryud Media East Africa (MMEA) from Nairobi.
We specialize in culturally rooted, socially driven content; broadcasting resilience, countering disinformation, and fostering inclusive narratives through radio, digital media, and community-centered productions.

Maryud incubates creative formats across audio and visual content, including vertical news reels, testimonial series, and curated music programs. We document cultural memory, promote dialogue between communities, and highlight alternative voices, especially in times of conflict and displacement.

Since the collapse of FM broadcasting in Sudan, Maryud has transitioned into a digital-first platform—producing flagship content such as Mojiz Alneel, AEL English Time, and upcoming initiatives, such as NARRATE.

Our mission is to uphold truth, amplify marginalized narratives, and reimagine what media can mean in a post-war Sudanese and regional context.

Access Community Radio Incorporated, which broadcasts as Planet FM, doesn't make radio programmes.  We provide the facilities, advice, training and technical support needed for community groups and individuals to make their own radio programmes.

Name: VoiceOfMississauga
Description:
With Mississauga accounting for over 50% of newcomers in the Peel Region, it is imperative for the city to foster inclusivity, accountability, and representation.
At Voice Of Mississauga, our vision is simple yet powerful - to provide a platform for all residents, especially immigrants, to speak up, be heard, and take pride in their civic responsibilities. The dire need to address the significantly lower turnout in voting across council, federal, and other elections has never been more pressing. By bringing attention to these issues, we aim to hold representatives accountable and encourage active participation in shaping our city's future.
Celebrating the success stories of immigrants who have made Mississauga their permanent home is at the heart of our mission. We believe in providing a voice to those whose stories deserve to be shared, inspiring others within the community, and fostering a sense of belonging and unity amongst residents.
“Voice Of Mississauga is more than just an initiative; it’s a movement towards a more inclusive and empowered community. We believe that every individual, regardless of their background, deserves to have a say in shaping the future of our city,”

Name: The Rush With Travis and Ross
Description:
“The Rush” is a lively morning radio show that starts with sports and seamlessly transitions into discussions about entertainment, science, life, and even conspiracy theories. Travis Justice and Ross Peterson have been broadcasting together for over a decade. Their chemistry is undeniable, but their dynamic feels more like two seasoned farmers at a coffee shop, casually solving the world’s problems every morning.

This isn’t your typical radio show. Instead of tuning in on AM or FM, you’ll find “The Rush” streaming globally at www.therushradio.com. Embracing the digital age, the show thrives on its interactive, live, and on-demand format, airing every Monday through Friday from 6:00-8:00 AM Central Time.

DYNAMIC, FUN, REFRESHING, HIGH ENERGY and INNOVATIVE are the hallmarks of our programming format. We are a STATE OF THE ART radio station with approximately 98% coverage of Jamaica on 103.1, 103.3, 103.5, 103.7 and 103.9 Frequency Modulation. Our reach also extends internationally through our website and social media networks; we reach our target audience, whether they are at work or “play”.

We introduced Jamaica to the first 90 second cutting edge Info Cast, every Hour on the Hour, 24 hours per day, changing the way news is delivered on Jamaican radio.

Zip 103 FM’s announcers are young, young at heart and vibrant – in tune to the needs of our target audience. Our core target audience ranges between 13 – 35 years old with a wide peripheral audience extending to all who love to party and maintain the high energy – day or night. Our half-hour music format allows us to maintain an uninterrupted party vibe, at the same time informing our listeners in a quick, efficient manner coinciding with the lifestyle of the individual who’s always “on the go”.

We are dedicated to serving our listeners and our advertisers, focusing on partnering with brands of similar targets to optimize on all our returns, while providing intense listener satisfaction.
We’d love for you to be Ziplocked for this refreshing “Zipsperience”.

Name: Radio Bukalanga
Description:
Radio Bukalanga is a licensed non-profit community radio station committed to the full participation of the BaKalanga community in Plumtree, Bulilima and Mangwe districts in Matabeleland South of Zimbabwe. It is also the first ever community radio station for BaKalanga. We seek to engage with the local community to provide historical, social, educational, cultural, informative and entertaining content that inspires and connects our community as a whole.
The radio station exists primarily to serve the BaKalanga community and to ensure that community voices are amplified. Radio Bukalanga was established with the main aim of supporting and promoting the social development of the communities within license areas. It is not of commercial concern and does not have profit as one of its strategic objectives. Instead, the radio station will work tirelessly to ensure its own sustainability by providing relevant and popular content that meets the expectations of its stakeholders and consumers as well as serve as an anchor for community development.

Spectrum

Each frequency covers a 40 KM Radius.

Its dedication to excellence is pursued every day by members of its 19 chapters across the country.

The Michigan Chapter was charted by the National Academy in 1978 as the Detroit chapter and Peter Kiezer was the first President. In 1989 the chapter was expanded to include the entire state of Michigan.

Name: CSN Radio
Description:
CSN International was a dream that became a reality wrought from the dedicated of one man with a God-given vision to serve fellow Christians and reach those still in darkness. As this vision became a reality, CSN was born and God’s Word started playing through the airways. Since that time, CSN has grown through the financial support of our listeners and the blessings of God.

Paul Wrote in Romans 12:2, “And be not conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind, that you may prove what is good, and acceptable and perfect will of God.” In this era of mass media, the danger of being drawn in by earthly desires is equally strong. As in Paul’s day we too are living in the world, Satan’s domain. It is a challenge not to allow ourselves to be influenced by the secular teachings around us. What was once a sanctuary from the world–our homes–have come under attack as the enemy uses technology to infiltrate them with destructive ideas, images and words.

Anti-Christian values are all around us in the media, online, in entertainment, and plastered on billboards and bumper stickers. Tolerance in the mantra of those who would abolish a Christian’s right to speak freely on Biblical teachings. Unfortunately, tolerance is reserved for their view, and not for Gods. Jesus’s teachings are desperately needed in our society now more than ever. The very foundation of our Christian values have come under attack by those who oppose the moral teachings of the Bible.

Our mission is the feeding of God’s sheep as instructed in His Holy Word. Our aim is to follow these instructions by broadcasting Biblical teaching and anointed Praise and Worship Music 24 hours a day to communities throughout the United States and the World. Jesus said we become strong by the Word of God abiding in us, and our desire is you will find this ministry to be a point of spiritual growth, maturity, and encouragement.

Name: Radio Alhara
Description:
Radio Alhara is a communal digital radio station that was initiated at the
beginning of the pandemic in March 2020.  Alhara” in Arabic means the
neighborhood. A community radio station that is trying to explore
answers about the way we use spaces.

A digital platform that aims to spatially recreate a neighborhood
through the sound of communities which organically came together from
all around the world to form a radio with over 185 monthly residents,

not-for-profit platform.

A collective questioning the format of cultural institutions and the way
they’ve been operating.

Name: RX Radio SA
Description:
RX Radio is a unique award-winning radio station that is by and for children, based at the Red Cross War Memorial Children’s Hospital in Cape Town. We exist to empower South African children with voice and agency so they can exercise influence within the community and the issues facing them. We have 
trained 135 Child and Young Reporters aged 4 to 18, at Red Cross Children's Hospital, Paarl Hospital and Brooklyn Chest Hospital. We are also one of the first radio stations in the world to have children broadcasting from within a hospital.

The RX Radio Team, volunteers and former reporters work behind the scenes to train, coordinate, and support the reporters – but the children are always behind the microphones and are active participants in the production. They design their own shows, choose the music, invite guests, write interview questions, and even plan fundraising events!

RX Radio broadcasts 24/7, LIVE and Pre-recorded programmes (including shows, music, podcasts, and radio diaries). The station transmits audio and images through the hospital’s internal television system to all wards and public spaces in the hospital. We also live stream the same content on our website and app, and frequently update our social media (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram). Magazine -format shows consist of music, interviews, stories, news, weather, and traffic updates. To become an RX Radio reporter, children first complete basic training: a week of workshops about important life skills (e.g. listening, storytelling), radio reporting and production skills. At the end of the week, children produce a five-minute audio-visual “radio diary” where they tell a story of their choice, and many narrate their experience in hospital. After basic training, they have the choice to become an official RX Radio 
reporter. They then can participate in on-going training: workshops led by staff and guest facilitators from a variety of fields.

Name: Xoilac TV
Description:
Hãy đến với trực tiếp bóng đá Xoilac TV - Cánh cửa mở ra thế giới giải trí bóng đá sống động hấp dẫn nhất mà bạn không thể bỏ lỡ lúc này!
Xôi Lạc TV là trang web hàng đầu về tructiepbongda tại Việt Nam, nơi bạn có thể xem trực tiếp bóng đá với chất lượng cao. Ngoài việc cung cấp dịch vụ trực tuyến chất lượng, Xôi Lạc TV còn cung cấp thông tin bóng đá hữu ích hàng ngày.

Trong số các trang web phát sóng bóng đá trực tiếp hiện nay tại Việt Nam, Xôi Lạc TV được đánh giá cao và là lựa chọn hàng đầu của nhiều người. Với danh tiếng đã được khẳng định trên thị trường phát sóng trực tiếp bóng đá từ lâu đến nay.

Xôi Lạc Live là tên không còn xa lạ đối với những người thường xuyên theo dõi bóng đá trực tuyến. Trang web này phát sóng tất cả các giải đấu lớn trên thế giới cũng như trong nước và khu vực, đáp ứng đầy đủ nhu cầu của người xem. Với Xôi Lạc TV, bạn có thể dễ dàng tìm kiếm và xem trực tiếp trận đấu mà bạn yêu thích, mà hoàn toàn miễn phí.

Hơn nữa, Xôi Lạc TV đầu tư rất nhiều tiền vào công nghệ trực tiếp bóng đá hiện đại nhất. Điều này đảm bảo tất cả các trận đấu được phát sóng đều có chất lượng cực kỳ cao, từ hình ảnh, âm thanh đến kích thước màn hình.

Xoi Lac TV sử dụng đường truyền hiện đại, giúp đảm bảo tốc độ trận đấu diễn ra một cách ổn định và mượt mà nhất. Ngoài tên gọi phổ biến là Xoilac TV, người dùng cũng biết đến trang web này với nhiều tên khác. Khi xem trận đấu bóng đá tại Xôi Lạc TV, bạn hầu như không gặp phải tình trạng giật lag hay đường truyền kém.

Trang web còn có một đội ngũ BLV chuyên nghiệp và đông đảo. XoiLac Live đã bỏ ra rất nhiều công sức và tiền bạc để tuyển chọn đội ngũ này. Các BLV này sẽ tham gia bình luận toàn bộ các giải bóng đá lớn được phát sóng, mang đến trải nghiệm xem trực tiếp bóng đá sống động và cuốn hút.

Hơn nữa, khi xem bóng đá trực tiếp trên Xôi Lạc TV, bạn sẽ ít gặp quảng cáo xuất hiện. Trang web luôn đặt trải nghiệm người xem lên hàng đầu và không làm phiền người xem suốt trận đấu.

Name: Independent Broadcasters of Ireland (IBI)
Description:
IBI is the representative organisation for Ireland's independent commercial radio stations.  The mission of the IBI is to promote a strong and vibrant radio sector which reflects the preferences and needs of the listening public. 

The IBI also lobbies on behalf of the radio listeners of Ireland and constantly seeks to ensure that the quality of programming remains extremely high. This includes regular contributions to industry consultations and forums on issues ranging from programming to advertising and strategy.

The IBI aims to provide a distinct and coherent national voice in the ongoing campaign for competitive equality across the broadcasting sector.

Independent broadcasting is intertwined in the life of every community in the country. 70% of the population tune into our stations on a daily basis. This translates into weekday figures of in excess of 2.5 million listeners. With more than 1,200 people employed in the sector, independent broadcasters make a significant economic, social and cultural contribution to the Irish economy.

Name: Creative Moves: Left Career, Right Path
Description:
CREATIVE MOVES: LEFT CAREER, RIGHT PATH is a podcast exploring career pivots and unexpected second, third or even fourth, acts. Each episode features a conversation with someone who made their mark in their chosen profession, before stepping away to pursue something entirely different.  These are stories of reinvention, risk and reward.

We start by diving in to what drove their initial success, hearing about the professional highs and personal challenges of their first career, to the moment they realised it was time for a change, and how they made the transition into their next role.

Whether you’re starting out and wondering how to get your ideal job, or you’ve felt the pull of a new direction and wondered what it might involve to take the first step, we hope you’ll be inspired by the conversations we have, as we hear about the creative moves each guest made in their career that led them to the path they’re on.

OPus c'est aussi des chroniques. Le tout agrémenté d'une programmation musicale POP/Rock et Chanson Française avec une rotation maitrisée des titres. La discothèque d'OPus comprends plus de 6 000 titres.

Our purpose is to promote the general education of the public by offering television, radio, and other telecommunications programs and services that inform, inspire, and entertain, so that persons of all ages, origins, and beliefs may be encouraged, in an atmosphere of artistic freedom, to learn and appreciate the history, the sciences, the humanities, the fine arts, the practical arts, the music, the politics, the economics, and other significant aspects of the world they live in, and thereby to enrich and improve their lives.

Kun intohimo ja visio kohtaavat, syntyy jotain maagista. Tämä on tarinamme ytimessä. Into Productions ei ole vain yrityksen nimi; se on manifestimme, lupauksemme ja se, mikä meitä ohjaa joka päivä. Syntyneenä puhtaasta innostuksesta, me uskomme siihen, että kun teet jotain sydämestäsi, tulokset puhuvat puolestaan.

Olemme ylpeitä siitä, että voimme sanoa innostuksen olevan yrityksemme sydämessä. Se ei ole vain sana meille; se on elämäntapamme. Se on se voima, joka saa meidät heräämään aamulla, innovoimaan, luomaan ja kasvamaan.

Ja nyt, innostuksemme on ohjannut meidät uuteen ja jännittävään suuntaan. Olemme iloisia voidessamme ilmoittaa, että tavoitteenamme on aloittaa oma webradio kanava vielä tänä vuonna! Tämä on askel kohti uusia mahdollisuuksia, uusia yleisöjä ja uusia tapoja yhdistää ihmisiä musiikin ja tarinoiden kautta.

Liity mukaan matkallemme, kun teemme intohimostamme todellisuutta. "Into Productions" – missä innostus kohtaa mahdollisuuden.

Name: Fédération Française des Radios Chrétiennes
Description:
Créée en 1984, la FFRC (Fédération Française des Radios Chrétiennes) est une association loi 1901 qui regroupe aujourd’hui 80 radios chrétiennes associatives émettant en France.

La Fédération représente les radios adhérentes auprès des différentes instances nationales : Ministère de la Culture, DGMIC, Conseil Supérieur de l’Audiovisuel, Commission mixte paritaire de la radiodiffusion, Fonds de Soutien à l’Expression Radiophonique, SACEM, SPRE, AFDAS,…

La FFRC soutient ses radios adhérentes en les informant des actualités les concernant, en leur proposant des formations décentralisées dans les régions, en les aidant dans la rédaction des dossiers à élaborer chaque année, en réalisant un sondage national tous les deux ans et en accompagnant les radios dans la souscription à un sondage d’audience tous les ans.

La FFRC organise chaque année son congrès annuel et son Assemblée Générale en février à Paris. La Fédération organise une journée nationale en octobre sur les questions sociales.

Les radios de la FFRC adhèrent à la CNRA (Confédération Nationale des Radios Associatives), confédération dont la FFRC fait partie des membres fondateurs.

Dans le paysage audiovisuel français, les radios de la F.F.R.C. cherchent à donner à entendre tout ce qui contribue à la réalisation d’une société favorable à l’épanouissement personnel et social de l’homme.

Les radios de la F.F.R.C., d’inspiration chrétienne, généralistes et de proximité s’attachent en particulier à :

– Promouvoir le respect des droits de l’homme et la solidarité entre les personnes et les peuples

– Favoriser les échanges interculturels et inter-religieux

– Sensibiliser les auditeurs notamment dans les domaines de caractère culturel, social, familial, humanitaire et tout ce qui favorise la communication sociale de proximité.

24 hours Radio station and is available to be heard any time of the day. 

As per current statistics there are 19,595 unique listeners on the Acharya 90 App with hundreds of people downloading the app each day. The average listening hours per month come to 1240 hours and a cloud front usage of 33 GB. The radio is not only heard in Mumbai and Maharashtra but also USA, Srilanka, Philippines, Reunion Islands and Ukraine having wide geographical reach. 

Many Interns at Acharya 90 FM, grow to gain expertise in the Art of Radio Jockeying, Sound Management and Radio Marketing with our in-house internship program. Acharya 90 FM continues to make a huge difference in lives of many with its exclusive content that actively caters to transform the community at large.
 
Acharya 90 FM streams 24/7 and is gaining immense popularity.

Name: TPV Records | Broadcasts from the Outpost
Description:
TPV Records is an independent UK-based radio station broadcasting new and underground music from around the world.

We work across all genres. Ambient, hip hop, jazz, dub, folk, experimental electronics, soul, spoken word, leftfield pop and everything in between and with a focus on sound that sits outside the commercial mainstream.

Some artists are unsigned. Others release through respected underground imprints like Warp, Ghost Box or Erased Tapes. What matters is the spirit, not the scale.

Founded on the principle of creative freedom, TPV is a space for DJs, producers, poets, storytellers and collectors to share what moves them. Without algorithm pressure, commercial targets or gatekeeping.

We host scheduled shows from artists around the world, with a platform designed to spotlight both seasoned selectors and emerging voices.

No big money. No fake hype. Just sound.

 TPV Records provides:
	
•	A UK-based radio platform for independent and underground artists
•	A growing archive of genre-spanning broadcasts
•	A site that blends audio, visuals and community input
•	Support for small and mid-level broadcasters and curators
•	Opportunities for new contributors and guest shows

Broadcasts from the Outpost

Streaming online | Recorded worldwide | Broadcast live in the UK

Name: Talking to the Top
Description:
Distributed to all streaming platforms, we have had the privilege to interview individuals such as Actor, Hugh Bonneville, President of the Royal Academy, Rebecca Salter, Entrepreneur, Theo Paphitis and many more.
 We feel there is a problem current students in the education system are facing, and we want that to change.
Students seemed to fall into two groups: 
 They had no idea what they want to pursue as a future career.
 They knew what they want to do but do not know how to be successful in their chosen field.

 Therefore, I felt if I could create a podcast where students could hear from successful individuals about what their thought process was like at a similar age, and how they navigated their way through education and into the working world, it would make this process far more smooth. 
Being able to hear from such a diverse group of individuals, I hope, enables all our listeners to take key nuggets of information which they can apply to their own lives.

Name: Брандовете на България
Description:
С обединени усилия можем да постигнем много. Именно информационно-образователния характер на предаването ще позволи чрез добрия пример, реални казуси и дискусии по теми свързани с изграждането на отличимост, силен бранд и превръщането му в предпочитан избор за потребителя в момент на нестабилна икономическа обстановка в света и у нас.

Защо партньорствата с потребителите в моменти на криза са решаващи и кои са компаниите, които остават зад завесите, но дават тласък на бизнес процесите и променят средата, в която потребителите избират?

В ефира на ТВ1 в новия формат  „Брандовете на България“ ще отговаряме на тези и много други въпроси.
С нас ли си? Ако искаш да си част от поредицата Бранд на България, свържи се с нас на: brandnabulgaria@tv1.bg

А ако искаш да надникнеш зад кулисите на успешните и силни марки, гледай ни всеки петък от 19:30 часа в ефира на ТВ1.

Визията на формата е да вдъхновява, да дава стойност, да споделя добрите практики, като създаваме подкрепяща среда в която инвестициите в реклама да бъдат максимално ефективно разпределени и това да доведе до намаляване на разходите за придобиване на клиенти, а заедно с това и увеличение на печалбите на компанията.

Мисълта за добрия имидж на бранда е водещата ни движеща сила, която ни вдъхнови да създадем „Брандовете на България“ в телевизоннния ефир на водещата алтеранативна бизнес телевизия в България ТВ1 България.

Name: Nigeria Union of Journalists, FCT
Description:
Nigeria Union of Journalists (NUJ) is a network of media professionals established to advance the safety and welfare of Nigerian journalists.

It is an independent trade organization with no political leaning or ideological disposition.

NUJ is founded in the underlying belief that speaking with one voice as a professional body it can push for the interest of its members particularly in the areas of working conditions and rights: freedom of expression, safety, job security and fair remuneration, gender equality, freedom of association, copyright protection and fight against all forms of discrimination and suppression.

NUJ organizes and supports campaigns aimed at protecting journalists’ rights and strengthening collective agreements.

NUJ was founded on 15 March 1955 in Lagos during Nigeria's struggle for independence from British rule. It is affiliated to the Nigeria Labour Congress. Its membership grew from 3,950 in 1988 to 35,000 in 2005

Name: n10.as Radio
Description:
n10.as (pronounced antennas) is a digital radio station dedicated to amplifying the voices and talents of artists, musicians, and creatives. Our mission is: to push the boundaries of broadcasting by providing a platform that transcends geographical limitations, fostering inclusivity and diversity within the online radio community.

At n10.as, we believe in empowerment through opportunity. Our physical space serves as a creative hub equipped with cutting-edge equipment and audio support, enabling artists to produce their work and receive the training they need to thrive. We're more than just a radio station; we're a community-driven initiative committed to nurturing emerging talent and providing them with the visibility they deserve.

Through our curated programming and collaborations with community organizations, we actively contribute to the cultural enrichment of Montreal and beyond. Our commitment to inclusivity extends to artists from culturally and socially diverse backgrounds, ensuring that a wide range of voices and perspectives are represented on our platform.
--

Name: Renovate or Rebuild TV Show
Description:
What do you get when you mix in some reality TV celebrities, the latest in behavioural science insights, and a mission to transform the sustainability performance of the entire housing industry?

You get the award winning lifestyle TV show, Renovate or Rebuild, that aims to crack open sustainable building options to a broad audience. It combines reality-TV with behavioural science by encouraging Australian homeowners to choose healthier and more energy efficient homes.

Renovate or Rebuild is a 60-minute lifestyle show where two teams compete to convince a family that they have the best solution to providing more space, comfort and reduced energy bills.

Team Renovate believe the family should renovate their existing home, while Team Rebuild think the family should knock down and rebuild.

In each episode you are taken on a journey through the design process as the teams juggle the challenges of meeting the clients brief and budget whilst aiming to create an amazing design for a home that is stylish, healthy, comfortable but also an energy efficient home.

Along the way they visit amazing homes to get some inspiration before pitching their design to the family.

The two solutions are judged by an expert panel on style, sustainability, and cost but ultimately the decision will come down to the family - will they renovate or rebuild?

The show features an all star cast of former contestants from Channel 9’s ‘The Block’ (Australia’s most popular reality TV show) and has all the hallmarks of compelling reality TV: it’s fun, with big, bold characters and a healthy dose of competition. What makes it different is its objective, to help homeowners to create more energy efficient, healthy and comfortable homes.

Name: Scientology Network
Description:
The Church of Scientology has launched its own television channel—the Scientology Network. Its debut makes our programming instantly accessible to more than 20 million households across the United States and hundreds of millions more over the internet.

Airing 24/7, the Scientology Network aims to satisfy the overwhelming curiosity about our religion as evidenced by the fact that someone searches online for “Scientology” every six seconds. The new network won’t just answer people’s questions, it will take them inside the religion itself.

To accomplish that, the network offers exclusive innovative content that moves religious broadcasting in an entirely new direction. Like Scientology itself, that approach is fresh, different and dynamic. It does not seek to preach, convince or convert, but simply inform.

This new genre of religious broadcasting includes original programs that take viewers into the everyday lives of Scientologists, the Church as an institution and its organizations. These programs show our religion in action, providing not just insights into the only major religion to emerge in the last century, but also offering a fresh take on compelling television entertainment demanded by today’s digital world.

AVAILABLE TO WATCH ANYWHERE, ANYTIME

The Scientology Network is immediately available on satellite TV and through live streaming via:

Scientology.tv
Apple TV
Amazon Fire TV
Roku
Mobile apps that can be downloaded for smartphones and tablets.
And will continue to expand through additional platforms in the future.

Name: Sara Essa
Description:
Hi! I’m Sara, a sports-presenter, voice over, live event host and commentator based in the Middle East.
There is nothing I love more than delving into the stories of my guests, to understand the sport on a much deeper level and engaging the audience to come on the journey with me. 

I absolutely love sport! 

Watching, playing and, of course presenting and interviewing… I have worked across Motorsport, Padel, Golf, Netball, Tennis and Watersports. 

My approach is to find depth in a sport. I really enjoy discovering the little-known stories of everyone involved, not only the athletes. Sharing their journeys of triumph, determination, resilience, sometimes heartbreak, and all the emotions of competition, to really connect the audience on a much deeper level with the people and details of the sport itself. 

For me, this is all about asking the right questions, based on lots of research and building rapport with everyone, so they trust me by not only telling me their stories but for me to share them too!

I am the most recent host of the Girls on Track UK webinar series in partnership with Motorsport UK, a Padel commentator for the BullPadel Show and have recently hosted on stage at the British Grand Prix. 

Back in 2021, I grew one of the largest audiences on the audio-only platform Clubhouse through interviewing incredible guests in live panel discussions. This led me to host events for the likes of Volvo, Adidas and Farfetch, to name a few. 

I have been a voice-over artist for 4 years and really enjoy voicing anything from radio commercials to TVCs, IVRs, social media content, online videos and audiobooks.

Name: Radiotelevizija Herceg-Bosne
Description: Radio Television of Herceg-Bosna (RTV HB) is a Bosnian-Herzegovinian radio and television medium in the Croatian language owned by 22 municipalities, cities and counties with a majority Croatian population. We are the only public media in the Croatian language that tries to make up for the lack of media space and the lack of channels in the Croatian language on public RTV services and the system. We believe that the survival of this media is extremely important for all of us who have recognized the problem of lack of media space in the Croatian language, as well as for all those who believe that our survival does not endanger anyone, and for all people of good will who appreciate freedom of speech and expression. We are especially proud of the fact that in two years of work we have managed to build bridges between BiH Croats and the diaspora. Numerous messages of thanks from the diaspora in which our viewers tell us with great emotion how they watch live in their homelands that they have not visited for 20 years or more clearly show how what we do has a great impact far beyond the borders of Bosnia and Herzegovina .

Name: RÁDIO520 - A SUA RÁDIO
Description:
A Rádio 520 é mais do que uma estação de rádio; somos uma ponte entre a informação de qualidade, a boa música e a comunidade. Fundada em [ano de fundação], temos uma longa história de conexão com nossos ouvintes, oferecendo uma programação diversificada e relevante.
Nossa missão é fornecer conteúdo que informe, entretenha e inspire nossos ouvintes. Acreditamos no poder da rádio como um meio de comunicação impactante, capaz de transformar vidas e conectar pessoas.
Na Rádio 520, nossa programação é cuidadosamente elaborada para atender a todos os gostos e interesses. Oferecemos:

- **Jornalismo de Qualidade**: Notícias locais, nacionais e internacionais com credibilidade e imparcialidade.
- **Programas de Entretenimento**: Talk shows, entrevistas e programas de variedades que mantêm nossos ouvintes engajados.
- **Música para Todos os Gostos**: De clássicos atemporais a lançamentos modernos, nossa seleção musical é ampla e diversificada.
- **Esportes e Cultura**: Cobertura de eventos esportivos, debates culturais e muito mais.
Estamos sempre na vanguarda da tecnologia, utilizando as mais recentes inovações para melhorar a experiência de nossos ouvintes e anunciantes. Com transmissões ao vivo pela internet e aplicativos móveis, a Rádio 520 está sempre ao alcance, onde quer que nossos ouvintes estejam.
A Rádio 520 se orgulha de ser um membro ativo da comunidade. Participamos e apoiamos eventos locais, iniciativas de caridade e projetos comunitários, reforçando nosso compromisso com o desenvolvimento social e cultural.

Anche le Notizie rispettano il claim di Alex : spazio alle info locali con la cronaca, gli aggiornamenti sul traffico, lo sport, gli eventi e le info flash nazionali. Dopo ogni news di Oggi spazio alle le storie ed i ricordi di ieri, brevi ma intensi, sempre nello stile di Radio Alex

Starting off as an online radio station in the quaint coastal town of Swansea, Wales, Vandelay Radio has continued to flourish since its inception in 2018. Created on a whim, a knee-jerk reaction to the lack of diversity in music, Vandelay has turned from a burgeoning online platform to an established authority in dance music. 

Founded by three-time chess Grandmaster, political strategist, once described by Cosmo Kramer as the ‘the songbird of our generation’ and one of the most influential figures in the 21st century, the elusive DJ, producer and international playboy billionaire, Dare Balogun and global hardman Ollie Gordon, widely known as the reason for why people started liking gingers, Vandelay has spent the last 
4 years creating opportunities for DJs, producers and anyone interested in dance music to have their sounds and thoughts shared to a global audience, with listeners spanning from Milan to Minsk, while simultaneously generating billions of dollars of revenue for Kramerica Worldwide shareholders.

Previous online radio stations once known as titans of the industry, have been engulfed by the Vandelay fever, with a talented roster pumping out exceptional show after exceptional show - a diverse and well seasoned range of talent from all over the world, not only spanning but creating genres, re-defining what a radio station should be, what it should look and sound like, and setting the blueprint for future radio stations to come.

Name: The Motorcycle Channel
Description:
"The Motorcycle Channel" is a dedicated television network that provides an all-encompassing and thrilling experience for motorcycle enthusiasts and viewers alike. This channel offers an exhilarating mix of high-speed adventures, inspiring stories, and the unbreakable bonds forged on the open road. It is the ultimate destination for anyone passionate about the world of motorcycles.
At "The Motorcycle Channel," we immerse our audience in the gripping world of two-wheeled machines, showcasing a wide range of motorcycle models, from vintage classics to cutting-edge sport bikes. Viewers get an in-depth look at the evolution of motorcycle technology and design, as well as insights into the latest innovations and trends.
Our channel is not just about the bikes; it's about the riders who make the journey unforgettable. We profile a diverse group of motorcycle enthusiasts, each with their unique background, style, and story. Whether it's the seasoned veteran who's logged countless miles on the open road or the newcomer discovering the joys of riding for the first time, their shared passion is what unites them.

"The Motorcycle Channel" takes you on epic rides and expeditions, from cross-country adventures to traversing breathtaking scenic routes. Witness the beauty of the world through the eyes of these riders as they navigate winding mountain roads, explore scenic coastal highways, and discover hidden gems along the way.

In addition to showcasing the adventures of these motorcycle aficionados, "The Motorcycle Channel" features inspiring and heartwarming narratives that highlight the human side of the motorcycle community. We celebrate charity rides, events that bring riders together for a good cause, and the strong bonds formed among motorcycle clubs and associations.
Our programming encompasses heart-pounding action sequences, epic road trips, maintenance and customization tips, and a comprehensive look into the world of motorcycles.

Name: The British Broadcasting Challenge
Description:
We know facts matter. We know accountability matters. We know identity matters. We believe that how these values are transmitted, matters.

We are lucky in the UK. We have a public service broadcasting framework that is the envy of the world, comprising the publicly-owned BBC, Channel 4 and S4C, with agreed content commitments from ITV, Channel 5, Scottish Television and Ulster Television as well as obligations on all licensed broadcasters.

This ecosystem works to ensure fairness and impartiality; through its uniquely British construction, it covers commitments to children’s content, arts and religion, original drama and entertainment, and guaranteed access for all to our biggest sports events. It ensures both the portrayal of our nations and regions to themselves and to each other, but also projects British values internationally. Our intellectual property framework has made the UK home to some of the world’s biggest production companies and high-end drama productions.

Our PSB framework underpins a thriving UK creative industry sector, estimated to have contributed £118 billion in gross added value to UKPLC in 2018. Moreover, the PSBs’ spending commitments to the nations and regions of the UK boost local employment and economies.

But in a fast-changing media landscape our unique ecosystem is under threat: from under-funding,  from the proliferation of unregulated broadcasters online, from the exponential growth of social media platforms, from US-based streaming services shorn of any PSB obligations (including paying taxes), from changes driven by ideology over evidence and even from benign neglect.

That is why we have created The British Broadcasting Challenge.

Name: Radio FM+ Talca 92.3
Description:
Transmitiendo en el dial 92.3 FM, somos reconocidos por nuestra programación dinámica y diversa, que combina los influjos latino y anglo de los grandes éxitos musicales.

Fundada el 1 de febrero de 2020, Radio FM+ se ha convertido rápidamente en una de las principales fuentes de noticias, música y actualidad en la región. Como propiedad de Inversiones San Nicolás, dirigida por el emprendedor Maulino Alberto Toloza, somos una emisora independiente, plurarista y respetuosa, comprometida con brindar a nuestra audiencia una experiencia de escucha enriquecedora.

En Radio FM+ 92.3 Talca, estamos comprometidos con la excelencia y la calidad en todo lo que hacemos. Nuestro equipo de locutores y animadores está compuesto por figuras consagradas de la radiodifusión regional, quienes, junto a nuestros expertos panelistas, incluyendo veterinarios, nutricionistas, abogados, médicos, psicólogos y el reconocido Chef Enrique Araya, entregan conocimiento y entretenimiento a la comunidad a diario.

Nuestra programación se adapta a las necesidades y tendencias actuales, manteniéndonos conectados con nuestra audiencia y, al mismo tiempo, respetando los valores tradicionales. Con una transmisión de 18 horas completamente en vivo, nos aseguramos de brindar entretenimiento y contenido relevante para todos los sectores de la población, desde profesionales y estudiantes hasta amas de casa y niños.

Gracias a nuestra tecnología de vanguardia respaldada por una potente planta transmisora de 1000 watts de potencia y baterías de litio, podemos ofrecer un sonido análogo-digital de características únicas en la región del Maule. Esta calidad excepcional nos ha permitido experimentar un crecimiento significativo en audiencia y reconocimiento, lo que convierte a Radio FM+ en una inversión publicitaria altamente efectiva.

Te invitamos a formar parte de este emocionante proyecto y aprovechar todas las oportunidades que Radio FM+ 92.3 Talca tiene para promocionar tu negocio.

Name: The Thing About Salem Podcast
Description: Are you curious about the Salem Witch Trials? Fascinated? Intrigued? Maybe even fully obsessed? Josh and Sarah from Witch Hunt podcast bring you The Thing About Salem, a podcast dedicated to uncovering all things about the Salem Witch Trials. Each week, in 15 minutes or less, you'll go through all the feels as we share a story and a discussion. You will cry, rage, and even laugh a little about some of the silliness, like the witch cake baked with the urine of the afflicted girls. Topics include Tituba, The Crucible, poppets, the witches' sabbath, and witch marks.

En tant que plateforme globale, notre mission est d'inspirer, informer et connecter les acteurs du monde des affaires, des start-ups aux entreprises établies. Nous mettons en lumière les histoires captivantes d'entrepreneurs visionnaires, partageons des conseils pratiques, et offrons une vitrine aux innovations qui façonnent l'avenir.

À travers nos articles, interviews, podcasts et autres contenus multimédias, nous visons à créer une communauté dynamique où les idées prospèrent et les opportunités se multiplient. Que vous soyez un entrepreneur en herbe cherchant inspiration et conseils, un investisseur à la recherche de projets innovants, ou simplement un passionné du monde des affaires, Bénéfits Média est votre destination incontournable.

Nous croyons fermement au pouvoir de l'entrepreneuriat pour stimuler le progrès économique et social. En mettant en avant les réussites entrepreneuriales, en encourageant le partage de connaissances et en favorisant le réseautage, nous contribuons activement à la croissance et à la prospérité de la communauté entrepreneuriale.

Rejoignez-nous dans l'exploration du monde des affaires, découvrez des histoires inspirantes, et participez à la construction d'un avenir innovant et florissant. Bénéfits Média : votre source d'inspiration et de connexion dans le paysage entrepreneurial global."

Name: Sıradışı Programı Arşiv- Extraordinary Program Archives
Description:
Rana Atilgan is a Turkish-American businesswoman and founder of EllaTrade Consultancy. Educated at the University of London, she specialized in film and television studies, gaining extensive training in video production, directing, and scriptwriting. After returning to Turkey, Rana began her career as an executive producer at TRT, where she created and produced successful music shows, documentaries, and talk shows. Her programs, such as “Above the Line” and “Extraordinary,” featured prominent guests and gained high ratings.

Rana became the first executive producer to transition to Turkey's private television sector, working at Star TV and HBB TV. She continued to produce top-rated shows, earning recognition as a leading figure in the Turkish media industry. Notably, her interviews with political figures like Recep Tayyip Erdoğan and Eduard Shevardnadze were groundbreaking.

In 2002, Rana moved to New York, where she represented a Turkish newspaper at the United Nations and managed various businesses, including a textile company and a luxury restaurant. After her husband’s passing in 2015, she took full control of their ventures and later established Ranamax Global Corporation and Star Bistro. In 2019, Rana returned to London to found EllaTrade Consultancy, expanding her business endeavors. 
We are excited to share with you the valuable archive of Rana Özergin Atılgan's "Extraordinary" program, which she produced and hosted on various television channels in the 1990s.
Rana Özergin Atılgan'ın 1990'lı yıllarda farklı televizyon kanallarında yapımcılığını ve sunuculuğunu üstlendiği "Sıradışı" programının değerli arşivini sizlerle paylaşıyoruz.

Name: Radio Universidad de Antofagasta
Description:
La Radio Universidad de Antofagasta es una emisora de radio chilena que opera en la frecuencia 99.9 FM. 

Esta radio es parte de la Universidad de Antofagasta, y su objetivo principal es informar y entretener a la comunidad regional.

La radio comenzó sus transmisiones el 24 de abril de 1968, como una filial de Antofagasta de la Red de Emisoras de la Ex Universidad Técnica del Estado. A partir de 1990, comenzaron las transmisiones en FM STEREO, en la frecuencia de 99.9.

La Radio Universidad de Antofagasta cubre una variedad de temas, incluyendo el quehacer universitario, ciencia, investigación, educación, tecnología y cultura. Además, ha asumido el desafío de reinventarse en el mundo de los medios de comunicación, implementando transmisiones vía streaming, el formato podcast y compartiendo material a través de las redes sociales.

Puedes escuchar la Radio Universidad de Antofagasta en la frecuencia 99.9 FM en la ciudad de Antofagasta y online a través de su página web.

Name: Rádio AntenAZero
Description:
A AntenAZero é uma webrádio paulista que busca uma abordagem única e independente em relação à programação musical. Sua missão é promover artistas independentes e músicas que estão fora do mainstream, abrangendo gêneros que vão desde o rock clássico até a eletrônica experimental e o indie alternativo.

Com uma programação eclética e cuidadosamente selecionada por uma equipe de fãs de música sempre em busca de novas descobertas e talentos emergentes, os ouvintes podem desfrutar de uma mistura de faixas underground, raridades musicais e sucessos mais conhecidos.

Além de sua programação, a AntenAZero se destaca pelo compromisso com a comunidade musical independente, servindo como plataforma para artistas locais e independentes, oferecendo oportunidades de alcance e exposição que não são encontradas em outras plataformas comerciais.

Com eventos frequentes, entrevistas com artistas da cena e uma atmosfera acolhedora e inclusiva, a AntenAZero não é apenas uma rádio, mas sim uma comunidade vibrante e vital para os amantes da música alternativa e independente em todo o Brasil e além.

Name: The Levis Effect
Description:
The objective of The Levis Effect is to deliver timely, credible, and engaging sports commentary that informs, entertains, and builds a loyal, interactive audience. The show aims to provide in-depth analysis of professional and collegiate sports through live reactions, informed debate, and original perspectives that resonate with both casual fans and dedicated followers. By prioritizing authenticity, consistency, and preparation, the program seeks to establish itself as a trusted voice within the sports media landscape.



In addition to audience growth, the show’s objective is to create measurable value for sponsors and partners through integrated brand exposure, multi-platform promotion, and audience alignment with local and regional businesses. The Levis Effect strives to operate with professional broadcast standards, leveraging social media, live events, and digital distribution to expand reach and engagement.



Long-term, the goal is to evolve the show into a scalable media property with sustainable revenue streams, strong brand recognition, and opportunities for live broadcasts, interviews, and strategic collaborations. By combining compelling sports content with disciplined operations and audience-first decision-making, the show seeks to grow responsibly while maintaining credibility, independence, and community connection.

Name: 102.5 The Vine

102.5 The Vine is a nonprofit Christian radio station licensed in Hemet, California, and broadcasting to Southwest Riverside County to bring the love and hope of Jesus to our community and beyond. We strive to build stronger families and communities through radio programming that encourages listeners’ everyday lives.

You probably already know a lot about 102.5 The Vine, but what you may not realize is just how unique our ministry is. God has given us a powerful way to share His love with potentially millions of people across Southern California and beyond. We’re using this unique platform to encourage families through positive music and solid, relevant Bible teaching.

Our music features the latest songs from artists such as Chris Tomlin, Casting Crowns, Jeremy Camp, and Mercy Me as well as some of the most popular Christian songs of the last few years. ESI delivers a solution focused approach while helping to facilitate creative vision and understanding the importance of getting the shots you want.
