Name: EOS Radio
Description:
EOS is a platform that operates across various contexts by organizing events, initiating collaborations, and running an online radio. It is dedicated to electronic sound, with a growing focus on experimental, less functional, and genre-fluid practices. Short for Expansion of Sound, the name refers to both the physical phenomenon of sound propagation and our mission to disseminate and amplify innovative artistic expression through sound and music.

The core web radio is the foundation for new alliances, while the archive traces the platform’s trajectory since its founding in 2020. With a nomadic approach and no fixed physical base, EOS features preferably emerging artists and like-minded initiatives and collaborates with institutions by developing context-specific formats.

Our projects have been supported by: Bundesverband Soziokultur, Carhartt WIP, City of Frankfurt Department for Culture, d&b audiotechnik, Crespo Foundation, Hessian Ministry of Higher Education, Research, Science and the Arts, Hessische Kulturstiftung, Musikfonds e.V. by means of the Federal Government Commissioner for Culture and the Media, Stiftung Polytechnische Gesellschaft Frankfurt.

Name: Elevate 4 Growth
Description:
Another quarterly revenue meeting.

Another conversation about pipeline.

Another executive asking: "Where are the new prospects?"

You know your sponsorship packages deliver incredible ROI. Your audience is exactly what brands need. Your impact stories could move mountains.

But somehow, you're still chasing the same tired prospect list.

Here's the reality: in today's fragmented media landscape, the executives who win aren't just great at what they do. They're great at showing what they do.

After 30 years in ad sales and nonprofit revenue, I've seen the transformation happen. I've helped generate over $500M in revenue. I've built teams, turned around operations, and watched the industry evolve.

The winners today? They're the ones who stopped waiting for prospects to find them and started creating reasons for prospects to seek them out.

That's exactly what I help sponsorship and development executives do through strategic ghostwriting.

I don't write generic LinkedIn posts. I craft content that positions you as the industry expert you already are. Content that educates your ideal prospects. Content that builds trust before the first sales call.

Because when your LinkedIn works as hard as you do, everything changes.
Your prospects start coming to you pre-sold on your expertise. Your pipeline stays full. Your revenue conversations become about growth, not survival.

But here's the bigger transformation: you become the executive people quote in industry conversations. The one prospects reference when talking to their boards. The leader other revenue professionals seek out for advice.

Thought leadership isn't just about more leads. It's about becoming undeniable in your market.

I work with a limited number of revenue leaders who are ready to become the go-to voice in their market.

Curious how this could work for you?

Message me on LinkedIn. Let's explore what's possible.

The Purpose Place Network - Where Christian Creators Thrive

The Purpose Place Network is a Christ-centered media platform dedicated to empowering aspiring and established podcast and streaming TV show hosts. By fostering a collaborative environment, we help our creators expand their reach, amplify their message, and connect meaningfully with a global audience.

At The Purpose Place Network, we envision a future where Christian voices are a powerful influence in digital media, reaching audiences with messages of hope, inspiration, and impact. Our platform nurtures creators in their journey, offering a community where they can learn, grow, and thrive. Through cutting-edge technology and strategic guidance, we help elevate their visibility and influence, fostering a space where their voices are amplified and their missions extended to all corners of the world.

Whether you're a new creator or an established host, The Purpose Place Network is here to support your journey, bringing your vision to life in a community centered on faith, innovation, and collaboration. Description:
'Little Studio Co.' is the culmination of almost a decade of experience bringing childcare options to the TV & Film Industry.

We've helped build and run a children's nursery at a major UK studio, we've run 'pop-up nurseries' on location and we've learned a huge amount about how to support film families.

You've told us that you don't want expensive nursery places and you've told us that you don't want your child to commute with you during un-social hours.

Our mission is to ensure film sets have amazing places where families can be together - whether for the odd day or on a longer term basis whilst Mum or Dad are working.

Whether a non-working parent, Granny, Grandad, a friend or even your child's full-time nanny, our facilities are places where you can all play, eat, relax and be together in a way, which is also affordable for productions.

We're here to bring alternative childcare options so you have choices.

Name: New Zealand Culture and Media Group
Description:
New Zealand Culture & Media Group (NZCMG) is part of the television broadcasting industry with the commitment to foster the cultural diversity through media, radio, film and television, as well as a variety of large-scale community cultural activities.

Channel 33 is a television channel owned by New Zealand Culture & Media Group. It officially launched its service on November 16th, 2020, broadcasting 24/7 through Freeview digital terrestrial television transmission service, covering most of the cities of New Zealand. In addition, Channel 33 started its 24-hour online radio streaming service in June 2023. 

Channel 33 is aiming to serve the local community with a multicultural vision. Taking “discovering the world and sharing our lives, serving the community and growing with everyone” as its positioning strategy, Channel 33 mainly targets the Chinese communities living in New Zealand. At present, the line-up of the programmes includes live feed of overseas contents and self-produced programmes featuring in News & Current Affairs, Social Topics, Food & Health, Children’s Education and so on.

In the long run, NZCMG will be community-based, serving local Chinese New Zealanders. It performs as a platform for government departments, organizations and community institutions to delivery their messages. It will also provide opportunities for local Chinese to showcase their wonderful community life, creating a link between different cultures, and seeking breakthroughs between inheritance and integration.

Description:
SOMOS una “radio boutique”, pensada para los que conectan con la mejor música de todos los tiempos.

Dirigida a un público adulto contemporáneo exigente, un auditor tecnológico, aspiracional, con gustos refinados, un LIFESTYLE de la música, que sabe disfrutar de los placeres de la vida en todos los sentidos. 

Nuestra propuesta programática es conectar con los grandes éxitos de la música anglo, un viaje por los 70 - 80 -90 hasta hoy, un ir y venir por diferentes épocas, que harán recordar a nuestros oyentes momentos inolvidables, llenos de sensaciones y emociones únicas.
Vamos por una comunidad global en torno a este producto, un concepto radial lifestyle, que se haga fuerte y crezca en muchos puntos del planeta. Estamos con tecnología de punta, utilizando IA, muy apoyado por las redes sociales, influencers y en colaboración con destacados portales web, para su difusión y crecimiento.
Muy pronto tendrán una app que estará disponible en los celulares para Android y IPhone. Todos tendrán la posibilidad de bajar la aplicación en sus móviles en cualquier lugar del mundo y llevar la radio con ellos adonde quiera que vayan.

Sus principales auspiciadores son cadenas hoteleras a nivel mundial, marcas y productos lifestyle, relacionados en su mayoría a la industria del turismo y el entretenimiento.

Te invitamos a ser parte de esta nueva propuesta radial, una “frecuencia boutique”, que desde este momento, al hacer clic, te conectará con la mejor música de todos los tiempos

Name: Digitale Radio Vlaanderen
Description:
Digitale Radio Vlaanderen CV is een samenwerkingsverband tussen de drie grootste omroepen van Vlaanderen: DPG Media, Mediahuis en VRT. 
In 2018 hebben zij besloten om de handen in elkaar te slaan onder het motto "Collaborate on technology, compete on content", om ervoor te zorgen dat de toekomst van radio verzekerd blijft. 

Digitale Radio Vlaanderen staat in voor de promotieactiviteiten van onder meer DAB+ en andere vormen van digitaal radio luisteren. Daarnaast is het de licentiehouder van het Radioplayer-platform voor Vlaanderen. 
Radioplayer is een samenwerking tussen meer dan 15 Europese landen en Canada en spreekt met één stem voor duizenden zenders en omroepen. Hierdoor is Radioplayer in staat om rond de tafel te zitten met de grootste autofabrikanten en fabrikanten van nieuwe technologieën (smart speakers en andere smart toestellen) ter wereld, om ervoor te zorgen dat radio op de juiste manier standaard geïntegreerd wordt op de juiste plek. Ook ontwikkelen we binnen Radioplayer een eigen radio-app en webplayer waar de consument gebruik van kan maken. 

Naast de promotie van digitale radio is Digitale Radio Vlaanderen ook het aanspreekpunt voor andere sectoren die in aanraking komen met radio, denk aan retail, fabrikanten, auto-industrie, etc. 
Samen zorgen we ervoor dat de transitie van analoge naar digitale radio zo vlot en efficiënt mogelijk verloopt.

Name: Radio 1RPH
Description:
Turning print into sound
Radio 1RPH informs and entertains listeners across the Canberra, Wagga Wagga and Junee regions by turning print into sound.

Each day our volunteers read from the major daily newspapers, including the Canberra Times, and from popular international and Australian magazines, journals, serialised books and community newsletters. We also feature readings from The Daily Advertiser and The Southern Cross for our Wagga Wagga and Junee listeners.

If you have difficulty reading printed material or just want to stay informed in these fast paced times while enjoying a range of entertaining programs, then Radio 1RPH is for you. Tune in and find out what’s happening in your community, across the nation, and around the world.

Radio 1RPH broadcasts from 7.00am until late into the evening, with the BBC World Service broadcasting overnight.

Name: Radio Brașov
Description:
RADIO BRAȘOV (87.8 FM) s-a impus drept lider al peisajului media brașovean, consolidând o relație profundă cu comunitatea locală și beneficiind de loialitatea ascultătorilor săi. Cu o prezență de trei decenii în fruntea industriei, am devenit "The Best in Town" prin inovație și dedicare continuă. 

Suntem recunoscuți pentru gama noastră variată de programe și conținut, oferind genuri muzicale diverse, talk-show-uri captivante, interviuri inspiraționale, știri locale și evenimente speciale, adresându-ne unui public divers cu interese variate.

Cu o audiență impresionantă de peste 48%, RADIO BRAȘOV continuă să își demonstreze popularitatea și impactul, atrăgând și satisfăcând toate categoriile de vârstă prin "Stilul RADIO BRAȘOV".

Suntem mereu la pas cu tehnologia la RADIO BRAȘOV! Ne-am modernizat studiourile pentru a oferi sunetul cel mai clar și programele cele mai captivante. Dar nu ne oprim aici!  Suntem mândri să evoluăm odată cu vremurile, adoptând un nou concept de radio-podcast pentru a oferi o experiență auditivă și vizuală dinamică. 

Suntem mai mult decât un simplu post de radio - suntem inima și sufletul orașului, aducând energie și inspirație în casele și inimile ascultătorilor noștri. Și bineînțeles, nu uităm niciodată de cea mai importantă persoană din această aventură - tu!

Name: Knight Vision Studios
Description:
The aim of Knight Vision is to create high-quality content in a non-traditional, smarter, and faster way. The way the viewer consumes content has exponentially changed: so, the way we make it should too. We want to do this by bringing content direct to consumer on various platforms, including FAST channels and social media, using advertising funding in an upfront way, circumventing lengthy development processes that can see ideas circle for months if not years. Knight Vision wants to create a development world where we let the viewer decide what they want to watch by putting it out there and allowing it to gain traction. Then, the big streamers and networks come to it when it’s already gained an audience along with advertising money attached. 
 
Talent will be a huge part of the Knight Vision – developing, producing, and speedily putting out ideas with talent both on and off screen. We already have development steps with several streamers and linear platforms on exciting projects. Our strategy is double pronged – continuing to pitch in the traditional way, building upon the great network and streamer relationships. But also adapting to the current climate and looking to make and put out content in a reactive and fast way, applying high end production values to the direct-to-consumer space. 
 
“Knight Vision is simple: it’s doing the same thing we’ve been doing as producers for years, but in a way that evolves those skills in response to not only the buyers, but to the audience.”

Name: KAZI 88.7FM Austin Community Radio, Inc.
Description:
Austin Community Radio, Inc. operating as KAZI 88.7 is the oldest community station in Austin. The station is a listener-supported, non-commercial community radio station, staffed almost entirely by volunteers who work together out of a sense of commitment and concern for our community.

Our mission is to reach and provide educational programming and information with special emphasis on media access for the African-American community and other groups previously unserved by existing radio stations in Austin.

KAZI was the dream of the late Dr. John Warfield, professor of African-American Studies at the University of Texas. With generous funding from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting and loaned tower space from LBJ-S Broadcasting, KAZI began transmitting on August 29, 1982.
Although KAZI was launched with the aid of public funding, it currently survives entirely on donations from listeners and support from commercial sponsors. The station also receives monies from the City of Austin for the broadcast of the weekly City Council meeting.

KAZI remains a strong force in the Austin Community with its unique mix of RnB, Soul, Hip-Hop, Jazz, Gospel, Blues, Reggae, Zydeco, Talk, Community Information, Independent News and more… KAZI also takes pride in supporting and promoting local artists as well as national artists on small independent labels.

Since 1982, KAZI has been serving Austin and the surrounding communities. The station maintains a family atmosphere with a volunteer staff that loves what they do, which keeps the listening audiences always wanting more.

Name: Brown Student & Community Radio (BSR Live)
Description:
"The Brown Network” began in 1936 as the first student-run radio station in the country. It was a carrier-current AM station broadcasting to Brown dorms. Eventually the station’s name was changed to “WBRU-AM.” In 1966, some of the station’s members secured a loan from the University and founded the radio station WBRU-FM (95.5), while others continued the student-oriented AM tradition. WBRU-FM became a commercial corporation, financially and legally separate from Brown University, while WBRU-AM continued to operate for the Brown community and surrounding areas in the college radio tradition. The AM signal in time became virtually inaudible.

During the mid-1990s, a few students worked to find a new, more audible outlet for those still broadcasting in the older, experimental, student tradition. In 1997, WBRU-AM became “Brown Student Radio” (BSR) and started broadcasting on WELH-FM (88.1). WELH-FM, owned by the Wheeler School, was sold to another organization in 2010, leaving BSR to broadcast solely on bsrlive.com.
 
In 2018, BSR obtained a low-power FM license. As WBRU-FM had sold their signal the year prior, BSR obtained the call signal WBRU-LP. BSR is now broadcasting on 101.1 FM, online, and through an upcoming mobile app. Today, we are the only FM radio station on campus, staying true to our roots in traditional freeform college radio. Students, faculty, and community members all host cross-genre music shows, podcasts, and talk shows, allowing for a truly free creative outlet for the Providence community. We are officially partnered with PCR and AS220.

Name: Cosoro Radio UK
Description:
Welcome to Cosoro Radio
Cosoro Radio is an Afrobeat Radio Station on DAB Radio in the United Kingdom.

Cosoro Radio started life in May 2016 as MyConsorror Radio, which was an online radio for a time. However, in 2018 we were granted DSP Radio Licence by OFCOM and began broadcasting on DAB Radio across cities like Manchester, Birmingham, Glasgow, Portsmouth, Norwich, and Bradford as well as internet devices like Alexa Skills, Google Assistant, Mobile Apps (Google Play & Apple Store), Online and streaming platforms like Deezer,Tune In, myTuner radio and many more.

If you would like to listen via your computer or are further afield, you can use our ‘Play Button’ facility here on our website. If you would like a pop-out player so that you can continue to browse the internet, please use the red ‘PLAYER’ button on the right of our website.

A Brief History of Cosoro Radio
Cosoro Radio is the first Afrobeats only radio station in the United Kingdom. The radio is listened to globally and is well recognized by its local community in the United Kingdom.

The collective hopes and aspirations for Cosoro Radio were for the listeners to enjoy non-stop Afrobeats genre music and service in the area which would include the provision of an immediate channel for up-to-minute information on a whole range of issues, improving the quality of life and prosperity of the community.

Therefore, one of WAOB Radio’s primary programming goals is to offer the Magisterial Teaching of the Catholic Church, including the teaching of the Holy Father and the bishops in union with him.   In order to accomplish this, WAOB Radio broadcasts the teaching of the Popes every day (voiced over in English), and also broadcasts the homilies and teachings of many different bishops. The priests also offer meditations on the sacred scripture, the Saints, the Catechism of the Catholic Church, and much more. Name: WKCO 91.9 FM
Description:
WKCO is Kenyon College’s entirely student-run and fully-functional radio station, broadcasting in the greater Gambier area at 91.9 FM and online at wkco.kenyon.edu (https://www.wkco919.org/).  WKCO understands its mission as comprising two main functions.

First, the organization looks to serve the Kenyon College student body, the greater Kenyon community, as well as the surrounding area, with quality content, from musical and educational outreach programs to community announcements.  WKCO provides a unique and distinct voice otherwise absent from the airwaves in the area and also provides the most direct and viable connection between Kenyon students and the residents of the surrounding area.  As such, we continue to see both FM and online streaming broadcasts as essential to our function.  Additionally, since global online broadcasts began, WKCO has attracted a growing alumni audience and now provides the possibility of a vital connection between past and present Kenyon students.  We serve both the on-campus community, the greater Kenyon community (alumni, parents, friends, and students abroad), and the residents of Knox County.  We therefore seek to produce enriching and entertaining programming that will appeal to and be appropriate for those audiences, and will seek to maintain and expand our ability to reach them.

Second, WKCO seeks to provide students both a creative outlet and hands-on experience with broadcasting.  Though we are not a pre-professional organization, we do seek to allow students interested in pursuing careers in broadcast journalism, radio, or technical fields to gain knowledge and experience.  We also hope to connect Kenyon students aspiring to careers in radio with alumni or other members of the Kenyon community in the field.  We are dedicated to allowing students who are not committed to professional careers an outlet and form of expression, whether as a talk show host, program producer, DJ, or musician.

Name: Black Power 96 FM Radio
Description:
Our Mission
Black Power 96 Radio (WBPU) is a project of the African People’s Education and Defense Fund, “the baddest non-profit on the planet.”

Black Power 96 Radio’s mission is to defend the human and civil rights of the African community through our educational and cultural programming, to provide professional radio broadcasting training, and to promote economic development and self-reliance in the African community.

Black Power 96 Radio delivers a fresh sound featuring locally produced music and neighborhood news, as well as news and culture from the Caribbean, Africa and the world.

We stand tall as a non-commercial radio station owned and controlled by the black community of south St. Pete where 70 percent of families live under the poverty level and full access to employment, housing, healthcare and quality education is routinely denied.

Among the south St. Pete households served by Black Power 96, 50% do not have internet in the home and rely on FM radio for critical information.

Black Power 96 also addresses these disparities by providing free professional radio broadcast training. Our underwriting program promotes economic development and self-reliance in the African community.

Be part of growing Black Power 96.3 FM. Volunteer! Donate!

Name: Academy Of Broadcasting
Description:
Established in the year 2003, the Academy of Broadcasting (under the aegis of BNER Society) is India’s largest & oldest training academy for Radio Jockeys and other broadcast related courses. It has been set-up by internationally renowned Radio Jockey Hardeep Singh Chandpuri, who is a trained broadcaster from USA and has more than 23 years of experience in this field. He has hosted, scripted, edited and produced more than 8000 radio shows in India, USA, Middle East, Canada and New Zealand. Hardeep is also credited with revolutionising the radio scene in the northern region by his fresh and pacy style of presentation.

We have intentionally never developed a stylistic formula for our work, which is why our projects never quite look or feel the same. Each of our spaces is the result of our ability to listen, which has turned our designs and buildings into personal reflections of our clients’ personalities and values, which we co-construct through research, workshops and surveys.

In our studio, every project is an open ended enquiry, helping people to challenge their existing state and work towards an alternative, desired one. We provide guidance, expertise and experience across all phases in the architectural process, ranging from thinking, to designing, building, and ultimately finding the right way to communicate the results.

Name: WRFM Radio Station

Our programming includes shows like The Bigger Breakfast, Community Matters, and Science on the Radio, all designed to inform, entertain, and connect our community.

We actively support local businesses through advertising and promotion as well as community initiatives, such as the Active Together campaign with Active Oxfordshire, promoting healthier lifestyles through active travel.

We cover local community events and can be found at a number of outside broadcasts throughout the year - come rain or shine we'll still have a smile.

 Get involved – whether you're interested in presenting, producing, or supporting behind the scenes, there's a place for you at WRFM. For more information visit the website or drop us an email.

Name: TheThursdayNightShow
Description:
The Thursday Night Show is a live Internet show combining Internet Radio and Artist Expos. Building on a heritage of streaming from its founders dating back to 1996, and starting up in 2012 (long before podcasters and pandemic-djs were born) we are 'old skool' Internet Radio.

We broadcast live every THURSDAY evening, with DJs and Live Musicians taking hour-by-hour turns to connect in from wherever they are to indulge us in their taste in music. There are no advertisers, and no subscriptions, all the music is fully licensed and there are no playlist restrictions (as long as the founder - VoiceofDoom - doesn't get bored!)

We have over 70 DJs involved now, and have also gathered IRL for parties and festivals for the crew. If you are a music lover who can use a laptop and has something interesting to share then reach out to us!

Over the years we have been listened to from every country and continent with Internet Access (including Antartica!) and have clocked over 100,000 unique listens, and are still growing by about 3000 a year! However we do not play to grow the audience - its not a commercially motivated thing - its a community.

With the price of a beer in a club beyond sane, and most of us growing up with  responsibilities this is the way to make your Thursday evening in into an evening out... Perhaps turn the stream up, open a bottle of wine and have a Kitchen Disco!!!

We have live chat room links available with the DJs and artists so if you <LIKE> their work and say hi in the chat room they will respond there and then.. and if you like us we will draw you into our week round discord group and global network. 

Listen to rewinds and scheduled archives 24/7 round the week whenever we are not live too!

Join us to listen, join us to perform! Say hi in the chat room!

Name: EWTN Norge
Description:
EWTN Norge er en del av det globale katolske nettverket EWTN (Eternal Word Television Network) som tilbyr kringkasting av katolsk inspirert innhold til seere over hele verden. EWTN Norge leverer et bredt utvalg av programmer på norsk og engelsk, inkludert daglige messer, bibelstudier, dokumentarer, samtaler og katekese. Vårt formål er å hjelpe troende til å vokse i tro og å styrke deres åndelige liv.
EWTN Norge har sitt hovedkontor på Haramsøya og har også et kontor i Tromsø. I tillegg til våre TV-programmer, tilbyr vi også podcaster på norsk og engelsk. Disse podcastene dekker et spekter av temaer inkludert åndelig spiritualitet, teologi og aktuelle hendelser fra et katolsk perspektiv. Våre podcaster gir våre lyttere en enkel måte å få tilgang på innhold mens de er på farten, hjemme, eller hvor som helst de befinner seg. 
Ved å tilby podcaster på både norsk og engelsk, sikrer vi at vårt innhold er tilgjengelig for et bredere publikum.

We zijn de thuisbasis van Rocklegends als Rolling Stones, Pink Floyd, Coldplay, Golden Earring, David Bowie en ontelbare anderen die muziekgeschiedenis hebben geschreven! Niet alleen de hits maar ook "million seller" album-tracks en live opnames.

Name: Rádio Nova Era FM 97.5
Description:
Em 1980, no município de Borrazópolis, surge a Rádio Flor do Café, com estúdios na Praça da República. A programação local e regional, utilidade pública e a boa música sertaneja, foi a marca registrada em mais de 10 anos no ar.

A Rádio Nova Era iniciou suas atividades no início da década de 90, onde foi adquirida pelo conhecido e saudoso Pinga Fogo, que teve o nome da emissora modificado, sendo uma empresa do Sistema Pinga Fogo de Comunicação. Em 1994 um novo prédio foi construído na Avenida Paraná (foto), onde se encontra atualmente.

A rádio foi evoluindo e se modernizando, conhecida por ser informativa e musical durante toda a programação, atrai ouvintes das regiões Vale do Ivaí, Campos Gerais e Central do Paraná. Seu objetivo sempre foi e será levar a informação na hora em que os fatos acontecem, de forma clara e objetiva, agradando com sua programação a todos os ouvintes e conquistando elevados índices de audiência.

Hoje, o Sistema Nova Era de Comunicação, conta com novos estúdios modernos, irradiando no dial FM na frequência 97.5 MHz e nas plataformas digitais.

Falamos para mais de 50 municípios com som local pelo FM atingindo mais de 500 mil pessoas.

Name: Remonty TV
Description:
Remonty TV to dynamicznie rozwijający się kanał telewizyjny poświęcony tematyce domu, wnętrz, budownictwa i ogrodnictwa. Jesteśmy miejscem, gdzie pasja do tworzenia spotyka się z fachową wiedzą. Od generalnych remontów, przez prace wykończeniowe, aż po spektakularne metamorfozy ogrodów – pokazujemy, jak zmieniać otoczenie na lepsze.

Wierzymy, że każda przestrzeń ma potencjał. Naszym celem jest nie tylko dostarczanie rozrywki, ale przede wszystkim edukacja. Stawiamy na autentyczność. W naszych programach występują prawdziwi fachowcy, realne problemy i sprawdzone rozwiązania.

Co nas wyróżnia? Praktyka ponad teorię! 
Zero fikcji. Pokazujemy remonty „od kuchni”, zmagania z usterkami i konkretne technologie budowlane. Łączymy "brudną robotę" remontową z estetyką projektowania wnętrz i architekturą krajobrazu.

WSPÓŁPRACA 
Jesteś producentem materiałów budowlanych, narzędzi lub wyposażenia wnętrz? Szukasz skutecznego kanału dotarcia do osób aktywnie remontujących i budujących? Zapraszamy do współpracy przy lokowaniu produktów, sponsoringu oraz projektach specjalnych.
Dołącz do nas! Obserwuj Remonty TV, aby być na bieżąco z trendami w branży Home & Garden oraz naszymi nowościami programowymi.

www.remontytv.pl | biuro@remontytv.pl

Name: WMOI/WRAM Prairie Communications, LLC
Description:
WMOI (97.7 FM) is a radio station broadcasting an adult contemporary format. Licensed to Monmouth, Illinois, the station serves the Monmouth/Galesburg area. WMOI is owned by Robbins-Treat Resources, LLC.

The station began broadcasting December 2, 1967 and held the call sign WVPC-FM. In the 1970s, WVPC-FM aired a MOR format, along with an increasing amount of country music programming. The station was an affiliate of the Mutual Broadcasting System. In 1977, the station’s call sign was changed to WDRL, and in 1981 its call sign was changed to WMOI.

On October 3, 2018, WPW Broadcasting announced a sale of their Monmouth stations WMOI, WRAM, and WRAM’s translator at 94.1, to Monmouth-based Robbins-Treat Resources, LLC for $168,000. The sale was consummated on December 28, 2018.

Name: Grant County Broadcasters, Inc.
Description:
The Oasis is 'Where The Music Went.' In creating the stations, we looked around the Cincinnati/Dayton markets, as well as the rest of the country. We found that, in the vast majority of cases, stations have become over-researched clones trying to deliver essentially the same audience by playing the same few hundred songs over and over.  We also noted with great interest that there were thousands of songs - familiar songs that were huge hits in their day that just disappeared. These songs “aged out” as they got older and didn't focus group test "well" with the younger audiences stations were seeking.

The result was a musical desert. We created The Oasis to solve this problem. Our station is 'Where The Music Went.'

A much larger library means that our station won't bore you to tears with endless repetition. High quality, music-focused personalities means that you get relevant commentary. Finally, our focus on music from the 1960s, 70s and 80s means that - if you are over 40 - there is finally a station playing what you want to hear in an atmosphere that makes you feel welcome.

The Oasis plays all of the music that you never hear on the radio any more. Where did the music go? Simple. It went to FM 94.5, 97.7 & 106.7 The Oasis!

The Radio Hall of Fame is supported via the generous donations from broadcasting companies and organizations creating programming for distribution on broadcast and satellite radio as well as radio personalities and radio management.
Additional support comes from companies serving those organizations and people.

Name: 440Music
Description:
The Standard Membership at 440Music.com, priced at $9.95 per month, is designed for independent musicians, recording studios, record labels, small music businesses, and retailers looking to expand their online presence and maximize promotional opportunities. This tier upgrades members from a subdomain to full URL website hosting, allowing for a more professional and fully branded web presence. Additionally, members benefit from banner ad rotation, ensuring greater visibility across the platform. The email marketing cap increases to 5,000 emails per month, providing artists and businesses with more capacity to engage their audience effectively. The Affiliate Profit Sharing also doubles to 10%, offering a greater earning potential for those who refer others to the platform.

Beyond marketing tools, Standard members enjoy enhanced support and promotional exposure. The Ticket Tech Support System guarantees all inquiries are addressed within 24 hours, ensuring users receive prompt assistance. A key advantage of this membership is the Voice Over Line Drop on all radio stations, increasing the likelihood of being heard by a broader audience. When it comes to commerce, 440Music takes only a 5% share on all sales, making it a cost-effective solution for artists and businesses selling music or merchandise. Job board postings start at $2 with additional options available, while community shopping cart listings are free until the item is sold, at which point the 5% platform share applies. This membership level provides an affordable yet powerful way for independent music professionals to grow their brand, monetize their work, and reach new fans.

Name: Descendances
Description:
Descendances c'est : 

 Un podcast sur la transmission familiale 

Il n’y a pas de famille sans histoire. 
Chaque mois, Descendances donne voix à vos récits intrafamiliaux. À travers des témoignages mêlant intime et enjeux de société, ce podcast tisse et détisse les liens de transmission qui nous unissent et met en lumière les nouvelles manières de faire famille.

 Des ateliers - cercles de parole et d'initiation au podcast 

· Parce que nous pensons qu’il est nécessaire de replacer nos paroles intimes dans un contexte sociétal, social et politique.
· Parce que nous pensons qu’il faut faire émerger le caractère systémique de certaines problématiques familiales.
· Parce que nous croyons que créer une pensée collective est un des moyens pour amorcer des changements pérennes.
· Parce que nous souhaitons transmettre le potentiel expressif du podcast

Name: Dryck Mat & Visdom Podcast
Description:
Podden "Dryck, Mat & Visdom" syftar till att erbjuda en plattform där intresserade personer av mat och dryck, både amatörer och erfarna entusiaster, kan upptäcka och lära sig mer om de olika aspekterna av gastronomi. 

Podcasten kombinerar vår entusiasm och kunskap inom området med insikter från en rad olika experter för att erbjuda lyssnarna engagerande och informativa avsnitt. Målet är att inspirera, utbilda och berika lyssnarnas förståelse för mat och dryckeskultur, produktion och vetenskap inom dryck och mat.

I "Dryck, Mat & Visdom" bjuder vi in gäster såsom vinproducenter, sommelierer, kockar, kemister och andra framstående experter inom gastronomi för att dela med sig av deras kunskaper och erfarenheter. Våra samtal sträcker sig över ämnen som vinets finesser, sprit- och öldryckesproduktionens vetenskap och matens magiska sammansättningar.

Samtliga avsnitt kommer att vara tillgängliga på alla större plattformar som Spotify, Apple Podcasts och Google Podcasts. Vår Podcasthost är Acast AB och vi släpper ett nytt avsnitt varannan vecka.

Name: Making Yourself at Home
Description:
Join Clara (Spain), Brian (USA), and Alina (Romania) as we explore what it means to “make yourself at home” in New Zealand—especially in Taranaki.

Making Yourself at Home is a welcoming space where migrants and Kiwis share their personal stories, unique perspectives, and the journey of settling into life in Aotearoa. Each episode features real conversations that highlight community projects, programs, and initiatives supporting a smoother transition and stronger connections.

Proudly supported by the Ethnic Communities Development Fund through the Ministry for Ethnic Communities, we celebrate diversity, grow skills, and create spaces where all cultures feel seen, heard, and at home.

Description:
128db Rock Radio is where volume meets vision. Broadcasting & streaming hard rock and heavy metal around the clock, we’re more than just a station — we’re a community of fans, musicians, and creators who live loud and think louder.

From legendary anthems to emerging underground acts, our programming delivers raw power, deep cuts, and the stories behind the sound. We amplify voices that deserve to be heard, with original segments, exclusive interviews, and high-voltage playlists that keep our listeners plugged in and powered up.

Name: Intraframe
Description:
Intraframe is a broadcast and media systems integrator delivering tailored solutions for studios, networks, and enterprises across UK, Australia and India. We specialise in designing, installing, and supporting end-to-end broadcast, AV, and media workflows — from live production and post-production to consultancy and managed services.

Our clients include broadcasters, post-production houses, financial organisations, and independent media creators who rely on us to keep their systems running seamlessly. Whether it’s building resilient infrastructure, streamlining workflows, or deploying the latest AV technology, Intraframe provides solutions that balance innovation with reliability.

What sets us apart is our ability to bridge global expertise with local delivery — combining decades of broadcast engineering knowledge with a hands-on, collaborative approach. We don’t just install technology; we help clients solve problems, reduce downtime, and future-proof their operations.

Services we provide:

- Broadcast system design & integration
- Studio & control room builds
- AV and media workflow solutions
- Managed services & maintenance
- Consultancy & project planning

Description: MIT Radio Station is new venture at Manipal. We are looking to be the official audio partner at all events organised at MAHE.  Our broadcasts offer a platform to all students to showcase their talents in various domains.

Name: The Dads Radio Show
Description:
The Dad's Radio Show promotes support for dads in the community.

To be an inclusive and supportive group where listeners can connect with other local dads to chat about anything to do with fatherhood and life in general.

The Dad's Radio Show is a show connecting like-minded dads in the Hills, Cumberland, Blacktown and Parramatta communities, linking listeners to men with similar interests.

And when needed link them to support services to help with anything to do with fatherhood and life in general.

The Dad's Radio Show gets their audience to engage with the show, with light humour through dad jokes, and banter amongst men, but dealing with the real pressure’s parents (especially dads) face every day.

Focusing on Men’s health, wellbeing, social groups and support mechanisms that currently exist in our community.

The Dad's Radio Show has a wide community to cater for, focusing on “Blokey” light Rock and music of the 80’s 90’s 00’s and 10’s.

The Dad's Radio Show presenters are passionate local dads who get involved and give back to the community!

The Dad's Radio Show is brought to you by Darrell Milton, Roy Padlan and Graham McFarland.
#theDadsRadioShow

Name: Our Body Politic
Description: Created and hosted by award-winning journalist Farai Chideya, Our Body Politic is unapologetically centered on reporting on not just how women of color experience the major political events of today, but how they're impacting those very issues. Weekly episodes feature in-depth conversations about the economy, health, politics, education, the environment, and the most prescient issues —because all issues are women's issues. Tune in every Friday everywhere you listen to podcasts, and on public radio stations around the country.

Name: KX FM
Description:
KX FM (KXRN-LP) is a non-commercial, member- supported radio station dedicated to connecting Laguna's creative community through unique, alternative music, local performances, and public affairs programming that informs, educates, entertains, and inspires.

KX FM is champion of new music but loves the classics, too. We play "Generational Alt Rock" from the 1960s to now. Our beachside studio is perfect for local acts and touring bands to stop by. 

KX FM is also a dynamic education resource, providing Laguna residents and visitors with valuable, timely information on its community calendar, local news and weather, beach and surf conditions, traffic, as well as training and internships for students. 

KX FM aims to lead the rebirth of FM radio, enriching our listeners with the discovery of alternative music, views, and culture that elevates Laguna Beach on a global scale.

KX FM is an FCC-licensed, Low-Power FM (LPFM) radio station and is a 501(c)(3) non-profit. It can be heard worldwide at www.kxfmradio.org

Name: Televio
Description:
Televio is a new OTT platform offering online reception of TV channels.

We go beyond the classic idea of watching TV. We make the most popular stations available via the internet, so our users can watch their favourite programmes wherever they want, playing them on their Smart TV, phone or laptop.

We offer advanced features that allow pausing, rewinding or recording selected programmes. Viewers decide for themselves what to watch and when – they can rewind channels for up to 7 days and record up to 120 hours directly in the app.

Our service is available in Poland and throughout the European Union, on any ISP. We offer over 100 channels, which are included in the basic and thematic packages. Keep an eye open for our content, as we are constantly updating and adding new channels.

We support most platforms, including Smart TVs (Samsung, LG, Philips, Sony, TCL and others), Android TV and Apple TV set-top boxes, mobile devices, as well as most web browsers. Televio apps are available for download from mobile app stores, including Google Play and the App Store.

The Televio service is provided by the Polish company Horyzont Media SP. z.o.o., part of ModernTV s.r.o., which operates worldwide as an IPTV technology provider.

Name: 507 heures le podcast
Description:
507 heures est un podcast créé par une comédienne, Laurie Ravaux. Chaque dimanche à 16h, un nouvel épisode avec un.e technicien-ne du cinéma et/ou de l’audiovisuel différent-e.
À travers des entretiens de 45 à 80 minutes, l'émission explore le parcours professionnel et la carrière de chaque invité. Ils couvrent différents axes de discussion : l'éco-production, la représentation féminine, la diversité et l'inclusivité au sein de l’industrie.
Un film, une série, un clip ou une publicité ne peuvent voir le jour sans le travail de toute l’équipe en coulisses. C’est la raison pour laquelle 507 heures s’efforce de sensibiliser le plus grand nombre à ces métiers souvent méconnus. 
Le podcast s’adresse au grand public, aux professionnel-les du secteur et aux étudiant-es, aspirant-es à exercer un métier dans le milieu du cinéma et de l’audiovisuel.

Name: ReporterNet

Reporter erstellen kostenlos bei ReporterNet ein Profil, laden ihre geschriebenen Beiträge, Meldungen und Interviews in den Beitragspool hoch und fügen optional Bilder, O-Töne und andere Medien hinzu.

Radiosender haben ebenfalls einen kostenfreien Zugang zu ReporterNet und können dort Beiträge suchen, entdecken und kaufen. Der Kaufpreis für die Werke wird direkt vom Autor festgelegt und auf dessen Konto ausgezahlt. Der Sender kann sich den Beitrag mit nur wenigen Klicks herunterladen und in sein Programm integrieren.

Name: Semillas de Éxito
Description:
Lanzamos “Semillas de Éxito” 

En Siembra Capital sabemos que emprender no es un camino fácil, pero también que las grandes historias comienzan con una semilla.
Por eso nace nuestro nuevo podcast: “Semillas de Éxito”, un espacio creado para emprendedores y startups que buscan respuestas claras, experiencias reales y herramientas prácticas para hacer crecer sus proyectos.

 Cada episodio abordará dudas frecuentes del ecosistema emprendedor:
 Cómo validar una idea de negocio.
 Errores comunes en las primeras rondas de financiación.
 Qué esperan realmente los inversores.
 Estrategias para escalar con sostenibilidad.

Nuestro propósito es acompañarte en cada etapa del camino y ofrecerte la inspiración y el conocimiento que necesitas para transformar tu proyecto en una empresa de éxito.

 Porque toda gran historia comienza con una semilla.

 Muy pronto disponible en las principales plataformas de podcast.

#SemillasDeÉxito #Podcast #Startups #Emprendimiento #SiembraCapital

Name: Eat and Critique
Description:
Have you ever wondered where to dine at the good, the bad and the ugly? Well, look no further and join Steve O and Sophia at www.w4cy.com on Mondays at 6pm. The Eat and Critique show hosted by award winning Steve O and Sophia will present listeners with the best of the best and worst of the worse.

Some of the top chefs are interviewed and hidden gems are found, as well as
nightmares. The banter is real, and the show is informative with a combination of serious and humorous stories of dining out. The hosts are passionate and have engaging descriptions of the menu items. Listeners are always saying they are hungry after hearing the reviews

The dynamic duo understands listeners and viewers work hard for their money
and there are thousands of restaurants to choose from so they set out to do the leg work and share their findings with their audience.

What sets this show apart, besides not accepting money from the restaurants they review, is that Steve O and Sophia look for family owned local restaurants to promote.

Looking for entertainment? Listeners have said they did not want to call
in as they were fearful of missing the next conversation. Many superstars have
aired on the show, Chef George Patti, Diners Dives and Drive Ins and owner of the Meat Eatery in Boca Raton, Chef Max Santiago, world renowned pastry chef and owner of Max’d Out Donuts, Gloria Estefan and Steve Martorano, Chef John Moeller who served in the White House for both Bush’s and Clinton, KC from the KC & The Sunshine Band and many others. 
Want to win a gift certificate to dine at one of the reviewed restaurants? 

Call in or chat during the show and have a chance to win. Tune in to win and have an entertaining evening. See you soon www.w4cy.com Mondays 6 pm.

Name: Fundacja Audionomia
Description:
Jesteśmy jedyną w Polsce organizacją, która skupia praktyków i badaczy audio. Działamy po to, aby popularyzować i promować reportaż dźwiękowy  i dokument artystyczny. Zajmujemy się także prowadzeniem warsztatów w zakresie uważnego słuchania dla uczniów szkół, przedszkoli, ale przede wszystkim dla edukatorek i edukatorów. W lutym 2024 wydaliśmy pionierskie w Polsce opracowanie książkowe “Słuchaj, aby zrozumieć. Audioedukacja dla szkół” w partnerstwie z Fundacją PZU, Fundacją Spiżarnia oraz Stowarzyszeniem “Komfort Ciszy”.

Organizujemy spotkania z reportażem z cyklu “Film bez obrazu”, które odbyły się już w Gdańsku, Łodzi i Warszawie. Współpracujemy z różnymi instytucjami, którym – tak jak nam – zależy na rozwijaniu dialogu między ludźmi.

Od 2022 roku organizujemy Ogólnopolską Konferencję Reportażu Dźwiękowego “Audionomia” oraz konkurs na najlepszy reportaż dźwiękowy w Polsce “Audionomia Awards”.

Name: Hodge-Cast Productions
Description:
My name is Daniel Hodges, I’m a Philanthropist, a Fundraiser, a world record holder and now a podcast host. 

I’ve been at rock bottom; the lowest of the low, even attempting suicide, to then change my life around; through fundraising and philanthropy efforts. 

This podcast, is my way of giving back, using the challenges I’ve overcome as the catalyst.

The main focus of the show is to interview guests who have faced their own challenges in life; how they have overcame adversity and to tell their stories on a public platform; so that the listener can enjoy, relate and take inspiration from their lived experiences.

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@HodgeCast
IG: @hodgecastpodcast

Name: Bold Let's Talk
Description:
Bold Let's Talk is a 30-minute student-run and produced show designed to bring awareness to the variety of mental health issues that student-athletes experience.

Our show will be streamed on our YouTube channel, @boldletstalk, on December 1st and will feature fun and meaningful segments. These segments include athletes sharing their mental health stories, professional advice on how to take care of your mental health and educational sections on CTE, concussions and their impacts on mental health.

This show was created for our Intermediate Multi-Camera class, with 100% of the proceeds benefiting Kids Help Phone, a youth mental health organization. Every donor will get a shoutout on our Instagram, @boldletstalk!

More information about Kids Help Phone: Kids Help Phone is Canada's only 24/7 e-mental health service offering free, confidential support in English and French to young people. As the country's virtual care expert, we give youth a safe, trusted space to talk over phone or through text or in self-directed supports in any moment of crisis or need. Since 1989, we have offered kids, teens and young adults a critical lifeline of hope and support through our free services.

Name: Bedrock Radio
Description:
Bedrock Radio is a charity-led local radio station broadcasting on DAB Digital Radio, providing a Community and Hospital Radio service across. North East London & South West Essex. 

As Romford’s longest running local radio service, we’re proud to deliver health-focused programming and community updates 24/7. 
Our objective is to promote health and well-being by broadcasting engaging content that supports healthier lifestyles.

We provide hospital radio services across Queen's & King George Hosptials (BHR Hospitals), Goodmayes & Units (NELFT) and Whipps Cross Hospital (Barts Health Trust), reaching patients, staff, and local residents across North East London & beyond!
 
Listen into Bedrock Radio: In local hospitals, on the Bedrock Radio App, smart speakers, online, and on DAB+ digital radio across NE London & SW Essex. 

Our team is made of approximately 20 volunteers, who give their time generously to running the charity, which includes our board of elected Trustees. 
Discover more about us, join our team, how to support us, advertise on—air and read our history at our website https://bedrock.radio

Name: BrandB Rad!o
Description:
BrandB Rad!o will be The First Mass-Media ‘Call to Action’ For The Planet! Always Up-to-Date with the Unfolding Climate Story; Reflecting, Analysing and Positively Affecting the NOW of Our Climate & Biodiversity Crisis.

Presenting Quality Spoken-Word and Music, Globally, 24/7. We’ll be Musically On-it, Informative, Entertaining, Experimental & Daring in part, and a Helpful and Uplifting Companion to the Listeners’ Days .. and Nights.

Manifesting the Positive News and Green-thinking around Sustainability, Biodiversity, Health and Wellbeing, Food & Drink, Travel, Fashion, Arts & Culture. From Guest Podcasts to Guided Meditations, Up-to-Date Interviews to Quirky ECOtainment and Classic Contemporary Music, BrandB Rad!o’s Talent will Create Programmes Which Have a Different Effect. 

We will Promote Sustainable, Eco-wise Goods and Services to a Listenership who are Awake to the Power Their Buying Choices Have for the Future of .. well, Everything!

BrandB Rad!o is involving Young People at all levels of its organisation and production-team and will feature Their News and Views to Inspire the Rest of Our Rising Population.

We’d love the chance to share more details about BrandB Rad!o and get to know you and your work, the better to Understand How We Can Amplify Your Voice, Story and Adventure. 

Open For Businesses & Concerns Addressing the Climate & Biodiversity Crisis.

Email info@brandbradio.com to Collaborate.

Many of our presenters have a Disability or Health or Mental Health issue and inspire our listeners through their journey. We have had over 150 volunteers over 2 years and very proud of our volunteers who work hard to bring our listeners evidence based content.

If you have a business, a cause or Music you would like to promote, we would love to hear from you. We are all about promoting people and love to share your story. Send us an email and let's get to know you and share your passion.

Description:

Cada setmana donem veu a empresaris, emprenedors, professionals i agents socials que, des de la seva autenticitat, comparteixen experiències i eines per créixer personalment i professionalment.

La nostra missió és clara: posar en valor el talent local i global, crear xarxa i oferir un altaveu a iniciatives transformadores que contribueixen al progrés de les persones i de la comunitat.

Al programa hi trobaràs:
 Entrevistes inspiradores amb líders de diferents àmbits.
 Una mirada propera i humana al món de l’empresa, l’emprenedoria i la innovació.
 Un espai per connectar idees, persones i projectes.

 Si vols conèixer històries que et motivin, descobrir noves perspectives i aprendre dels qui ja han recorregut el camí, LÍDERS és el teu programa.

 Pots escoltar-nos a Ràdio Caldes i recuperar tots els episodis al web: www.programaliders.cat

Name: Global Boost Media, Inc
Description:
Global Boost Media is architecting the world's first institutional-grade 24/7 cryptocurrency television network, delivering Bloomberg-caliber broadcast journalism exclusively focused on the $2.8 trillion digital asset ecosystem. Our state-of-the-art OTT streaming infrastructure combines traditional broadcast production values with cutting-edge blockchain data visualization, delivering real-time market intelligence across smart TVs, mobile platforms, and web interfaces with sub-200ms global latency.

Unlike aggregator platforms or podcast-quality streams, Global Boost Media employs veteran financial journalists supported by quantitative analysts, blockchain engineers, and market structure experts. Our multi-CDN architecture ensures 99.99% uptime with adaptive bitrate streaming supporting 4K resolution. We're not just reporting on the crypto revolution—we're building the definitive broadcast infrastructure for the institutional digital asset economy.

Name: JAM OUAGA RADIO
Description:
Radio JAM Ouaga, la radio des leaders émet sur la fréquence modulée 92.4. Elle existe dans le paysage radiophonique burkinabé depuis le 24 Juin 2008. Elle diffuse ses émissions en boucle 24h/24, 7 jours /7 sauf en cas de panne technique la bande 92.4 FM. La programmation fait la part belle à la diffusion de la musique.

Nous portons une attention particulière aux besoins de la jeunesse, et nous avons à cœur de les refléter dans nos actions et notre programmation. En tant que diffuseur privé, nous sommes guidés par notre mission, notre vision et nos valeurs. Notre objectif est de créer un lien entre tous nos auditeurs, et de faire connaître notre culture nos nouvelles, au Burkina Faso et dans le monde entier, jour après jour.

Notre Mission
Radio JAM fait rayonner la culture du Burkina Faso et soutient la vie démocratique en offrant un large éventail de contenus diversifiés qui informent, éclairent et divertissent. Notre Vision
Amener nos auditeurs à se battre pour réaliser leurs rêves.

Nos Valeurs
Intégrité, Responsabilité, Créativité, Résilience.

Difundimos nuestras producciones de televisión en Torremolinos Tv, el canal municipal de dicho municipio, y las radiofónicas en Canal Málaga Radio, que es el medio municipal de la capital malagueña. Además nuestros espacios se emiten a través de YouTube, Spotify, Ivoox y en RRSS como Instagram y Facebook. 

Este medio de comunicación universitario, se nutre de estudiantes de la Facultad de Ciencias de la Comunicación de la Universidad de Málaga, que realizan sus prácticas curriculares gracias al impulso del decanato de la facultad, que cede las instalaciones, suministra los materiales, y apoya, junto a diversos vicerrectorados, a un equipo formado por profesorado y personal técnico que realiza las funciones de dirección, coordinación y formación del alumnado durante todo el periodo de prácticas.

Nuestra formación se basa en el "aprender haciendo" así como en la rotación de roles, por lo que el equipo de aproximadamente 35 estudiantes que recibimos cada temporada (semestre) debe encargarse de realizar todas las tareas asociadas al correcto funcionamiento de una radio-televisión (asemejada a local) bajo una supervisión constante. 

Entre nuestros objetivos se encuentran ofrecer una formación práctica complementaria a la recibida por el alumnado  durante el grado, así como difundir las investigaciones, descubrimientos y actividades que se llevan a cabo en el seno de la Universidad de Málaga para trasladarlos a la comunidad universitaria y a la sociedad malagueña.

Name: Malta Broadcasting Authority
Description:
The Broadcasting Authority monitors and regulates all Radio and Television broadcasts originating from the Maltese Islands. It is an independent statutory body consisting of a Chairman and four other members appointed by the President of Malta acting in accordance with the advice of the Prime Minister given after consultation with the Leader of the Opposition.

The Broadcasting Authority supervises all local broadcasting stations and ensures their compliance with legal and licence obligations as well as the preservation of due impartiality; in respect of matters of political or industrial controversy or relating to current public policy; while fairly apportioning broadcasting facilities and time between persons who belong to different political parties. The Broadcasting Authority ensures that local broadcasting services consist of public, private and community broadcasts that offer varied and comprehensive programming to cater for all interests and tastes.

The Broadcasting Authority’s aim is to help the Maltese public better understand how its values and diversities shape our unique personality by regulating local broadcasting services in open flexible ways fostering creativity and better programming.

À Sky Réunion, notre engagement envers la musique locale est inébranlable. Plongez dans les sons ensoleillés du maloya et les rythmes endiablés du sega. Sky vous offre un voyage auditif incomparable à travers les richesses musicales de La Réunion.

Mais ce n'est pas tout ! Nos années de Bollywood captivent l'auditoire avec des hits intemporels et des bandes originales de films qui évoquent des souvenirs nostalgiques. Laissez-vous emporter par les mélodies entraînantes, les paroles émouvantes et les rythmes enivrants de la musique indienne, créant une expérience immersive digne des plus grands films de Bollywood.

Sky Réunion n'est pas seulement une radio, c'est un rendez-vous avec la culture, la tradition et la passion. 
Bienvenue à bord de notre voyage musical exaltant !

Name: Beyond Labels with Jeannie
Description:
Welcome to “Beyond Labels with Jeannie,” a radio show that breaks down barriers and celebrates the beauty of diversity, acceptance, and mental well-being.

In a world often defined by labels, “Beyond Labels with Jeannie” stands as a beacon of understanding and compassion. Hosted by the insightful and engaging Jeannie, this show invites you to step into a world where preconceptions are shattered, and hearts are opened.

Every Sunday from 12 PM to 2 PM, “Beyond Labels with Jeannie” takes you on a journey through the human experience. We dive deep into mental health discussions, exploring the complexities of our minds with empathy and expertise. Jeannie, our compassionate guide, helps us navigate the often challenging terrain of mental well-being, offering insights, support, and hope.

But this show is about more than just mental health. It’s a celebration of diversity and love. We proudly wave the rainbow flag, dedicating time to paint rainbows of love for the LGBTQIA+ community. Our commitment to acceptance knows no bounds, as we cherish uniqueness in all its forms, promoting a world where everyone’s voice is heard and valued.

As you tune in, you’ll find yourself grooving to the rhythm of love and acceptance. The music we feature is more than a soundtrack; it’s a heartbeat that underscores our mission to spread love, unity, and positivity.

“Beyond Labels with Jeannie” is your Sunday sanctuary of understanding, compassion, and connection. Whether you’re seeking guidance, inspiration, or simply a moment of reflection, we invite you to join us and become a part of our ever-growing community.

Engaging mental health discussions
LGBTQIA+ pride and support
Embrace of diversity and uniqueness
Uplifting music selections
Heartfelt conversations
Tune in every Sunday from 12 PM to 2 PM and experience the magic of “Beyond Labels with Jeannie.” Together, we’re rewriting the narrative of acceptance, one episode at a time. Join us on this remarkable journey!

The Sugar Mama is a TV series rooted in The Sugar Mama’s story of overcoming adversity.

The Sugar Mama is a successful business owner who has contributed to over 100 creative projects and organizations, helping to produce films, compose music, publish books, create art, and start new businesses.

The Sugar Mama experienced hardship from divorce, relying on the Food Bank and working her way out of nearly half a million-dollar debt. This experience transformed her in ways she never imagined, which has led to an unscripted television documentary series dedicated to advancing the careers of Canadian artists for a chance to receive $100,000.  

This series is not just about the talent of creatives. It is about their stories, demonstrating character and their pursuit to achieve their dreams and inspiring viewers to explore their journeys.

From chart-topping hits and original productions to engaging live shows and digital campaigns, Play Radio has become a trusted partner for brands and a home for listeners seeking something bold and fresh. RAPMA FM sendiri sebagai salah satu UKM memberikan kontribusi untuk Universitas Muhammadiyah Surakarta dan telah diberikan kepercayaan untuk mempublikasikan dan menginformasikan tentang segala hal mengenai seputaran dunia kampus dan hasil-hasil kampus Universitas Muhammadiyah Surakarta kepada mahasiswa, masyarakat luar ataupun khalayak ramai.

Visi :

Menjadikan Radio RAPMA FM sebagai wadah penyaluran minat dan bakat akademis agar menjadi generasi muda yang berprestasi dan membawa harum almamater Universitas Muhammadiyah Surakarta sebagai kampus komunitas dan profesional dalam mendidik kreatifitas mahasiswa dalam bidang Broadcast dan Kepenyiaran Publik yang masih terlingkup dalam ruang radio RAPMA FM sebagai media informasi, hiburan, serta dakwah yang terkhususkan pada pengkajian dan pencerahan keilmuan dan keislamaan.

Misi :
1. Meningkatkan kualitas dan kuantitas siaran 15 jam sehari dengan memuat komplek yang lebih menyeimbangkan antara akademis dan kampus.
2. Menjadikan radio sebagai satu-satunya motivasi mahasiswa untuk berkarya dan mengekspreasikan diri dalam menghadapi kebosanan dan kejenuhan.
3. Menjadikan radio sebagai media pengenalan ilmu akademik dengan kemasan yang menarik dan menjadikan akademik bukan suatu ruang membosankan tetapi menjadi sajian praktis dan konjungtif.

We find, develop, format and produce gripping true stories featuring people doing things differently.

From those who would change the world to visionary talent in their field and those bravely doing their own thing on the fringes of society, we put extraordinary people and paradigm-changing ideas front and centre in all our content. 

After a career developing commercially successful and award-winning series and formats, Creative Director Claire Urquhart has set up Silver Strand to focus on telling powerful, uplifting true stories that shine a light on people who are doing things differently and risking it all to stand in truth, beauty and authenticity.

Known for bringing a spark to difficult subject matter and unique stories about people who are making an impact and creating legacy in the real world, Claire now looks for these qualities in all of Silver Strand's productions. 

Silver Strand always has and always will collaborate with people from different industries, backgrounds and perspectives to tell stories that connect us.

They say 'your vibe attracts your tribe', Silver Strand's vibe is about being genuine and spending time with people to really listen to what they have to say and help them tell their truth.

programs cover local, national, and international events. 
In addition to news and current affairs, the station also features a variety of entertainment 
programs, including music shows, comedy skits, and cultural programs, all of which 
showcase the rich cultural heritage of the Hausa people. 
Naija Hausa TV has quickly become a popular source of information and entertainment for 
the Hausa-speaking community in Nigeria and beyond, with its online presence making it 
accessible to audiences all over the world. The station's commitment to quality 
programming and its dedication to serving its audience has earned it a loyal following and 
cemented its position as a leading online television station in Nigeria.

Name: Rádio Krokodýl
Description:
Rádio Krokodýl je nejposlouchanější regionální rádio v České republice a dlouhodobě nejposlouchanější rádio v Brně a okolí.  Vysíláme od roku 1994.
Milujeme Brno a jižní Moravu, jsme tady doma už více než 30 let.

Vysíláme na 13 frekvencích z Brna pro jižní Moravu i Vysočinu. Naladíte nás ve Vyškově, Hodoníně, Břeclavi, Znojmě, Boskovicích, Žďáru nad Sázavou, Velkém Meziříčí, Třebíči, Moravských Budějovicích, Svitavách, Jihlavě a Dačicích.

Hrajeme hit za hitem a přitom ani jeden 2x. Máme pro Vás největší hudební výběr pečlivě vybraných hitů od 80. 90. let, až po současnost.

Sledujeme živě dění v Brně a na jižní Moravě. V našem vysílání uslyšíte aktuální a ověřené zprávy z Vašeho kraje. To vše přináší náš tým profesionálních moderátorů a zprávařů. Máme nejpřesnější předpověď počasí a nejrychlejší dopravní servis pro Brno a jižní Moravu.

Rádio Krokodýl je jediné komerční rádio, které vysílá kompletně svůj program z Brna. Ostatní rádia odletěla do Prahy. Krokodýl zůstává a je tady pro Vás už více než 30 let.

Jsme rádio, které Vás baví, pomáhá a rozdává dobrou náladu.

Name: Her Voice in the House
Description:
Welcome to Her Voice in the House, a new podcast that through the eyes and ears of noble Lords, will seek to find out what it’s like for female Peers that know better than anyone else precisely what the House of Lords is really like. 

In their own words share what it’s like to be a Peer, the issues they’re championing and their views on the role of the upper chamber and it’s place in both the UK and global democracies. 

We’ll also explore the difference they’re making through their platform in the Lords and how it’s encouraging more women into all types of public service.

There’s so many distinguished and talented women who have taken their seats on these benches- Her Voice in the House will spotlight those on the ‘red side’ of Parliament and lift the lid on this very unique British institution. From former Leaders of the Lords to broadcasters, political operators to businesswomen, join us on this journey and listen to ‘her voice,’ with your host, Laura Dunn.

When Professor Hilgers first started in the media and speaking industry, there were no classes you could take and there was no one who could tell us how to launch our media business or a career in the media and speaking industry.

Create a Website

Use Your Voice

Speaking Professionally

Professor Hilgers has acquired more than 20 years of experience in the media and speaking industry.

She has been a professor of entrepreneurship for more than 25 years – including 10 years at one of the top universities in the world, UC Berkeley. She has worked for the small business administration, advising small businesses. During the start of the covid pandemic, she raised more than 6.5 million dollars in working capital for local businesses and helped save countless businesses from bankruptcy. Over the years, she has guided the launch of thousands of successful businesses. Her business coaching services had a 3-month waiting list.

Professor Hilgers has Syndicated many shows on terrestrial radio, Television, online radio networks, and podcasts. She has used her professional speaking experience and successful speaking career to teach countless people how to speak professionally and operate a successful speaking business.

LeAnn Hilgers is the proud owner of Motivating Radio.  She is the CEO/CMO and works tirelessly to ensure the success of everyone involved with Motivating Radio. 

Anyone can sign up for a podcast but being successful and professional requires a unique and highly specific skill set, business acumen, and experience. We have an abundance of experience and expertise at Motivating Radio, it is our mission to help you be successful! There is no need to struggle to get started

Name: Tom Edwards Sound
Description:
When you've invested your time and energy into creating a TV program, film, or digital video, you want to ensure that your content sounds its best. Trusting a skilled and experienced professional to handle the audio post-production can make all the difference.

With over 15 years of experience in the broadcast industry, I am a highly skilled and experienced freelance dubbing mixer. I have worked on some of the most popular TV and streamed shows for networks such as the BBC, Netflix, and Fox. Specialising in mixing sound for factual programming, I have also lent my expertise to corporate videos, radio ads, and podcasts for well-known brands like Coca Cola, AXA, and Walmart. Some of my career highlights include working with talented screen actors such as Dawn French, Richard Curtis, and Rick Stein.

I collaborate with production companies, post houses, and agencies and with the ability to work both remotely from my Pro Tools studio and on-location in post-production facilities, I am dedicated to delivering exceptional results with a personal touch. Don't settle for anything less, reach out to me today to discover how I can enhance the audio of your project and make it truly stand out.

Name: TRK Kyiv/Kyiv24
Description:
We are Kyiv TV News channel, Radio Kyiv 98FM, and the digital division Kyiv. Media working together as one single under the united news brand Kyiv24. We’re a modern newsroom that puts people first, creating content that matters to our audience. We strive to be the most trusted media in Ukraine. Our team is made up of 350+ experienced professionals who are passionate about creating high-quality, engaging content. We report on what matters to our viewers, from local news to national and international events.
We are a Ukrainian free-to-air public service run by the Kyiv city public media company (TRK Kyiv), founded on August 21, 1995, by the Kyiv City Council to provide comprehensive local and national news coverage. According to its public mission, TRK Kyiv is obliged to offer a broad range of high-quality and various programming in the field of information, journalism, culture, entertainment, education, and sport, characterized by pluralism, balance, and independence as well as innovation, experiment and creativity and integrity of the message, which in particular appeals to the interests of a diverse society.
As a result of a profound transformation conducted by a new management team invited by Vitali Klitschko, Mayor of Kyiv, Kyiv turned into a modern advanced news channel built to U.S. standards; its viewership has grown exponentially. According to Nielsen, TRK Kyiv became one of the most watched cable news networks in 2022, with a well-developed regional coverage and essential digital presence across all platforms. 
TRK Kyiv is based at the state-of-the-art-equipped broadcasting compound in Kyiv Podil.
As a public service broadcaster, TRK Kyiv is afforded free carriage; its Livestream is universally available on the terrestrial platform (T2), most cable, VOD, and streaming services as well satellite Astra 4A in Europe, North Africa, and the Middle East and online globally on our website Kyiv. Media and YouTube.

Description: Soulful Streaming is your go-to podcast for inspiration, insights and deep dives into topics that send tidal waves of truth into your soul.  The stars aligned when hosts Tina and Ali both bought houses in the same neighborhood. Both being the kind of women that enjoy a stroll through the neighborhood and deep conversations, it was only fate that the two would soon realize they were destined to be soulful sisters.  What started out as exchanging podcasts, sharing the occasional slipstream, and new found wisdom turned into the idea to hit record on these soulful conversations.  Whether you are in a season of change or looking to deepen your mind, body, soul connection we have an episode for you.  The show is broken up into seasons to allow time for rest and integration.  Because when we fill our own cup, we have the capacity to share with others.  On the show Ali and Tina interview guests with a wide range of expertise. Name: 96.3 FM OHM Radio
Description:
Ohm Radio is Charleston’s first community, commercial-free radio station! We have been on the air 24/7 Since August 1, 2015. Ohm Radio will broadcast music by local, independent, and legendary artists. We’ll spread the good word about what local entrepreneurs, non-profits, and social groups are doing to enhance our community. We will unite Charleston’s diverse community of voices with original and creative programming.

Ohm Radio’s Mission Statement:
Ohm Radio provides listener-supported, non-profit, non-commercial, locally-produced programming dedicated to serving Charleston, SC with a wide range of community perspectives. We operate in a nonpartisan, nonsectarian manner. We believe that democracy cannot flourish when only a few have access to the media, so we aspire to be a forum for voices and points of view that are underrepresented in our community’s existing media. Our goal is to inform and empower listeners to play an active role in Ohm Radio and in the Charleston community. Our programming promotes the arts, equality, peace, sustainability, democracy, health, and social and economic justice. Name: Rádio Tatuapé FM
Description:
A história da Rádio Tatuapé FM é uma jornada fascinante que remonta à sua fundação no Bairro do Tatuapé, em São Paulo, uma localidade que tem raízes profundas, datando de mais de 352 anos atrás. No cenário radiofônico, a emissora emergiu na década de 1990, marcando seu início transmitindo na frequência de 89.5 MHz.

Durante seus primeiros anos, a Radio Tatuapé FM enfrentou desafios, operando de forma intermitente e mudando sua presença no dial paulistano e frequências. Apesar de sua relativa obscuridade, a rádio ganhou destaque entre os entusiastas do rock clássico, conquistando um lugar especial nos corações dos ouvintes.

Em um ponto crucial de sua trajetória, em 2012, a Empresa Like Look Solutions assumiu a responsabilidade de revitalizar a Rádio Tatuapé FM, trazendo-a de volta à comunidade paulistana com renovada vitalidade. Este renascimento marcou a Rádio Tatuapé FM como a primeira no Brasil a transmitir em qualidade excepcional, atingindo 320 kbps em seu próprio site oficial, www.radiotatuapefm.com.br.

Atualmente, a influência da Rádio Tatuapé FM ultrapassa as fronteiras nacionais, atraindo ouvintes de diversas partes do mundo, incluindo a Sérvia, grande parte da Europa, Estados Unidos, Rússia e muitos outros países. A rádio se tornou um verdadeiro patrimônio mundial, levando o espírito do rock aos quatro cantos do globo.

A década de 90 testemunhou os desafios enfrentados pela Rádio Tatuapé FM em sua busca para garantir um lugar no dial de São Paulo. Intervenções da Polícia Federal resultaram no fechamento da rádio devido a atrasos na apresentação de licenças para transmissão. Equipamentos foram apreendidos, e a rádio foi lacrada. No entanto, a resiliência prevaleceu, e hoje a programação da rádio é uma expressão diversificada, abraçando estilos que vão desde o Classic Rock, Hard Rock, anos 70, 80 e 90, Heavy Metal tradicional até raridades e B-Sides de diversos gêneros.

Name: Radio Wa 89.8 FM - Limited
Description:
With a loyal and faithful audience, Radio WA has designed program content for both entertainment and informative purposes; this is a strategy to give its shareholders’ who are comprised of upper and middle classes and advertisers value for money.
Radio WA is ranked the best Luo Radio station in Lango Sub-Region Northern Uganda by different Media Research Agencies with the widest coverage.
Background
In 1998, the Ugandan Episcopal Conference decided to have a network of FM radio stations within the country and it chose Lira as its main link in the Northern region. Radio Wa 89.8 FM Limited started its broadcasts in January 2001 as a community radio belonging to the Catholic Diocese of Lira. When Radio Wa started broadcasting, it was the third radio station in Lira.

Radio Wa 89.8 FM Limited, is a non-profit oriented community Radio located near Lira Cathedral Parish main Church in; Cathedral Cell, Ojwina (A) Ward, Lira City West division, Lira City.
Its main goal is to promote harmony, peace, justice and development primarirly in rural communities of Lango Sub region, comprising the following districts: (Lira City Council, Apac, Lira, Kwania Dokolo, Oyam, Otuke, Alebtong, Kole and Amolatar and beyond due to its signal strength of 4KW, an equivalent of (4000 Watts) transmitter which is the highest in Northern region. This gives it a wider coverage than any other radio in the locality and beyond.

Radio Wa has the most diverse programming than any radio stations in the Northern Region. The programs feature music, drama, talk shows, spot messages, DJ mentions, short drama skits, informercials and religious presentations with commercials at regular intervals.
