Name: Dixi Media Moldova
Description:
Dixi Media – un pilon al industriei media din Moldova, care a redefinit standardele radiodifuziunii și ale publicității. Deținem trei stații de radio emblematic – HIT FM, Radio Relax și Radio Roks – fiecare cu o identitate distinctă și un public loial.

HIT FM este vocea energiei și inovației, oferind cele mai recente hituri și știri din lumea muzicii și divertismentului. Radio Relax este refugiul pentru cei care caută liniște și inspirație, cu o selecție de muzică relaxantă și conținut inteligent. Radio Roks este destinatia iubitorilor de rock, unde se întâlnesc clasici legendari și piese contemporane pline de pasiune.

Pe lângă conținut radio de înaltă calitate, noi oferim și o gamă largă de servicii publicitare pentru afaceri. Echipa noastră de profesioniști ajută clienții să dezvolte campanii publicitare eficiente, care atrag publicul țintă, sporesc recunoașterea mărcii și cresc vânzările. Înțelegem că fiecare afacere este unică, așa că oferim o abordare personalizată, ținând cont de nevoile și obiectivele fiecărui client.

La Dixi Media, credem că succesul unei afaceri începe cu o comunicare puternică. Prin combinația perfectă dintre muzică, informații și publicitate, ajutăm companii să se conecteze cu publicul lor într-un mod autentic și memorabil. Suntem mai mult decât o companie media – suntem partenerul tău în creștere, oferind instrumentele necesare pentru a te remarca pe piața din Moldova.

Suntem mândri că stațiile noastre radio fac parte din viața cotidiană a miilor de oameni din Moldova, iar soluțiile noastre publicitare ajută companiile să atingă noi culmi. Dacă dorești ca marca ta să fie auzită, contactează-ne – te vom ajuta să faci alegerea potrivită și să obții succesul dorit.

Name: DestinFM
Description:
Destin is such a unique place to tell your story.  We have 3.6 million tourists that visit us each year, the most of any city on the Emerald Coast.  That’s a ton of people ready to spend money with you.  We see a new audience each week as visitors roll into town.  Unlike the stations you hear on the air now, we are physically in Destin and 100% portable!  We are residents, and advocates of Destinites.  We’ll let tourists know about the rich history of this amazing place, teach them to fill those holes on the beach (for the turtles), and remind them to leave no trace.  DestinFM is the voice of Destin.
Because we are an app, people can use us in Destin and beyond.  Tourists take us with them everywhere.  In the car, hotel, to the beach – and because we have quickly become their new favorite radio station, they’ll take us back home to Atlanta, and Birmingham, Nashville, etc. – planning their next trip while listening to your ad.  We come from major market radio (DC, Birmingham, Charleston, Richmond, many more) and have watched radio change from listening in the car almost exclusively to listening on a device that fits in your pocket.  Phones have replaced the physical radio.
We remember how convoluted it was to just place a radio ad!  Meetings, proposals, add-ons “wanna buy a website?”
Those days are over!  Radio buys should be 100% transparent and easy.  At DestinFM, we’re different.  Our focus is solely to support our community, and that means to generate more business for you.  Period.
We’d love for you to join us!

Name: Lives Radio Show & Podcast
Description:
Lives Radio Show & Podcast is where meaningful conversation meets the art of being human. Each week, I sit down with creators, entrepreneurs, activists, philosophers, and changemakers to explore life’s big questions: How do we live well? What matters most? How do we create meaning—in work, in community, in our own lives?

Now in its third season on Omaha’s NPR affiliate, @KIOS-Omaha-Public-Radio, Lives is more than a broadcast—it’s a space for reflection, connection, and discovery. The conversations are intimate and unscripted, uncovering the human stories behind professional identities and the personal philosophies that drive people forward.

This work is deeply connected to my vocation as an existential coach and humanist thinker. In my coaching and workshops, I help individuals and teams navigate uncertainty, transitions, and purpose. In Lives, I bring that same curiosity and presence to my guests—listening for the moments that reveal who we are, what we value, and how we might live more intentionally.

Lives offers more than inspiration. It’s a reminder that our work is always embedded in a larger human story—and that empathy, creativity, and self-awareness aren’t “soft skills,” but essential ones. The show offers perspectives that challenge assumptions, spark new thinking, and expand our understanding of leadership, resilience, and meaning in an AI-shaped world.

Whether you tune in for insight, fresh ideas, or simply the pleasure of hearing another person’s story, Lives is an invitation: to pause, to listen, and to reflect on your own life and work with renewed depth.

Name: FrankSpeech Broadcast Network (FSBN)
Description:
Free speech is one of the hallmarks of our Constitutional Republic, as enshrined in the Bill of Rights. It is no coincidence that nations that have free speech also have a free enterprise system and freedom of religion. Inversely, nations that deny free speech tread upon the free enterprise system and freedom of religion. Americans want to remain free. Americans are craving news and information that is not filtered through the radical worldview of today’s liberal media intelligentsia, or deep state actors.

Frank, the voice of free speech, will be the platform for Americans who want to defend life, liberty, and all the freedoms that have marked America as the longest running Constitutional Republic in the world. 

On this platform you will find a home where you can post videos, livestream television, distribute news and information, and find community and fellowship with likeminded Americans. Frank will be a home for major influencers, to micro influencers, to average Americans wanting to share in the constitutional right of freedom of speech and freedom of expression. We hope you will join our community and let freedom ring.

Name: Fundação Expansão Cultural
Description:
O Grupo Fundação Expansão Cultural possui, dentro de seus veículos de comunicação, duas rádios das mais tradicionais, não só de Manhuaçu, mas da região. As vertentes pelo qual a história da comunicação de Manhuaçu e região vai de encontro aos traçados pela Rádio Manhuaçu AM 710, que começou a funcionar em 1950, sendo iniciada por Pe. Júlio Pessoa Franco (em memória).

A Rádio Manhuaçu AM 710 atinge diversos níveis de audiências e cada vez mais adapta-se às novas tecnologias. Ela funciona como uma ferramenta de apoio ao debate e comunicação, na promoção cultural, noticiários, ou em casos de emergência social. Em 1982, a Fundação Expansão Cultural inaugurou também a Nova FM 88,3 e assim deu início a um conglomerado de informações de qualidade, músicas e entretenimento e o comprometimento com quem está do outro lado ouvindo a programação das rádios.
Fundado em 30 de setembro de 1972, o Jornal Tribuna do Leste é o veículo líder do Grupo Expansão Cultural (FEC). 
Agora, um novo espaço irá abrigar programas tradicionais das rádios Manhuaçu AM, Nova 88,3 FM e jornal Tribuna do Leste. Um Estúdio de TV é inaugurado em Manhuaçu, onde o novo espaço complementa o estúdio de rádio, com uma bancada renovada e cenário compartilhado com o set de gravações da TV via streaming. As edições do Jornal Regional, Jornal das Quatro, parte do Manhã do Ouvinte, e os quadros “Igreja em Reflexão com Padre Carlos Altoé, SDN e Igreja Viva com Padre Rafael SDN são alguns dos produtos projetados para o novo estúdio.
São 48 anos voltados à comunidade. O Jornal Tribuna do Leste abrange o cotidiano de 80 municípios da Vertente Ocidental do Caparaó, e mantém a liderança em acessos em sua área de abrangência.
São muitos anos de trabalho e dedicação com o mesmo perfil e forma de abordagem aos diversos assuntos, sempre com a mesma importância para que a sociedade possa estar informada a respeito dos fatos.

Name: VioSport
Description:
VioSport; maç önü–maç sonu yayınları, taktik analizler, özgün stüdyo formatları, saha içi–saha dışı röportajlar ve güncel spor gündemi değerlendirmeleriyle çok platformlu bir spor yayın markasıdır. Futboldan basketbola, voleyboldan dövüş sporlarına kadar geniş bir yelpazede hızlı, tarafsız ve analitik içerikler üretir.

Yayın İçerikleri ve Formatlar
	•	Canlı Yayın & Maç Günü Kuşakları: Maç önü kadro/istatistik incelemesi, devre arası değerlendirmeleri, maç sonu teknik-taktik çözümlemeler.
	•	Stüdyo Programları: Haftanın öne çıkan karşılaşmaları, derin veri okuması (xG, pas haritaları, tempo/pressing indeksleri), hakem ve kural yorumları.
	•	Saha Röportajları: Sporcu, teknik ekip ve yönetici röportajları; taraftar görüşleri ve atmosfer hikâyeleri.
	•	Gündem & Transfer Masası: Doğrulanmış haber akışı, resmi açıklama takibi, bütçe–performans ve sözleşme dinamikleri.
	•	Altyapı ve Gelişim: Akademi dosyaları, genç yetenek radarları, performans koçluğu ve sakatlık dönüş süreçleri.
	•	Spor Bilimi & Analiz: Kondisyon, beslenme, sakatlık risk yönetimi ve veri destekli performans trendleri.
	•	Belgesel & Backstage: Kulüp kültürü, derbi hikâyeleri, antrenman günleri ve sezon perde arkası.

Yayın İlkeleri
	•	Tarafsızlık ve Doğruluk: Kaynak teyidi, istatistikle desteklenen yorum.
	•	Hız ve Şeffaflık: Gelişmeleri hızlı, bağlamı net aktarım.
	•	Erişilebilir Anlatı: Teknik içeriği anlaşılır ve izleyici dostu dilde sunma.
	•	Topluluk Odaklılık: Taraftar etkileşimi, anketler ve canlı soru-cevap.

Hedef Kitle

Sporu sadece izlemekle kalmayıp anlamak isteyen taraftarlar, amatör/profesyonel sporcular, antrenörler, spor endüstrisi profesyonelleri ve markalar.

İş Birlikleri ve Sponsorluk

Markalara; entegrasyonlu stüdyo segmentleri, maç günü özel yayınları, belgesel içerik ortaklıkları, saha içi/arka plan prodüksiyonları ve dijital kampanya paketleri sunuyoruz.

Name: Hey Radio 88.9 FM
Description:
MUSKEGON COMMUNITY RADIO
Commercial Free and listener supported. 88.9 FM Muskegon, Michigan. 
Hey Radio brings you nothin' but good tunes, lots of energy, and inspirational lyrics and more that will help believers and unbelievers alike. 
Christian Rock, Reggae, Hip-Hop, Street Music, Spoken Word and more! 

At the turn of the millennium, founder Bill Erickson stumbled across an alternative Christian Rock concert at the 1st annual Unity Christian Music Festival in Muskegon, Michigan. 
It was intense to see the band screaming Christian lyrics at the mosh pit, and the mosh pit screaming right along with them. After obtaining a copy of the band's CD and reading the lyrics, he recognized that the message was so raw and yet so relevant to this young generation. The words would make Bill Gaither weep!
Bill realized that this was actually a form of praise and worship! Not like any praise and worship ever seen before. 
Once the concert was gone, the music was gone and the audience was left to find that rhythm and beat elsewhere. More than likely they would find it in the secular world and the message would be diametrically opposed to the Christian theme. 
It took a great deal of time for Bill to work up the courage to take on the monumental task of developing a brand new kind of radio station. No commercials, no advertising. Just music and messaging that would inspire and uplift a generation of listeners, thirsty for the gospel of Jesus Christ in a format that would move them both physically and spiritually.
Simple building blocks were coming into place. A transmitter, a tower, a play list, computers, and the hardest of all things necessary....an FCC licensed frequency.
But 1st, a Board of Directors. Bob Kuhn, Brent Richards, Dave Nordstrom, Darius Pimpleton. These 5 men are the governing board for what is today Muskegon Michigan's first and only Christian Rock radio station. wHEY 88.9 FM a.k.a Hey Radio! Streaming at https//www.heyradio.com - Thanks for listenin'!

Name: Unit Stills by Günther Schubert
Description:
Günther Schubert is a unit stills photographer based in Cape Town, South Africa. He is no stranger to the limelight, Günther has been working as the official and sole Photographer for the Expresso Morning Show, Top Billing, Afternoon Express, Win a Home Show and Presenter Search on 3 from 2012 till 2019. He also did work for Cartoon Network in South Africa.

Working in the limelight with both international and local celebrities under extreme pressure gave Günther a great understanding of the importance of time. Working with high-profile clients and celebrities with limited time available taught him to manage his time and get excellent results with a limited amount of time.

Celebrities Günther worked with include Annie Lennox, Jennifer Rush, Daniel Bedingfield, Texas Battle who plays the role of Marcus Forrester in The Bold and the Beautiful, Arianne Zucker who plays the role of Nicole Walker on the NBC daytime soap opera Days of Our Live, Drake Hogestyn who plays the role of John Black on the American soap opera Days of Our Lives, Judy Boucher, Calum Scott, AKA, Cassper Nyovest, George Calombaris who is a judge on MasterChef Australia, Matt Preston who is a judge on MasterChef Australia, Robert Kiyosaki, Hayden Quinn, Adriano Zumbo, Freshlyground band, Paxton Fielies and hundreds more successful individuals from business people to sports stars.

Photography contributes to the success of a film or television show as it creates and sets the mood of the film before it is released. Unit Stills Photographers are usually hired by producers, film public relations companies, film sales agents, or actual distributors. The unit stills photographer is much more than just the set photographer.

The photographer will capture the entire filming process including travel locations, setups, behind-the-scenes, and also the actual acting. The period during which the photographer is hired depends on the size of the shoot and the budget of the production.

The flagship of our effort is Clean and Sober Radio, created and hosted by Gary Hendler and cohosted by Mark Sigmund. We feature real people with real stories about their addiction to drugs and alcohol and their road to recovery.

Join us LIVE on Fridays, 3:00 PM EST on WWDB-AM Talk Radio 860 (97.5 FM – Digital 2). Join the discussion at 888-728-9941, or watch us live on the Clean and Sober Radio Facebook Page where you can also share your comments and engage.

Name: El Xou de la Sostenibilitat
Description:
Tens la sensació que podries fer més per construir un món millor?  Però:
- No saps ni per on començar 
- Et sembla que hauràs de renunciar a tots els plaers de la vida 
- Estàs cansant d'anar insistint a la gent perquè recicli 

Doncs aquest és el teu podcast! 

Ens fa molta il·lusió donar-te la benvinguda: al xou de la sostenibilitat! 

Buscarem experts en cada tema i anirem a desmuntar tòpics i desvelar contradiccions. 

Entrevistarem empreses TOP en sostenibilitat i altres que estan començant. Unes ens donaran moltes idees, les altres ens ajudaran a veure el sentit pràctic i realista, de què podem fer en el dia a dia. 

AVUI a les 20h s'estrena el 1r capítol a Llagostera Ràdio i ens fa molta il·lusió que ens escolteu perquè segur que aprendreu coses noves! Per nosaltres, cada capítol és un aprenentatge! 

Volem agrair el suport que hem tingut des de l'inici d'aquest projecte per part de l'entitat Llagostera Ràdio i totes les facilitats que ens han posat per començar aquesta aventura. 

Us esperem!

Clara i Paula

Name: Tik Rok Media
Description:
Tik Rok Media is the innovation engine and media arm of Tik Rok: a high-tech, human-hearted social radio network built for what comes after traditional advertising.

Our flagship brand, Tik Rok Radio, runs 24/7/365 as a live, host-curated social radio experience, where music, creators, and communities intersect in real time. In a world of synthetic feeds and AI-generated noise, we build refuge: human voices, intentional curation, and culture-first programming at scale.

Under the hood, our proprietary amplification layer quietly connects livestream creators, tastemakers, and audience signals into a unified media graph. The result: brand moments that feel native to the experience, not bolted on. No cluttered ad breaks. No forced pre-rolls. Sponsors are invited into the story as supporters of the ecosystem itself.

We partner with a select portfolio of sponsors, by invitation or application, who align with our values and see beyond legacy media buys. Our focus:

Human-centered experiences over impression-chasing

Long-term trust over short-term clicks

Real-time social reach across audio + live media, powered by tech but grounded in people

If you’re building a brand for the next decade, not the last one, Tik Rok Media exists to help you show up where it matters, inside a living, breathing, human-powered network.

Name: E.S.O.C.A
Description:
Et si on changeait d’avis, tous ensemble ?
C’est ça, l’ESOCA spirit ! 

On part d’un constat simple : bien souvent, nos opinions sont déjà toutes faites… et ça bloque le dialogue.

Avec ESOCA, on veut bousculer ces certitudes, en ouvrant un espace de réflexion et de débat bienveillant.

 Notre démarche :
Critiquer nos points de vue de manière raisonnée, constructive et curieuse, sur des sujets variés : droit, philosophie morale, psychologie, anthropologie… mais aussi des enjeux brûlants comme l’intelligence artificielle ou l’écologie. 

 Notre philosophie :
Pas de gagnants, pas de perdants. L’objectif, c’est de comprendre ce que l’autre a à dire — et peut-être d’en sortir avec un regard nouveau. 

 En partenariat avec Radio Campus Clermont-Auvergne (93.3 FM)

 Au programme ?
- Des débats de fond, accessibles à toutes et tous
- Un invité différent à chaque épisode
- Une émission en deux temps :
... Une présentation d’un texte, d’une thèse ou d’un auteur de philosophie
...Un débat autour du sujet, avec une pause musicale en lien avec le thème

 ESOCA, c’est l’envie d’apprendre autrement, en partageant nos perspectives.
 ESOCA, c'est un espace de débat et de philosophie où l’on apprend à écouter, à réfléchir et… parfois à changer d’avis.
 ESOCA, c'est nous, mais c'est aussi vous.

 Nos antennes diffusent de la publicité tout au long de la journée. Mais aussi :

Une actualité sous influence, assumée, ultra-maîtrisée.


 Jingle FM, c’est aussi un studio de production sonore à destination des marques, médias et institutions :

La publicité y est écoutée, pensée, détournée, sublimée.

Name: Radio Suara Al-Manar 99,5 FM
Description: Radio Suara Almanar is one of the radio stations broadcasting in Ponorogo Regency. The location of Radio Suara Almanar is at Jalan Budi Utomo No. 10 Ponorogo or at coordinates 70 51'53.1" S (south latitude) & 1110 29' 43.3" E (east longitude). Like other radio stations in Ponorogo Regency, Radio Suara Almanar broadcasts using analog system transmission. The radio transmitter is emitted at a tower antenna height of 50 meters above the ground and has a transmitter power of 2000 watts. According to an interview with "Damar", a technician at Radio Suara Almanar, based on the technical data, Radio Suara Almanar is estimated to cover 70% of the Ponorogo region, while 30% cannot be reached due to obstacles and geographic conditions as well as interference from other radios. Radio Suara Almanar is a radio station with a vision and mission to educate and direct by providing educational, religious, and Islamic preaching information. Radio Suara Almanar strives to become a radio station with as many listeners as possible and can reach all corners of Ponorogo and generally all Indonesian and foreign communities.

SOAREC, Sounds Of Africa Records is an exciting new venture established by Ramy Ayoub, a visionary entrepreneur renowned for his multicultural fusion music projects and festivals. With a deep appreciation for the diverse musical traditions and talents originating from Africa, Ramy Ayoub has embarked on this new endeavor to create a platform dedicated to promoting the captivating sounds of the continent.

Sounds Of Africa Records is committed to discovering, nurturing, and showcasing emerging talents from Africa. The label seeks to provide a supportive and collaborative environment where artists can thrive and express their unique musical voices. By fostering a creative and inclusive space, Sounds Of Africa Records aims to empower artists to create music that reflects their cultural heritage while embracing modern influences.

The label's primary focus is on promoting genres such as Afrobeat, Afro-house, Afro-Jazz, Highlife, Afro-pop, and various traditional African music styles. With a team of experienced industry professionals and a strong network of connections, Sounds Of Africa Records is well-equipped to guide artists through the creative process, from recording and production to marketing and distribution.

Sounds Of Africa Records is dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of quality and authenticity in its releases. Each project is carefully curated, ensuring that the music resonates with listeners and captures the essence of African musical traditions. By collaborating with talented producers, engineers, and musicians, the label aims to create exceptional recordings that showcase the immense talent and diversity of African music.

Beyond promoting individual artists, Sounds Of Africa Records also aims to contribute to the growth and development of the African music industry as a whole. The label actively seeks partnerships and collaborations with other labels, artists, and industry stakeholders to foster cross-cultural exchanges.

Name: KORK North Bay TV
Description:

The only other TV station that was in the North Bay was KFTY TV-50 in Santa Rosa who got bought out about 15 years ago and closed down. Since then, other than small, local PBS stations, there hasn't been a commercially broadcast TV station in the North Bay like any of the ones in San Francisco... until now. 

KORK-TV broadcasts on platforms such as Roku, Amazon Fire TV, Apple TV, Android TV and others, with more to come. It's 100% free to watch with no sign-up or subscription necessary. 

KORK TV's sister network is The Wine Country Channel, which will be launched soon. Think of it like The Cooking Channel or The Travel Channel, except focused on showcasing everything in the different wine country regions, such as Napa Valley, Sonoma Valley, Lake County, Mendocino County and beyond, covering all of the great things for visitors to see and do in those regions, from visiting wineries, to restaurants, hotels, spas, shopping, towns, parks, activities to do and so on, all in TV show formats.

Visit KORKtv.com to find out more.

Name: Джедайски истории
Description:
Добре дошли в моя подкаст, който съм нарекъл “Джедайски истории”. Аз съм Йордан "Jd" Хлебаров. Нека ви разкажа повече.

Първо защо “Джедайски истории”? Сагата на Междузвездни войни е едно от любимите ми неща, особено като се има предвид и философския пласт, който тя носи. Но също е свързано с мен и с ученическия ми прякор, които си ми остана от тогава. Той е „Jd“ или просто както някой ме наричай “джедай”.

Второто е желанието ми от много време да разказвам истории на хората, с които съм животът ме е сблъскал и които правят невероятни неща, осъществяват своите мечти и тези на другите. За мен те са едни съвременни джедаи, в смисъла на сагата. Живеем в един свят, който става все по-малък откъм разстояния и все по-далечен между обитателите в него. Също както в галактиката, която обитават джедаите от сагата на Междузвездни войни.  

Какво по-хубаво да комбинираш двете, за име на личния си подкаст?

Но кои са джедаите в нашия свят, в нашата галактика? С какво се занимават? Какви са техните мечти? Какво мислят за технологиите, социалните проблеми, джаджите, хобитата, хората около тях? Този подкаст има за цел да ви срещне с част от тях. Те се занимават с различни неща и успяват да използват различните светли проявления на силата.

With decades of expertise, we continue to deliver reliable, high-performance solutions for mobile communication, wireless broadcasting, and radar systems. Our foam and air cables are widely used across China and exported to global markets including the USA, Brazil, Mexico, Poland, Switzerland, Australia, South Africa, UAE, and Spain.

Name: James Broad Ltd
Description:
In 2016 - at the age of 21 - I decided that employment wasn’t for me and thus, James Broad Interiors was born! I quit my job and pursued my dream of being an antique dealer and, honestly, I’ve never looked back.

Every product on my website is something that I’ve fallen in love with on my travels and therefore have just had to have. I get a buzz when I find something beautiful, interesting or that I could see making someone else just as happy as me. I will only sell pieces in a condition that I would have in my own home - whether that means spending time expertly restoring it, artfully distressing it or just ensuring it is absolutely pristine. I am proud of every single item on here and love the idea that any one of these products will be the finishing touch to someone else’s interior, be it an Instagram worthy home, an oh-so-photogenic bar or simply a final addition to a collector’s catalogue.

I put a lot of effort, energy and definitely a little bit of myself into procuring each piece and making sure it is perfect and something I can be proud of - and hopefully something that you will love too.

Community hub for artists and listeners to connect globally.

DIY spirit: prioritising artistry over algorithms.

Alt sounds for alt minds.

Onze missie: inwoners verbinden, informeren en versterken met verhalen die er lokaal écht toe doen.

Een betrokken team van vrijwilligers en betaalde krachten werkt samen aan programma’s die de gemeenschap raken — maatschappelijk, cultureel en herkenbaar lokaal.

 Onze kracht: lokaal en veelzijdig
Als streekomroep onderscheiden we ons door onze focus op de eigen regio. We bieden een breed aanbod aan nieuws, achtergronden en menselijke verhalen die de volle breedte van de samenleving weerspiegelen.

 Onze redactie is volledig onafhankelijk.
We hanteren de waarden van persvrijheid, rechtsstatelijkheid en respect voor ieder mens. Er is een duidelijke scheiding tussen redactie, bestuur en commercie.

 Wat we doen:
• Nieuws en verhalen maken met en voor inwoners
• Multimediale content ontwikkelen voor alle platforms
• Vrijwilligers en jonge makers opleiden en begeleiden
• Structurele samenwerking zoeken met lokale partners
• Interactie stimuleren via sociale media, tiplijnen en live-uitzendingen

 Onze ambitie:
Een duurzame, toekomstbestendige omroep die meegroeit met de informatiebehoefte van de regio.

Volg ons voor het laatste nieuws uit Súdwest-Fryslân!

Nous visons à créer un espace d'expression, de connexion, de débats, d'échanges: un rendez-vous de donner et recevoir au service de l'Afrique. 

Nous mettons en avant les préoccupations et les réussites de la diaspora africaine et de l'Afrique.

Africamidi est une plateforme vibrante dédiée à la mise en valeur de la diaspora africaine et à la célébration de l'Afrique en pleine émergence. 

Nous croyons fermement en la richesse culturelle, la diversité et le potentiel sans limites de l'Afrique et de sa diaspora.

Description:

Listening without interruption. Listening with presence and humility. Listening to pry open space across bodies of difference.

By interviewing individuals from different walks of life, we strive to hold space for intimate conversations on community, story, and social justice. Love in Public acts as a breathing testament to the capacity of listening as a powerful antidote to prejudice and as a means of recognizing our common humanity.

Name: Pitcher Perfect Course

Listen: as a subject matter expert in your field, you know your stuff. Whether
you’re an attorney, medical professional, political pundit, professor, chef, historian
or entrepreneur – you know your industry inside and out.
You could go on for hours about your expertise (and probably have!) 
You may have even thought to yourself, “I could totally be one of those people they interview on TV. If I could just get on air...” 
While you definitely can talk the talk ... do you know WHO to talk to?
And do you know exactly how to get TV producers to say “yes” to your pitch?

As a producer in one of the most influential newsrooms in the country, I have the
answers to those questions. And I’m sharing them with you in my new course,
Pitcher Perfect.
It’s a self-paced online course for subject matter experts just like you who want to
get noticed; you’ll learn the ins and outs of scoring lucrative and prestigious media features from a veteran news producer. 

Inside, you’ll learn how to find and pitch producers, including what to say, when to
pitch, determining the best angle and more.
As a working national news producer, I know exactly how to get their attention
NOW. And it’s your turn to do just that.

Look, who said you had to stay your industry’s best kept secret? 
Visit pitcherperfectcourse.com to learn how to pitch like a subject matter expert and finally get media exposure.

Learn how to pitch your expertise to news producers when you sign up for the on-
demand Pitcher Perfect course at https://www.pitcherperfectcourse.com

Name: The Buzz
Description:
There’s a big, fat elephant in the room. So let’s just get it out in the open and then we can move on.

COMMERCIAL RADIO SUCKS!
 
There, we've said it. 
The music they play is safe, mediocre, and painfully repetitive.
The presenters talk too much. Way too much.
And, with mobile phones in our hands who needs the news, weather or travel reports?
And then there are the adverts! God, those frickin adverts!!
It’s just as well we don’t do any of that. 
In fact, our favourite saying is NO NEWS IS GOOD NEWS.

The thing is though, we LOVE radio. 
We were raised on it. It was like a religion to us.
It helped us gain a sense of who we were and what we stood for.
It helped us feel that we belonged, not just as an individual but as part of something else, something bigger than us - a city, a community, a tribe. 
Just something.

So, when several decades ago video killed the radio star, and then it was cast aside by the internet and music streaming, before being finally wrung dry by commercial mismanagement, it was the people that were the real losers.

And so, after years of talking about it, we set about building the radio station that we would want to listen to.

We didn't want to follow, we wanted to invent.

We didn't want to just build a local radio station. 

We wanted to start a crusade.

We wanted to create a tribe of like-minded people that do great things together and care deeply for one another.......whilst listening to great music.

But, first and foremost, our radio station had to have heart.

We, the listener, needed to feel something again.

We needed to feel we belonged, we needed to feel good, we needed to feel alive.
We needed to feel like the best days of our lives were still in the future and not just in the past. 
We needed to create new moments, new memories, new good times.
We wanted to create a station that didn't have listeners, it had ambassadors and evangelists. 

So that's what we are doing.

Name: Grandir Le Podcast
Description:
Que feriez-vous avec 1 € ? Quand vous étiez petit, la question ne se posait pas. Vous alliez à la boulangerie et preniez le plus de bonbons possibles. À présent, qu'est-ce qu'on en ferait, de cette petite pièce qui est perdue dans le fond de notre poche..? 

Cet euro, ce n’est qu’un exemple parmi tant d’autres. Toutes ces choses enfantines qui nous font prendre conscience que l'on grandit et qu'on devient adulte. Retrouver ce pull moche avec lequel nous habillait nos parents. Aimer se replonger dans ce coffre à jouets ou retomber sur ces billes si durement acquises. Des choux de Bruxelles que vous n'appréciez toujours pas... 

Grandir, c’est comprendre comment nos habitudes, nos envies, nos goûts et nos choix évoluent en devenant adulte. C’est aussi se projeter sur le futur sans pour autant enfouir l’enfant qui est en nous.  

Grandir, un podcast réalisé par Martin Colas et Mattéo Mousseau, produit par RADIO CAMPUS ANGERS. 

Illustration : Bleuenn Bellec

Name: WMRE Emory Radio
Description:
WMRE began as a low-budget idea in 1983, with call letters WEMO. In 1985 students began the laborious task of creating a modern radio station at Emory. After four years of persistent effort, on January 20, 1989, Emory’s student operated radio station, WMRE, the Voice of Emory, began broadcasting.

At first, WMRE was carried through a carrier current system throughout the university. The signal was only available to on-campus listeners, and was broadcast over 590AM. Due to neglect and maintenance problems, the cable connection deteriorated, and 590AM was soon nothing but a faint buzz through the speakers.

Soon thereafter, WMRE began broadcasting on Emory University’s Cable System. Although once again WMRE was only available to listeners on campus, it breathed new life into the station. On September 30, 1998, due to a dedicated staff, WMRE began broadcasting on the Internet through RealAudio and RealVideo. 

In the Fall of 2008, WMRE made its long awaited move from the cramped, unventilated studio in the basement of Longstreet Hall to its spacious home in the Alumni Memorial University Center.

As society trended towards pocket-sized, portable content, WMRE adapted to college students’ media consumption habits. Over the years, WMRE’s broadcast format transitioned entirely to online streaming. 

When the COVID-19 pandemic shut the world down in 2020, WMRE took another hiatus. Three years later, a passionate executive board revamped the station with new equipment. WMRE went back on the air via internet stream in Fall 2023 — a testament to the resilience of college radio.

Today, WMRE broadcasts to a worldwide audience, and can be heard online at wmre.live. WMRE also publishes writing about music and culture online and in print in our zine Frequency.

Name: KTEC 89.5 FM
Description:
KTEC 89.5 FM is a student-operated free form radio station, broadcasting from the Oregon Institute of Technology campus in Klamath Falls 24/7, 365 days of the year. Reaching all corners of the Klamath Basin, anyone with a passion for radio can become a DJ, hosting their very own show.

The station went on air for the first time on December 19th 1950. The studio was in the Theatre Building on the old campus, the site of which was just west of the current Klamath Falls campus. The original broadcast frequency was 88.1 MHz, and the original transmitter was just 10 watts (our current broadcast power is 210 watts).

Nowadays, KTEC serves as the Klamath Basin's premier free-form radio station, serving the towns of Klamath Falls, Tulalake, Keno, Dorris, and Dairy over the air, and worldwide via our webstream. Our broadcasting agenda is designed to serve the public interest, and our free-form programming platform provides our DJ's the freedom to share what they love with the world.

Today, while the network continues to work in tandem with TRC, Static Multimedia Network operates as a self-contained distribution point for our genuinely distinctive contemporary radio formats.  Our work can be found on both commercial and public broadcast properties throughout the United States.  The network is currently partnered with Targetspot for national ad delivery, as well as Azerion and Boost Mobile for app R/D/D.

In addition to 24/7 format distribution for terrestrial and internet radio, Static Multimedia Network strives to be a force encouraging radio's evolution in a seismicly changing broadcast environment. We believe that our medium's way forward is through innovation and technical disruption.  Radio remains the world's most steadfast media, 100 years since its invention.  We are an industry adept with a pivot. To that end, Static Multimedia Network strives to develop new concepts for content creators eager to grow their reach and be first-to-market with innovative programming, centered on developing a rich and vibrant community of friends and entertainers worldwide.

Name: Amateurism
Description:
Formed in 2011, Amateurism Collective was founded by DJ and promoter Leo Walton to bring together a group of people with a similar spirit for unearthing (and sharing) records of a certain vibe.

Over the past decade, Amateurism has grown into a wide collective of selectors and an even bigger tribe of good people who congregate in festival fields and dancefloors. It’s an inclusive club, bringing people together through music and shared experiences.

Each summer they form a festival soundsystem, soundtracking the entire weekend at Glastonbury (since 2015), and previously at Port Eliot Festival (2015-2019). 

In March 2020, as an instinctive response to lockdown caused by the Covid-19 pandemic, the group expanded to create Amateurism Radio. Out of something extremely challenging and isolating grew something special, connected, and positive.

Over two-years Am-Rad aired well over 1000 exclusive shows and received more than 100,000 listeners. It strengthened and solidified a community of likeminded music lovers and brought good music and good vibes to an ever growing tribe of followers.

Amateurism Radio is built on a strong foundation of residents who regularly contributed to the station alongside special guests such as Norman Cook, Amy Douglas, Ed Chemical, Sophie Lloyd, Alexis and Joe from Hot Chip, Nadia Ksaiba and many more.

Post-Covid, the station continues to operate and bring people together in a 'pop-up' event-style format multiple times a year.

Name: Cc:ShopTalk
Description:
Cc: Shop Talk

Step into Cc: Shop Talk, where each episode feels like pulling up a chair in the spaces we all know—the nail shop, the hair salon, the barbershop. We’re diving into the essential conversations you’d only find in these trusted spaces. Hosted by Cecilia Friday and brought to you by ExDef Network, we discuss topics that impact us all, from current events and wellness insights to need-to-know stories and lighthearted moments that keep us laughing.

Cc: Shop Talk keeps you “Cc’d” into the conversations that count—where information, connection, and culture collide. Join us for real talk, relevant stories, and the authentic, relaxed vibe that feels like home.

Mission Statement
To create a welcoming space where every listener feels “Cc’d” into the conversations that matter, fostering real connections, authentic storytelling, and meaningful insights. We dive deep into topics from current events to wellness and lifestyle, offering a blend of information, advice, and laughter that resonates with audiences from all walks of life.

Vision Statement
To be the go-to podcast for genuine, impactful conversations that bridge cultures, ideas, and experiences. We aim to become a trusted voice in the digital media landscape, creating a community that feels both informed and inspired.

The Role of “Cc:” and Carbon Copy

The concept of “Cc:” (carbon copy) perfectly complements the brand as it symbolizes inclusivity and connection. Just as a carbon copy ensures multiple recipients are part of a conversation, Cc: Shop Talk brings listeners into discussions that they may not have direct access to otherwise. It’s about sharing perspectives, stories, and insights openly, as if listeners are “Cc’d” into each episode, creating a sense of belonging and engagement. This metaphor reinforces the idea that everyone has a seat at the table—or a “chair”—in these conversations.

Name: PROGRAMA EL ZEN*DERO DEL ESPIRITU, TAO ZEN
dctp Entwicklungsgesellschaft für TV-Programm mbH
Description:
Since the company was founded in 1988, dctp has been a platform for independent third parties in German commercial television. The program was launched with the cultural magazine TEN TO ELEVEN on RTL on 2 May 1988.

The aim is to combine information, education and culture in an overall program. In this overall program, dctp cooperates with partners from major publishing houses (SPIEGEL, Neue Zürcher Zeitung, Süddeutsche Zeitung), with BBC Worldwide and others. Until the middle/end of 2018, dctp's cultural magazines, which focus on opera, film, books and scientific topics, were added to the program. The series "Classics of German and International Film" and special programs ranging from two to five hours in length complemented the overall offering for a long time.

The broadcasting times licensed for dctp on RTL, SAT.1 and VOX are filled by the partners with editorial independence under the overall responsibility of dctp.

Name: Pablofauna
Description:
Pablofauna es un joven amante de la naturaleza que ha logrado acercar su afición a millones de jóvenes de todo el mundo a través de sus redes sociales, principalmente, TikTok e Instagram, donde sus contenidos suman ya más de 170 millones de reproducciones (junio 2022 a octubre del 2023). 

Afirma que, a día de hoy, la sociedad está "muy desconectada" de la naturaleza, y que por ello, nuestro planeta "está muriendo poco a poco". Compartiendo su pasión, que comenzó hace unos cuantos años, ha logrado reunir más de 181K seguidores en TikTok y más de 114K en Instagram y 317K en Youtube (Galardonado con el Botón de Plata), jugándose la vida con serpientes letales o rescatando animales de situaciones muy peliagudas. Acumula más de 205 millones de reproducciones en los últimos 18 meses (julio 2022 - diciembre 2023).

(*) Datos actualizados a 1 de enero del 2024

Pablofauna es una producción de Infinity Broadcast Media.

Description:

Listeners can easily download the RockLan One Radio app from any app store to connect with the hottest radio station.

Support for Emerging Artists: The station highlights both established and upcoming artists, including those featured on Billboard’s Emerging Artists Chart. This chart ranks the most shared songs by up-and-coming artists on Twitter, providing a platform for new talent.

Changing the Media Landscape: RockLan One aims to develop and broadcast content that resonates with audiences, transforming the way people experience radio. Their quality talk programming covers a wide range of topics, including Entertainment News, Lifestyle, and Current Events, distinguishing them from competitors.

Custom Advertising Solutions: RockLan One offers tailored advertising solutions to meet the needs and budgets of businesses. With options ranging from high-impact live reads by A-list talent to customized segment sponsorships, advertising with RockLan One enables brands to reach engaged and passionate consumers nationwide.

With its commitment to showcasing the latest hits and supporting emerging artists, RockLan One Radio continues to captivate audiences and redefine the radio experience. Whether you're looking to discover new music or connect with a dedicated listener base, RockLan One is the brand to choose.

Name: Speedy Funk Film & Fernsehproduktions GmbH
Description:
Stolz auf 43 Jahre Innovation und Transformation zum Broadcasting! 
Seit über vier Jahrzehnten gestalten wir die Welt der Kommunikation und haben uns von den Anfängen der Funkkommunikation erfolgreich vor 25 Jahren zum Live-TV Broadcast Bereich entwickelt. Unser Weg war geprägt von herausfordernden wie Einsätzen im Kriegsgebieten bis hin zu bahnbrechenden ersten digitalen SNG Sendeanlagen in Europa und Remote-Produktionen.

 Unser Unternehmen hat stets an der Spitze der Technologie gestanden und sich den Herausforderungen der Zeit erfolgreich gestellt. Wir sind nicht nur Zeugen der Evolution, der technischen Weiterentwicklung in der Kommunikationsbranche, sondern auch treibende Kraft hinter wegweisenden Veränderungen. 

 Unsere Erfahrungen im Kriegsgebiet haben uns gelehrt, in extremen Situationen kreativ und flexibel zu agieren. Diese Fähigkeiten haben wir erfolgreich in die Welt der Remote-Produktion übertragen, um auch in der heutigen schnelllebigen Welt agil und effizient zu handeln.

 Wir sind stolz auf unsere Vergangenheit, aber noch aufgeregter über die Zukunft. Mit einem starken Team und einem klaren Blick für Innovation werden wir weiterhin die Grenzen der Live-TV-Produktion verschieben.

Danke an alle, die Teil dieser beeindruckenden Reise waren und sind!  #Innovation #LiveTV #Transformation #Erfolgsgeschichte #LiveTV Production

Name: Großstadtradio
Description:
Großstadtradio setzt auf gute, handgemachte Musik unserer Zeit und informiert rund um die Uhr über Nachrichten aus Deutschland und der Welt. 
Großstadtradio begleitet durch den Tag – Zuhause, im Büro, am Arbeitsplatz und Unterwegs.
In unseren Sendungen greifen wir vielfältige Themen aus Gesellschaft, Musik- und Onlinewelt, Kultur und Veranstaltungen auf – Themen, die sich mit dem Leben und dem Miteinander in der Metropole und ihren diversen Lebensentwürfen beschäftigen. 
Im Musikprogramm hörst du bei Großstadtradio ganz überwiegend neue Lieder, gut gemixt mit einigen tollen Songs aus den 10er und 00er Jahren – vielfältig und abwechslungsreich aus Pop und Indie. Immer mal wieder zwischendurch spielen wir auch aufregende Classic Songs.
Großstadtradio sendet komplett Online – über unsere Website www.grossstadtradio.de , die auch für Handys optimiert ist sowie über unsere Großstadtradio Apps.
Wir kommen aus Berlin und produzieren unsere Sendungen von „Anfang bis Ende“ digital. Diese Internet-basierte Produktion gibt uns auch die Möglichkeit, direkt von anderen Orten aus zu senden – aus einer Event-Location, aus dem Café, von unterwegs … dazu benötigen wir lediglich einen Laptop mit Internetzugang.

Sponsoring, Vermarktung & Co…

Wir stellen dich und deine Story vor! Deine Idee, dein Konzept, dein Start-Up, dein Unternehmen, deine Initiative, dein Engagement, deine Geschichte – und natürlich dein Team.
Bei Großstadtradio im Programm und als Podcast zum Nachhören und Verlinken auf unserer Website. Die Audio Datei erhältst du zur eigenen Verwendung dazu.
Wir kommen zu dir, in dein Unternehmen, in deine Räumlichkeiten oder einen passenden Ort der Wahl und setzen dich und dein Thema in Szene. 
In unseren Formaten wie beispielsweise „Durch die Großstadt“, in dem Joachim Menschen, Ideen und Konzepte vorstellt oder bei „Bei Mia“, Mias Show rund um Themen der urbanen Gesellschaft. Wir senden direkt von deinem Event und berichten von deiner Veranstaltung.

Name: Lamb & Savage Copywriting
Description:
The Problem

Many international companies based in Germany need the majority of their written materials in both English and German. This normally involves a lot of back and forth between German copywriters, English copywriters and translators, costing the company time and money. The end products are texts that are either inconsistent, or clumsy direct translations of the original text.    

 

Our Solution

Here’s where we come in. We offer copy in both English and German meaning you come to one place for a piece of copy in both languages. Our service is fast, affordable and the end product is consistent and eloquent writing from native speakers, working together to make sure both versions of the text are perfect.

"De Mujer a Mujer" también busca exponer las problemáticas y abusos que viven las mujeres alrededor del mundo, busca el auto-empoderamiento, el autorreconocimiento y la emancipación de la mujer.

Con el paso del tiempo, "De Mujer a Mujer" se ha convertido en una red virtual para mujeres alrededor del mundo, sus redes sociales como Facebook e Instagram cuentan con seguidoras de países de Oceanía, Latinoamérica y Europa. Además, los clubes de lectura y cine con perspectiva feminista, organizado por "De Mujer a Mujer", ha obtenido una gran acogida por las mujeres de habla hispana en países como México, Colombia, Perú, Chile, Venezuela, Honduras, El Salvado, España e incluso en Australia y Nueva Zelanda.

Name: KWMR West Marin Community Radio
Description:
KWMR West Marin Community Radio is more than a radio station. It is a vital local institution that serves as a lifeline during emergencies, a hub of local journalism, and a vibrant platform for diverse voices. From wildfire alerts and weather warnings to educational programming and cultural celebration, KWMR embodies the very best of public media.

A Los Angeles Times feature underscored KWMR’s indispensable role during the Woodward Fire in 2020, when a lightning strike set off a blaze in Point Reyes National Seashore. Despite having just a 320-watt signal and a single studio, KWMR broadcast updates every 30 minutes — often from volunteers’ in-home setups — reaching residents who had no access to the internet or cell service. As power outages and danger escalated, KWMR became a literal lifeline for the 14,000 people across seven rural towns who call West Marin home.

KWMR’s role in public safety and local connectivity dates back even further. Since its founding in 1999, the station has sprung into action during floods, fires, and blackouts. Born from a group of passionate, civic-minded dreamers with a borrowed transmitter and a bold idea, KWMR is now celebrating 26 years of continuous service. From humble beginnings broadcasting to cows in the fog, it has become a well-loved part of community life, powered by over 100 local volunteer programmers. Its unique mix of public affairs, multilingual shows, classical and cowboy music, teen DJs, and poetry readings reflects the eclectic and deeply interconnected fabric of our region.

UMFM can be heard throughout Winnipeg and surrounding areas at 101.5 on the FM dial.

UMFM is primarily run by volunteers, comprised of students from the University of Manitoba, and community members in and around Winnipeg! You can access our live stream online here.

We love to hear your feedback! If you have any comments, questions, or inquiries of any other kind that you would like to see addressed by the staff, a committee, or a programmer at the station, just drop us a line at info@umfm.com and we’ll do our best to get you the information you need as soon as possible.

UMFM 101.5 broadcasts at 1200 watts from the University of Manitoba campuses, which are located on original lands of Anishinaabeg, Ininiwak, Anisininewuk, Dakota Oyate and Dene, and on the National Homeland of the Red River Métis. We acknowledge that our water is sourced from Shoal Lake 40 First Nation. We respect the treaties that were signed here and across Canada, while acknowledging the harms and mistakes of the past.

Description:

Tevékenységünk ugyanakkor a televíziós műsorszolgáltatás mellett ma már kiterjed a Gyöngyösi Újság és a Gyöngyösi Kalendárium kiadására, továbbá a város online és közösségi média felületeinek üzemeltetésére. Az önkormányzattal kötött szerződés keretében működtetjük a Gyöngyház Szórakoztató- és Bevásárló Központban létesített mozit és annak kiszolgáló helységeit.


Legyen tehát szó írott, elektronikus, audio vagy online médiáról, a Gyöngyösi Médiaközpont teljes körű szolgáltatást nyújt a Gyöngyös és vonzáskörzetében élő közel 70 ezer ember és az itt tevékenykedő mintegy ötezer vállalkozás számára. Teszi mindezt azért, hogy első kézből tájékoztasson, megbízható módon és hitelesen közvetítse a friss helyi híreket és információkat a célközönség számára.

Társaságunk fő célja, hogy olyan hatékony kommunikációs megoldásokat dolgozzon ki, amelyek segítségével a közérdekű információk a lehető legtöbb platformon eljutnak a város lakóihoz és a szélesebb nyilvánossághoz.

Name: FLUXMEDIA
Description:
A FLUXMEDIA é uma rádio digital, com perfil generalista, que nasce com o principal objetivo de se transformar na banda sonora diária para os fãs da música em geral, estando direcionada para um público adulto contemporâneo, do interior ou meios urbanos.

A transmitir a partir da Sertã, exclusivamente pela internet, com música em português ou em língua estrangeira, a FLUXMEDIA é perfeita para ouvir no trabalho, em casa, em viagem ou a praticar desporto.

Como o próprio nome sugere… a mudança faz parte do nosso ADN!
“Flux”, em inglês, ou “Fluxo”, em português, representa movimento, corrente e evolução contínua.

Por isso, a FLUXMEDIA é composta por música mainstream, maioritariamente nas áreas do Pop, Pop/Rock, Rock e Dance pop, sem excluir outros géneros musicais.

Estamos abertos para o mundo, o que também implica sermos uma montra do que de melhor se faz em Portugal e no estrangeiro.

Com uma seleção musical eclética a FLUXMEDIA procura, acima de tudo, ser um espaço de atitude positiva e entretenimento, aberto às mudanças e à multiculturalidade.

Estamos comprometidos com o que há de novo, mas não esquecemos o que de relevante se fez no passado, nomeadamente as músicas que marcaram as gerações das décadas de 80 e 90 do século XX e as duas primeiras décadas do século XXI.

Na realidade a nossa playlist está cheia de músicas que gostamos. É variada e demonstra o quanto nos divertimos a (re)visitar os mais variados territórios musicais que têm marcado a cultura pop mundial.

Name: EAST KENT RADIO LIMITED
Description:
East Kent Radio was formed by the coming together of three broadcasting professionals in mid-1988, under the umbrella of Audiosonic Broadcast Limited. This company was incorporated in 1988 by Peter Leutner, David Leutner and Dianne Bressers with the intention, as part of its business strategy, to apply for the independent local radio licence for East Kent in the UK . In January 1995 Martin Hemingway joined the team as Chairman to spearhead our application for the re-advertised ILR East Kent Licence in May 1995. This was prepared by Audiosonic Broadcast Limited but it was made by East Kent Radio Limited (EKR), a company formed especially for that purpose. Having been unsuccessful in winning the ILR East Kent Licence the group agreed to stay together to push the idea of local radio in East Kent further.
In October 1995 East Kent Radio Limited joined the Kent Chamber of Commerce to extend its strategy of informing local businesses of the advantages of cost effective advertising on local radio. During December 1995 it was decided to launch a one month RSL broadcast based in the heart of East Kent at Stelling Minnis aimed mainly at Ashford and the surrounding areas. This trial Radio Station, EKR 107.2 generated substantial local interest and proved there was demand for such a service. Two applications to the Radio Authority were made for the small scale licences of “Canterbury/Ashford” and “Dover/Folkestone” in August 1996. The Radio Authority in September 2000, EKR Ashford was born. The license advertisement and application procedure was begun in July 2004. Submitted in August of the same year the licence was won by another applicant. Undeterred, EKR went online in June 2008, with four themed Rock Radio Streams with the incentive to promote New UK DAB Services together which the philosophy to give opportunities to new and unsigned Rock Bands….. The quest continues!

What Makes Malaga Radio Unique?
Targeted Marketing Strategy: We promote both peak and off-season tourism, ensuring year-round engagement by focusing on non-beach and cultural experiences.

Multimedia Integration: Our content spans social media, video, and podcast platforms like Spotify and Apple Podcasts, ensuring maximum reach and engagement across multiple devices.

Evergreen Podcast Library: Our growing library of podcasts acts as a comprehensive guide to Málaga, offering long-term exposure for local businesses and lasting value for tourists.

Collaborative Content Creation: We work with local influencers and businesses to create rich, engaging content that showcases the best of the Costa del Sol.

On-Air to Digital Strategy: Our radio shows serve as gateways to deeper content, using teasers and trailers to drive listeners to our on-demand podcasts.

Revenue-Driven Digital Strategy: We optimize earnings across all platforms while providing affordable advertising opportunities for local businesses.

Malaga Radio isn’t just a station—it’s a multimedia hub that connects tourists with unforgettable experiences in Málaga and the Costa del Sol, both while they’re here and long after they’ve gone.

Name: What the Trade ?! Inclusive Guide to Sustainable Global Business
Description:
What The Trade: The Inclusive Guide to Sustainable Global Business
 Podcast |  Launch in June 2025

Description:
What The Trade is a podcast that makes trade regulation understandable and inclusive. This project aims to help young entrepreneurs and women-led businesses:
 Understand market access rules and global trade agreements
 Adapt to sustainability standards
 Navigate complex systems with clarity and confidence
 Step into international spaces that weren’t built for them
 And hear real, honest trade journeys — including my own — to feel seen, prepared, and empowered.

In each episode, we break down trade policies, environmental challenges, and inclusivity issues, making them easy to understand for all listeners. We bring in experts and real-world practitioners to discuss the tangible impacts of trade on our societies and the planet, and explore how we can reimagine economic models that are more equitable and sustainable.

Why listen?
 Inclusivity: We make business and trade understandable for all, removing the jargon and addressing crucial topics that affect the future of our planet.
 Sustainability: Learn how trade practices can be rethought to be socially responsible and environmentally sustainable.
 Simplicity: Engaging and insightful discussions on complex topics, presented in a clear and accessible manner.

For whom?
- Students, young professionals, and entrepreneurs eager to grasp the fundamentals of global trade and its implications
- Policymakers and sustainability advocates interested in practical solutions in trade
- Anyone curious about how global markets work and their impact on our daily lives

Subscribe for thought-provoking yet accessible conversations about sustainable trade, the global economy, and economic justice. Let’s rethink trade for a more inclusive and sustainable future.

בין אם את עצמאית/שכירה/יזמית או בתקופת מעבר – כאן תוכלי למצוא רעיונות, תמיכה וכלים יישומים שילכו איתך גם מחוץ לאוזניות.

על המנחות: עדי סלע ימיני, מנהלת קיימות ופיתוח עסקי, ותמוז גולדמן, מנהלת שיווק בהייטק, שתי אימהות 'מתחילות' שהכירו בתואר השני במנהל עסקים והחליטו להרים את הפורמט שיענה על השאלות שבערו בהן בזמן ההריון והשילוב עם הקריירה.

Name: Kick Off With Jamie McCreedy
Description:
Jamie McCreedy is on a mission to interview someone from every country on his shows, "Kick Off" and "Inside The Mind Of." As a passionate football enthusiast and podcast host, Jamie provides unique perspectives into the realm of football like never before. His journey into media began at 13 with local radio, and since then, his love for football and talking has driven him to connect with professionals and fans alike.

Jamie started playing football at age 9 and quickly became a top scorer in local leagues. His podcasting journey allows him to explore the diverse paths people take to reach the top levels of football. From those just beginning their professional careers to veterans who have hung up their boots, Jamie aims to understand the life of a professional footballer. He delves into the hard work and dedication required to be among the top 1% of academy players who go pro, while also highlighting that success can come in various forms and it largely depends on one's conduct both on and off the pitch.

Through his interviews, Jamie strives to build a personal and recognizable relationship between players, coaches, and the fans who eagerly cheer them on each week. His goal is to offer fans a glimpse into the lives of their football heroes, fostering a deeper understanding and connection. For Jamie, podcasting isn't just a job—it's a fun hobby driven by his passion for football and communication. His advice to aspiring podcasters is to start without fear and embrace the journey, knowing that the only way is up.

Name: Team pLESStic!
Description:
In de team pLESStic! podcast nemen wij jou mee naar plekken waar plastic een bijzondere rol speelt. Team pLESStic! bestaat uit Marnix van de Vijver (imagineer en verhalenverteller) en Romy van Dongen (scheikundig onderzoeker en dichter). Marnix zijn specialisme ligt bij het tot leven laten komen van verhalen en Romy werkt op een (onderzoeks)lab voor medicijn ontwikkeling.

Wij gaan in de podcast met mensen in gesprek die op grote of kleine schaal hard werken aan een oplossing voor onze plastic uitdaging en een schonere toekomst. Sommige verhalen of acties lijken vaak klein, maar al deze acties samen vormen het verschil. Onze podcast is een centraal verzamelpunt voor deze goede ideeën.

Team pLESStic! brengt wetenschap en cultuur samen.
De verhalende podcast bestaat uit korte interviews met onze pLESStic! gasten waarbij we ingaan op de acties en hoe de luisteraars daar bij aan kunnen sluiten. Daarnaast behandelen we steeds kleine stukjes basischemie waardoor je kunt leren hoe een plastic eigenlijk gemaakt en verwerkt wordt, waarom recyclen zo lastig is voor de industrie en wat er nodig is voor een toekomstbestendig materiaal. Tenslotte verbeelden we het verhaal van de pLESStic! gasten tot een kort artistiek meesterwerk in de vorm van poëzie of een kort luisterverhaal.

Deze podcast is hard nodig. De uitdaging van plastic houdt ons dagelijks bezig. We focussen ons echter vooral op de problemen en niet op de oplossingen. De politiek wijst naar de industrie, de industrie wijst naar de consument en de consument verwijst op zijn beurt weer terug naar de politiek. Het schiet zo niet op en wij moeten nu iets veranderen, voor het plastic ons en de toekomst van onze kinderen drastisch veranderd.

We hebben elkaars stem nodig. Plastics (polymeren) bestaan uit een lange keten van verschillende moleculen die allemaal aan elkaar gekoppeld zijn tot een ijzersterk geheel. Team pLESStic! brengt wetenschap en cultuur samen. Helpen jullie ons mee om samen een nieuw toekoms

Name: Thomas/Nelson Media
Description:
Thomas/Nelson Media produces the nationally syndicated radio show, "Wayback Saturday Night." The program is best suited for Classic Hits, Oldies, and News/Talk stations both AM and FM. 

Wayback Saturday Night is a three hour show and originates from News/Talk WPFR in Terre Haute, IN. It airs 6p.m. - 9p.m. EST with Wayback Rewind 9p.m. - midnight. It streams at wpfrnow.com and at waybacksaturdaynight.com and is available on-demand at waybacksaturdaynight.com 

Wayback Saturday Night is "America's Classic Top 40 Radio Show" and targets listeners 55+ by focusing on the Golden Age of Top 40 (the '60s and '70s), using the same extreme variety that comprised Top 40 back in the day: The top tunes in Pop, Rock, R&B, Easy Listening, and Country.

Wayback Saturday Night also incorporates songs from slightly beyond the Golden Age by occasionally featuring the Wayback Hall of Fame (1958-1963) as well select songs from the '80s - those '80s hits with an older feel and/or the artist is rooted in a previous decade such as Higher Love by Steve Winwood and Footloose by Kenny Loggins.

Each show has a special theme on the Wayback Center Stage such as Woodstock Revisited, The Best of the Rolling Stones, Beatle Mania, '60s Motown, Foreigner and Styx, the Essential Carpenters, and '60s Psychedelic Rock. It's a very eclectic program highlighting music from simpler times. 

There are also fun facts, deep dives (lost tracks), and the Wayback Relic (a look back at fads and unique items of the past - going steady rings, transistor radios, beehive hairdos, etc. 

The host is Bryan Thomas who has been a radio DJ since the '60s, with experience in Top 40/CHR, AC, Oldies, and Country. 

Saturday nights are perfect for reminiscing and an excellent time for younger listeners to discover this epic period in American pop culture - the greatest music revolution in history!

There's a noticeable void nationwide for this type of radio program. Wayback Saturday Night comes to the rescue!

Name: The Overcompensating
Description:
The Overcompensating is a lifestyle & culture project exploring the art of trying too hard — and finding meaning in the process.

Created by Iñaki Carvajal and María Prieto, it began as a series of shared notes, mild spirals, and voice messages between two lifelong friends. What started as a Substack experiment has evolved into a podcast and visual journal about the contradictions of modern ambition: taste, identity, chaos, and the constant search for clarity.

We talk about the things that make us us:
→ Why we overdo, overthink, and overfeel.
→ How aesthetics and emotions shape our decisions.
→ The balance between self-awareness and self-delusion (and how both can be useful).

It’s not a brand (not yet anyways) or a guide. It’s a space for reflection — and for a laugh at our own expense.

 The Overcompensating Podcast

Where voice notes become episodes. Honest conversations on identity, ambition, taste, and the aesthetics of modern overdoing. Sometimes vulnerable, sometimes ridiculous — always real.

 What You’ll Find Here

Elevator Diaries: Small reflections from transitional spaces — literal or emotional.

Overcompensating Flashbacks: Glimpses of places, moments, and moods we can’t quite let go of.

Currently Overcompensating For: The tiny daily spirals that make us human (and content).

The Overcompensating is for anyone navigating the in-between — between control and chaos, humor and honesty, too much and not enough.

We’re still building it as we go.
Thanks for being here while it takes shape.
Let’s see what happens.
_____________

Name: Canal TE
Description:
L’any 2013, les dues televisions de referència a les Terres de l’Ebre, Tortosa Televisió i L’Ebre TV s’uneixen per crear la televisió local líder d’audiència del sud de Catalunya: Canal TE

Un projecte que compta amb el suport del Consell de l’Audiovisual de Catalunya i del Govern de la Generalitat, i que s’ha consolidat com el mitjà audiovisual més vist al sud de Catalunya, convertint-lo, a més, en una referent de qualitat dins La Xarxa (L’agrupació de televisions local de Catalunya).

El principal objectiu de Canal TE és el servei d’informació i entreteniment al llarg de l’àrea d’influència de les Terres de l’Ebre, apostant sempre per la qualitat, la pluralitat, i per donar a conèixer als seus ciutadans tot allò que passa al territori des d’una òptica de servei públic.

Canal TE disposa de la redacció més nombrosa i qualificada del territori, vinculada a 2 grups de comunicació, i que subministra permanentment notícies i reportatges a diferents mitjans de comunicació de tot Catalunya.

Canal TE és l’únic mitjà i canal estable de comunicació que cobreix de manera permanent l’anomenada ‘Vegueria de les Terres de l’Ebre’, unint a través de la televisió els habitants d’aquest territori. Això és possible gràcies als més de vint reemissors repartits per les comarques del Baix Ebre, Montsià, Terra Alta i Ribera d’Ebre, i que a més, fan possible que la televisió arribi a franges del nord del País Valencià i Aragó.

Canal TE és el representant de La Xarxa de Comunicació Local al sud de Catalunya. Això implica que és també el mitjà que difon tot allò que passa a les Terres de l’Ebre al conjunt del país a través de les 48 televisions locals i més de 200 emissores de ràdio municipals. A més,  la difusió del contingut generat per Canal TE també arriba al circuit de Televisions Digitals Independents, format per 10 televisions locals, de les quals el Canal TE en forma part.

Name: Kentucky's Voice
Description:
At Kentucky's Voice, we believe in the enduring strength that comes from embracing traditional values. Our mission is to provide a space where the conservative Christian Republican community can come together, share their stories, and engage in discussions that uphold the principles that have long defined Kentucky.

Faith is the cornerstone of our platform. We celebrate the rich tapestry of religious beliefs that have woven through the fabric of Kentucky's history. Whether it's through personal testimonies, reflections on faith-based traditions, or discussions on the role of spirituality in our lives, Kentucky's Voice is a sanctuary for those who find solace in their faith.

Family is the heartbeat of our community. We cherish the values of love, commitment, and the sanctity of life. Our platform is a place to share the joys and challenges of family life, where we celebrate the importance of strong family bonds and the role they play in shaping our communities.

Freedom is our guiding principle. We advocate for limited government, individual liberties, and the constitutional rights that have made America a beacon of freedom. Kentucky's Voice is a platform where we discuss policies, current events, and political developments that align with conservative Christian Republican values.

Description:
Welcome to Innersound Radio, a non-commercial radio, where you listen to music with your soul! For the past 15 years, we have been sharing melodies and rhythms with passion and dedication! Our radio station plays various genres of music from around the world, spanning from indie and alternative, to rock and jazz, a multicultural rag of sounds without borders.

Throughout the years we have bonded as a team curating our playlists in respect to our listeners, treating them to a diverse and inclusive mix of all time classic hits and the latest releases, but also experimental, underground and electronic dance music. You can listen to tunes you grew up with or get introduced to emerging artists and groups and discover new soundscapes. Our station has it all.

During this journey we have to express our heartfelt gratitude to our loyal listeners who accompany us in the universe of music all these years. We are committed to sharing music from our soul since music is a bridge that unites us all.

Tune in and let the magic of music from every corner of the world GUIDE you to roads not taken. Let our station be your constant companion  for better or for worse enjoying the colourful path that music creates. Thank you for being a part of our radio family!

#μusic #musicforyoursoul #NNRSND

Somos un medio pluralista, creemos en la participación de las personas como motor de desarrollo y aportar con los espacios para el debate público, la cultura y la información seria lo asumimos como una misión fundamental.
En YoNoDijeEso! lo decimos fuerte y claro.

Name: Nostálgica Multimedia
Description:
Nostálgica.CL es el portal electrónico de radio Nostálgica, emisora que nació en la ciudad de Copiapó el 10 de Diciembre del año 2003 en su primera frecuencia la 88.1, la empresa propietaria es Punto Creativo Ltda. Una empresa atacameña, cuyos socios son Karina Guaita Herrera y Ricardo Campos Morales.

Nostálgica desde sus inicios demostró ser una emisora regional seria, definida en sus convicciones y de calidad técnica y programática de excelencia.

Nostálgica  es la primera y única emisora de Copiapó que sale al resto de la Región de Atacama en forma simultánea y programación única a través de 13 frecuencias..

La estructura fundamental  de Nostálgica está basada en una variada programación musical,  con clásicos en español e inglés escogidos cuidadosamente entre lo mejor de los años 1970 al 2020, además de programas en vivo durante el día y la noche, microprogramas,  publicidad, entrevistas de contingencia, despachos desde móviles, transmisión de eventos, y con un departamento de prensa con profesionales de primer nivel el cual cubre las noticias locales, regionales  y nacionales durante las 24 horas.

El grupo objetivo de Nostálgica, son hombres y mujeres sobre los 35 años de edad, estratos socioeconómicos C1, C2 y C3, Alto, Medio Alto, Medio Bajo.

En la última encuesta realizada por Ipsos Chile el segundo semestre del 2022 en Copiapó, radio Nostálgica resultó ser nuevamente y por cuarto año consecutivo la emisora más escuchada de Copiapó con un 35,9% de sintonía, más del doble que la emisora más cercana.

Nostálgica  el año 2005 fue pionera e inauguró su  portal web corporativo  www.nostalgica.cl el cual era necesario debido a las nuevas tecnologías y tendencias que empezaban a complementar los medios tradicionales de la época, en el cual se comenzó a publicar noticias y servicios de distinto índole, y lo más importante el audio online de la emisora, lo cual abrió las fronteras de comunicar sus contenidos a todo el mundo.

We educate, inform, and empower people with drug, health and mental issues to thousands around the globe, while creating partnerships with specialist in our community to help resolve these issues.

We provide resources for various services in their city, county and state departments for public health needs.
Our Mission

Name: WunderParlement
Description:
Le collectif WunderParlement organise depuis 2014 des voyages apprenants vers le parlement européen de Strasbourg, permettant à des centaines de jeunes de produire des contenus médiatiques, radio ou podcast, souvent pour la première fois.
Ces reporters en herbe rencontrent des eurodéputés, conseillers politiques, journalistes, commissaires, militants, travailleurs oubliés, réalisent des reportages, interviews, micro trottoirs qui leur permettent de découvrir la démocratie européenne au plus près
et de partager leurs rencontres sur www.wunderparlement.eu.
Pendant ses dix ans d’existence, WundeParlement a eu des dizaines de
partenaires au cours de saisons, porté par d’autres radios ou projets il s’est enrichi de ses plus de 500 participants, de plus de 30 nationalités différentes. Mais Wunderparlement est un projet ouvert à toutes les radios régionales, européennes ou du reste du monde qui souhaitent nous rejoindre.
________________________________________________

Le porteur du projet Wunderparlement est Radio WNE, radio associative, citoyenne et culturelle qui pratique l’éducation aux médias, à l´information et au numérique pour les jeunes et les moins jeunes. Ce média est administrativement porté par l´association « Agence de communication sociale et solidaire ».

Plusieurs partenaires sont engagés actuellement aux côtés de WNE dans ce collectif, notamment Radio Quetsch, Europop ou Radio Nefzawa.

Kalp FM, her anınıza eşlik edecek, hislerinize tercüman olacak. Aşka, huzura ve hayata dair her şeyin ritmini burada bulacaksınız.

Türkiye’nin en yeni ulusal radyosu Kalp FM, duygularınıza dokunmaya geliyor! Romantizmi ve huzuru aynı frekansta buluşturan Kalp FM, Türkçe slow ve romantik hitlerle dinleyicilerini her an yanlarında hissettirecek bir müzik deneyimine davet ediyor.

Aşkı anlatan en güzel şarkılar, hayatınıza eşlik edecek melodiler ve duygularınıza tercüman olacak eşsiz bir müzik seçkisi... Kalp FM, yalnızca bir radyo değil, aynı zamanda kalplerinize dokunan bir yol arkadaşı olacak.

İster güne anlam katan romantik bir başlangıç yapın, ister günün yorgunluğunu atarken sevginin tınılarıyla dinlenin... Kalp FM, size her zaman duygularınızı en güzel şekilde ifade edecek müzikleri sunmaya hazır.

Kalbinizin melodisini keşfetmek için doğru frekanstasınız!

CTV of Lane County is a non-profit airing public access TV on Comcast Channels 29 and 1088. The programs aired are created by members of the community. 

Who can join?
All residents of Lane County, Oregon are eligible to join for only $12 per year. There are requirements imposed by Sheldon High School for background checks and Covid-19 protocols we must follow as well. 

What does CTV do for the community?
Members can check out video and audio equipment, reserve studio time, and use the video editing software. You might find CTV recording at local events like Farmer’s Markets for “Shout Outs” by the community.

Local businesses and nonprofits may record programs that are of public interest as long as they are not a call to action.

CTV provides classes for free or low cost to members in order to help them learn and grow in video production and related fields.

Get Involved
CTV is 100% volunteer-run. We rely on everyone who volunteers from the Board to all our producers and teachers.

We welcome volunteers to help at community events, programming, teaching, and helping in the studio. There are Board elections yearly and all members are invited to run for election. 

If you have an idea you would like to implement and volunteer to see it through, email info@ctv29.org or discuss it with someone during studio hours.

The name, Listening Booth, is a nod to the booths and listening stations of music stores past---which were used to preview music before purchasing. In this age of streaming, we aim to be a similar "try before you buy" utility by offering a handcrafted playlist, the stories behind the tracks, and easy access to purchasing music directly from artists via their Bandcamp links (if available) in Episode Descriptions.

Founded in 2005, the Listening Booth continued its legacy of music discovery with a relaunch in 2022 on Anchor on Spotify.

Name: When Opportunity Doesn't Knock
Description:
"When Opportunity Doesn’t Knock” hosted by Award Winning Executive Producer Errol Silverman, is an inspirational and uplifting talk show that showcases the remarkable journeys of individuals from marginalized communities who have achieved exceptional success in various fields.

Each episode of “When Opportunity Doesn’t Knock” introduces viewers to a different remarkable person from a marginalized background, whether it be due to race, disability, or any other unique challenge they have faced.
Through in-depth interviews, captivating storytelling, and touching personal narratives, the show delves into their early struggles, the obstacles they encountered, and the pivotal moments that transformed their lives.
From groundbreaking scientists and innovative entrepreneurs to visionary artists and community leaders, "When Opportunity Doesn’t Knock” showcases a diverse range of accomplishments and passions. The show not only emphasizes the individual's personal triumphs but also their contributions to their respective fields and society.
The show not only celebrates their achievements but also sheds light on the societal barriers they had to overcome, providing a powerful narrative about resilience, determination, and the human spirit.

With a focus on empowerment and inspiration, "When Opportunity Doesn’t Knock" aims to motivate viewers to pursue their dreams, no matter their background or circumstances. By highlighting the strength and potential within marginalized communities, this TV series uplifts the human spirit and encourages positive change in the world.

Join us in celebrating these exceptional individuals who are truly breaking barriers and making a lasting impact on our society.
