Name: KORK North Bay TV
Description:
KORK North Bay TV is the only commercially broadcast (non-PBS) TV station north of the Golden Gate Bridge (up to about Redding) that focuses on Marin, Sonoma, Napa, Solano, Lake and Mendocino Counties, producing local programs and local news (without the politics). We are based in Sonoma Valley. 

The only other TV station that was in the North Bay was KFTY TV-50 in Santa Rosa who got bought out about 15 years ago and closed down. Since then, other than small, local PBS stations, there hasn't been a commercially broadcast TV station in the North Bay like any of the ones in San Francisco... until now. 

KORK-TV broadcasts on platforms such as Roku, Amazon Fire TV, Apple TV, Android TV and others, with more to come. It's 100% free to watch with no sign-up or subscription necessary. 

KORK TV's sister network is The Wine Country Channel, which will be launched soon. Think of it like The Cooking Channel or The Travel Channel, except focused on showcasing everything in the different wine country regions, such as Napa Valley, Sonoma Valley, Lake County, Mendocino County and beyond, covering all of the great things for visitors to see and do in those regions, from visiting wineries, to restaurants, hotels, spas, shopping, towns, parks, activities to do and so on, all in TV show formats.

Visit KORKtv.com to find out more.

Due to the success of these programmes on OUTREACH RADIO, OUTREACH DANCE has been created as a standalone radio service, broadcasting a variety of dance music programmes 24 hours-a-day. تقدم شركة الثري خدمات متعددة، ومن بين هذه الخدمات:

توزيع المحتوى الإعلامي: حيث تقوم الشركة بتوزيع المحتوى الإعلامي على شبكات التواصل الاجتماعي ومنصات الإنترنت بطريقة احترافية ومنظمة وفي الوقت المناسب.

التسويق الإلكتروني: حيث تقوم الشركة بإنشاء حملات تسويقية إلكترونية متكاملة تهدف إلى الترويج للمنتجات والخدمات الإعلامية، وذلك بالاعتماد على أحدث الأساليب والتقنيات في هذا المجال.

الإعلان: حيث تعمل الشركة على إنشاء حملات إعلانية فعالة وجذابة عبر شبكات التواصل الاجتماعي ومنصات الإنترنت، وذلك بالاعتماد على التحليل الدقيق لسلوك المستخدمين واهتماماتهم واحتياجاتهم

Name: Belo Broadcasting
Description:
Belo Broadcasting was a Dallas-based media company that owned 20 commercial broadcasting television stations and three regional 24-hour cable news television channels. The company was previously known as A. H. Belo Corporation after one of the early owners of the company, Alfred Horatio Belo, now the name of the newspaper company spun off from Belo early in 2008. Belo had its headquarters in the Belo Building in Downtown Dallas, designed by Dallas architects Omniplan and constructed between 1983 and 1985.

On June 13, 2013, Gannett Company announced plans to buy Belo for $1.5 billion and the assumption of debt.[17] Because of ownership conflicts in markets where both Belo and Gannett owned television stations and newspapers, Gannett planned to sell six Belo-owned stations—KMOV in St. Louis, WHAS-TV in Louisville, KMSB in Tucson, KGW in Portland, Oregon, and KTVK and KASW in Phoenix—to Sander Media, LLC, owned by former Belo executive Jack Sander. Gannett would have provided some services to the Sander stations under joint services agreements.

On June 29, 2015, Gannett split into two companies, one specializing in print media and named "Gannett," and the other specializing in broadcast and digital media. The latter company, Tegna, retained most of the Belo stations and is the legal successor to the company that previously bore Gannett's name

Name: Grayson County Amateur Radio Club
Description: The Grayson County Amateur Radio Club was founded in 1994, as a non-for profit, tax exempt, 501(c)(3) organization, that promotes ham radio in Grayson county area. Our goal is to have fun with amateur radio and provide vital emergency communication services to our communities. Membership, fees and donations are greatly appreciated and are used to 1) facilitate the club, working with local government and other community organizations to provide emergency communications during hazardous weather and local area, disasters or safety observation communications during local community events. 2) conduct special radio events stations that commemorate significant local historical events in Grayson County. 3) the club participation in winter and summer field day operational events to on our skills in both casual and emergency communications. We do not require you to be a member of the club to participate in our events, so feel free to jump in and join the fun. Whether you are a season ham, Just earn your license, Or are interested in learning more about amateur radio, You are welcome in the GCARC. Our club meetings are held at 8 PM on the first and third Sunday of the month on W5 RVT 147.000 repeater (+.6Mhz, PL 100). We are the ARRL affiliated club for Grayson County.

Munis Radio, founded in January 2024, is a radio platform that aims to present different dimensions of the Holy Quran to its listeners. It serves with 3 different broadcast channels:
	- Munis Radio: It broadcasts the Holy Quran in Arabic and conveys the beauties of the Holy Quran to its listeners with the recitation of 176 hafiz.

All 3 channels offer uninterrupted broadcasting services to those who want to listen and understand the Holy Quran from different perspectives.

Name: RuWave ALANYA 94FM
Description:
RuWave, Antalya bölgesinde Gazipaşa’dan Manavgat’a kadar yayın yapan öncü Rusça radyo istasyonudur. 2014 yılından bu yana, Türkiye’de yaşayan ve tatil yapan Rusça konuşan dinleyicilerin ilgisini çekiyoruz ve onlara kendi dillerinde kaliteli içerik sunuyoruz.

Bizi farklı kılan nedir?
	•	Bölgedeki tek radyo istasyonu olarak, dinleyicilerimizin diliyle konuşuyor ve onlarla güven dolu bir bağ kuruyoruz. Dinleyici kitlemiz, Türkiye’de ikamet edenler ve buraya tatil için gelen turistlerden oluşuyor.
	•	Dinleyicilerimiz, araç kullanırken radyomuzu dinleyen kişilerden oluşmaktadır. Kiralık araçlarda veya kendi arabalarında radyo dinleyenler, reklam mesajlarınızı doğrudan ve etkili bir şekilde duyarlar.

Hizmetlerimiz
	1.	Reklam kampanyaları — Markanızı tanıtmak için profesyonel sesli reklamlar oluşturuyoruz. Radyo reklamları, yeni müşteriler çekmenin ve marka bilinirliğini artırmanın kanıtlanmış bir yoludur. Türkiye’deki Rusça konuşan müşterilere ulaşarak satışlarınızı artırmanıza yardımcı oluyoruz.
	2.	Program sponsorluğu — Haberler, hava durumu veya müzik saatleri gibi popüler programlarımızın özel sponsoru olun. Bu sayede markanız düzenli olarak yayınlanır ve dinleyicilerin sadakatini kazanır.
	3.	Özel reklam paketleri — Her ölçekten şirket için esnek iş birliği koşulları sunuyoruz. Amacımız, kampanyalarınıza ve özel tekliflerinize dikkat çekerek satışlarınızı artırmak ve müşteri trafiğinizi çoğaltmaktır.
Neden RuWave’i tercih etmelisiniz?
	•	Her müşteriye özel yaklaşım sunuyoruz. İhtiyaçlarınızı dikkatle dinliyor ve markanız için etkili reklam kampanyaları tasarlıyoruz.
	•	Hedefe yönelik reklam yerleşimi ile mesajlarınızı doğru zamanda doğru kişilere ulaştırıyoruz. Reklamlarınızı prime-time saatlerinde planlayarak daha fazla dinleyiciye erişmenizi sağlıyoruz.
	•	Müşterilerimiz, radyo reklam kampanyalarımız sayesinde trafik ve satış artışı yaşadıklarını belirtiyorlar.

Our focus areas include:

OPN is building the future of streaming — where technology and storytelling evolve together.

 Des dels nostres estudis, cada dia compartim històries de vida, projectes empresarials, iniciatives socials i culturals, i tot allò que passa a Caldes i al seu entorn.

 A LinkedIn ens trobaràs com un espai de connexió entre comunicació i territori, on difonem el talent local, col·laborem amb empreses i institucions, i posem en valor el paper dels mitjans de proximitat en una societat més cohesionada i participativa.

 Programes com LÍDERS, El Calaix de Sastre, Cultura Caldes, Actualitat, o La Tarda formen part d’una graella que combina la informació amb l’entreteniment, i que reflecteix la diversitat i la vitalitat de la nostra comunitat.

 Ràdio Caldes: més que veu, som comunitat.

Segueix-nos per conèixer les darreres notícies, programes i col·laboracions, i descobreix com fem créixer Caldes… des de les ones!

Name: Staples Television
Description:
StaplesTV is the student-run television production program at Staples High School in Westport, CT.
Operating out of the studios at 70 North Avenue in collaboration with WWPT, StaplesTV creates original video content for social media, cable channel 78, and the Westport Public Schools livestream network.
What sets StaplesTV apart is its fully student-led structure and its commitment to authenticity. From directing to editing, every project is produced using industry-standard equipment by students who bring creativity and personality to every frame—redefining what high school TV can look like.

Whether it's sports, news, live broadcasts, or short-form features, StaplesTV blends professionalism with a fresh, engaging voice that resonates with its audience and community.

Name: Intuitive Mind Lab Radio
Description:
Intuitive Mind Lab Radio is for the awakened minds who are tired of the love and light culture, the truth-seekers, and paradigm-breakers ready for something deeper. This isn’t surface-level spirituality; it’s raw, real, and rooted in self-mastery.

Hosted by Lindsay Goodwin, a licensed natural medicine expert, intuitive medium, and expert in the subconscious mind and energy evolution, this podcast dives into the layers of awakening most won’t touch. We explore what it truly takes to unravel conditioning, regulate your nervous system, and reclaim your power.

Each episode bridges neuroscience, energetics, consciousness, and the unseen, helping you move beyond bypassing and into embodiment. This is where science meets spirit, and real transformation begins.

If you're ready to challenge the narrative, decode your mind, and live from deep alignment, this is your frequency.

Name: Nineteen.i
Description:
Perspective. Precision. Presence.

19i is the home of Scott Miller’s world-class football analysis, storytelling, and high-performance communication. The brand delivers elite football thinking to audiences across sport, business, education, and global media.

Scott Miller is a global football analyst and high-performance strategist with experience across the English Premier League, A-League, Danish Superliga, and international football.

His media work spans television, radio, podcasts, and written commentary-providing sharp tactical insight and human-centred analysis that resonates with players, coaches, executives, and fans.

As a keynote speaker, Scott transforms two decades of elite football experience into actionable lessons on leadership, performance, and communication for sporting organisations and corporate audiences worldwide.

Name: TRL - Total Request Live
Description:
TRL - Total Request Live was an interview and music video show, debuted in 1998 and anchored the weekday lineup aired on MTV. 

TRL was MTV's prime outlet for music videos as the network continued to concentrate on reality-based programming. 

In addition to music videos played during its countdown, TRL featured daily guests. 
The show was a popular promotion tool used by musicians, actors, and other celebrities to promote their newest works to the show's target teen demographic.

In a very short time the program became a fixed and unmissable appointment for millions of teenagers, who did not miss even one episode.
